chapters.zh: 大卫王年纪老迈，虽用被遮盖，仍不觉暖。
chapters.en: Now king David was old stricken in years; and they covered him with clothes, but he gat no heat.

chapters.zh: 所以臣仆对他说：不如为我主我王寻找一个处女，使他伺候王，奉养王，睡在王的怀中，好叫我主我王得暖。
chapters.en: Wherefore his servants said unto him, Let there be sought for my lord the king a young virgin: and let her stand before the king, and let her cherish him, and let her lie in thy bosom, that my lord the king may get heat.

chapters.zh: 于是在以色列全境寻找美貌的童女，寻得书念的一个童女亚比煞，就带到王那里。
chapters.en: So they sought for a fair damsel throughout all the coasts of Israel, and found Abishag a Shunammite, and brought her to the king.

chapters.zh: 这童女极其美貌，他奉养王，伺候王，王却没有与他亲近。
chapters.en: And the damsel very fair, and cherished the king, and ministered to him: but the king knew her not.

chapters.zh: 那时，哈及的儿子亚多尼雅自尊，说：我必作王，就为自己预备车辆、马兵，又派五十人在他前头奔走。
chapters.en: Then Adonijah the son of Haggith exalted himself, saying, I will be king: and he prepared him chariots and horsemen, and fifty men to run before him.

chapters.zh: 他父亲素来没有使他忧闷，说：你是做甚么呢？他甚俊美，生在押沙龙之后。
chapters.en: And his father had not displeased him at any time in saying, Why hast thou done so? and he also very goodly ; and bare him after Absalom.

chapters.zh: 亚多尼雅与洗鲁雅的儿子约押，和祭司亚比亚他商议；二人就顺从他，帮助他。
chapters.en: And he conferred with Joab the son of Zeruiah, and with Abiathar the priest: and they following Adonijah helped .

chapters.zh: 但祭司撒督、耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅、先知拿单、示每、利以，并大卫的勇士都不顺从亚多尼雅。
chapters.en: But Zadok the priest, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and Nathan the prophet, and Shimei, and Rei, and the mighty men which to David, were not with Adonijah.

chapters.zh: 一日，亚多尼雅在隐罗结旁、琐希列磐石那里宰了牛羊、肥犊，请他的诸弟兄，就是王的众子，并所有作王臣仆的犹大人；
chapters.en: And Adonijah slew sheep and oxen and fat cattle by the stone of Zoheleth, which by Enrogel, and called all his brethren the king's sons, and all the men of Judah the king's servants:

chapters.zh: 惟独先知拿单和比拿雅并勇士，与他的兄弟所罗门，他都没有请。
chapters.en: But Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah, and the mighty men, and Solomon his brother, he called not.

chapters.zh: 拿单对所罗门的母亲拔示巴说：哈及的儿子亚多尼雅作王了，你没有听见么？我们的主大卫却不知道。
chapters.en: Wherefore Nathan spake unto Bathsheba the mother of Solomon, saying, Hast thou not heard that Adonijah the son of Haggith doth reign, and David our lord knoweth not?

chapters.zh: 现在我可以给你出个主意，好保全你和你儿子所罗门的性命。
chapters.en: Now therefore come, let me, I pray thee, give thee counsel, that thou mayest save thine own life, and the life of thy son Solomon.

chapters.zh: 你进去见大卫王，对他说：我主我王啊，你不曾向婢女起誓说：你儿子所罗门必接续我作王，坐在我的位上么？现在亚多尼雅怎么作了王呢？
chapters.en: Go and get thee in unto king David, and say unto him, Didst not thou, my lord, O king, swear unto thine handmaid, saying, Assuredly Solomon thy son shall reign after me, and he shall sit upon my throne? why then doth Adonijah reign?

chapters.zh: 你还与王说话的时候，我也随后进去，证实你的话。
chapters.en: Behold, while thou yet talkest there with the king, I also will come in after thee, and confirm thy words.

chapters.zh: 拔示巴进入内室见王，王甚老迈，书念的童女亚比煞正伺候王。
chapters.en: And Bathsheba went in unto the king into the chamber: and the king was very old; and Abishag the Shunammite ministered unto the king.

chapters.zh: 拔示巴向王屈身下拜；王说：你要甚么？
chapters.en: And Bathsheba bowed, and did obeisance unto the king. And the king said, What wouldest thou?

chapters.zh: 他说：我主啊，你曾向婢女指著耶和华 ─ 你的神起誓说：你儿子所罗门必接续我作王，坐在我的位上。
chapters.en: And she said unto him, My lord, thou swarest by the LORD thy God unto thine handmaid, , Assuredly Solomon thy son shall reign after me, and he shall sit upon my throne.

chapters.zh: 现在亚多尼雅作王了，我主我王却不知道。
chapters.en: And now, behold, Adonijah reigneth; and now, my lord the king, thou knowest not:

chapters.zh: 他宰了许多牛羊、肥犊，请了王的众子和祭司亚比亚他，并元帅约押；惟独王的仆人所罗门，他没有请。
chapters.en: And he hath slain oxen and fat cattle and sheep in abundance, and hath called all the sons of the king, and Abiathar the priest, and Joab the captain of the host: but Solomon thy servant hath he not called.

chapters.zh: 我主我王啊，以色列众人的眼目都仰望你，等你晓谕他们，在我主我王之后谁坐你的位。
chapters.en: And thou, my lord, O king, the eyes of all Israel upon thee, that thou shouldest tell them who shall sit on the throne of my lord the king after him.

chapters.zh: 若不然，到我主我王与列祖同睡以后，我和我儿子所罗门必算为罪人了。
chapters.en: Otherwise it shall come to pass, when my lord the king shall sleep with his fathers, that I and my son Solomon shall be counted offenders.

chapters.zh: 拔示巴还与王说话的时候，先知拿单也进来了。
chapters.en: And, lo, while she yet talked with the king, Nathan the prophet also came in.

chapters.zh: 有人奏告王说：先知拿单来了。拿单进到王前，脸伏于地。
chapters.en: And they told the king, saying, Behold Nathan the prophet. And when he was come in before the king, he bowed himself before the king with his face to the ground.

chapters.zh: 拿单说：我主我王果然应许亚多尼雅说你必接续我作王，坐在我的位上么？
chapters.en: And Nathan said, My lord, O king, hast thou said, Adonijah shall reign after me, and he shall sit upon my throne?

chapters.zh: 他今日下去，宰了许多牛羊、肥犊，请了王的众子和军长，并祭司亚比亚他；他们正在亚多尼雅面前吃喝，说：愿亚多尼雅王万岁！
chapters.en: For he is gone down this day, and hath slain oxen and fat cattle and sheep in abundance, and hath called all the king's sons, and the captains of the host, and Abiathar the priest; and, behold, they eat and drink before him, and say, God save king Adonijah.

chapters.zh: 惟独我，就是你的仆人和祭司撒督，耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅，并王的仆人所罗门，他都没有请。
chapters.en: But me, me thy servant, and Zadok the priest, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and thy servant Solomon, hath he not called.

chapters.zh: 这事果然出乎我主我王么？王却没有告诉仆人们，在我主我王之后谁坐你的位。
chapters.en: Is this thing done by my lord the king, and thou hast not shewed unto thy servant, who should sit on the throne of my lord the king after him?

chapters.zh: 大卫王吩咐说：叫拔示巴来。拔示巴就进来，站在王面前。
chapters.en: Then king David answered and said, Call me Bathsheba. And she came into the king's presence, and stood before the king.

chapters.zh: 王起誓说：我指著救我性命脱离一切苦难、永生的耶和华起誓。
chapters.en: And the king sware, and said, the LORD liveth, that hath redeemed my soul out of all distress,

chapters.zh: 我既然指著耶和华 ─ 以色列的神向你起誓说：你儿子所罗门必接续我作王，坐在我的位上。我今日就必照这话而行。
chapters.en: Even as I sware unto thee by the LORD God of Israel, saying, Assuredly Solomon thy son shall reign after me, and he shall sit upon my throne in my stead; even so will I certainly do this day.

chapters.zh: 于是，拔示巴脸伏于地，向王下拜，说：愿我主大卫王万岁！
chapters.en: Then Bathsheba bowed with face to the earth, and did reverence to the king, and said, Let my lord king David live for ever.

chapters.zh: 大卫王又吩咐说：将祭司撒督、先知拿单、耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅召来！他们就都来到王面前。
chapters.en: And king David said, Call me Zadok the priest, and Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada. And they came before the king.

chapters.zh: 王对他们说：要带领你们主的仆人，使我儿子所罗门骑我的骡子，送他下到基训；
chapters.en: The king also said unto them, Take with you the servants of your lord, and cause Solomon my son to ride upon mine own mule, and bring him down to Gihon:

chapters.zh: 在那里，祭司撒督和先知拿单要膏他作以色列的王；你们也要吹角，说：愿所罗门王万岁！
chapters.en: And let Zadok the priest and Nathan the prophet anoint him there king over Israel: and blow ye with the trumpet, and say, God save king Solomon.

chapters.zh: 然后要跟随他上来，使他坐在我的位上，接续我作王。我已立他作以色列和犹大的君。
chapters.en: Then ye shall come up after him, that he may come and sit upon my throne; for he shall be king in my stead: and I have appointed him to be ruler over Israel and over Judah.

chapters.zh: 耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅对王说：阿们！愿耶和华 ─ 我主我王的神也这样命定。
chapters.en: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada answered the king, and said, Amen: the LORD God of my lord the king say so .

chapters.zh: 耶和华怎样与我主我王同在，愿他照样与所罗门同在，使他的国位比我主大卫王的国位更大。
chapters.en: As the LORD hath been with my lord the king, even so be he with Solomon, and make his throne greater than the throne of my lord king David.

chapters.zh: 于是，祭司撒督、先知拿单、耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅，和基利提人、比利提人都下去使所罗门骑大卫王的骡子，将他送到基训。
chapters.en: So Zadok the priest, and Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and the Cherethites, and the Pelethites, went down, and caused Solomon to ride upon king David's mule, and brought him to Gihon.

chapters.zh: 祭司撒督就从帐幕中取了盛膏油的角来，用膏膏所罗门。人就吹角，众民都说：愿所罗门王万岁！
chapters.en: And Zadok the priest took an horn of oil out of the tabernacle, and anointed Solomon. And they blew the trumpet; and all the people said, God save king Solomon.

chapters.zh: 众民跟随他上来，且吹笛，大大欢呼，声音震地。
chapters.en: And all the people came up after him, and the people piped with pipes, and rejoiced with great joy, so that the earth rent with the sound of them.

chapters.zh: 亚多尼雅和所请的众客筵宴方毕，听见这声音；约押听见角声就说：城中为何有这响呢？
chapters.en: And Adonijah and all the guests that with him heard as they had made an end of eating. And when Joab heard the sound of the trumpet, he said, Wherefore noise of the city being in an uproar?

chapters.zh: 他正说话的时候，祭司亚比亚他的儿子约拿单来了。亚多尼雅对他说：进来罢！你是个忠义的人，必是报好信息。
chapters.en: And while he yet spake, behold, Jonathan the son of Abiathar the priest came: and Adonijah said unto him, Come in; for thou a valiant man, and bringest good tidings.

chapters.zh: 约拿单对亚多尼雅说：我们的主大卫王诚然立所罗门为王了。
chapters.en: And Jonathan answered and said to Adonijah, Verily our lord king David hath made Solomon king.

chapters.zh: 王差遣祭司撒督、先知拿单、耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅，和基利提人、比利提人都去使所罗门骑王的骡子。
chapters.en: And the king hath sent with him Zadok the priest, and Nathan the prophet, and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and the Cherethites, and the Pelethites, and they have caused him to ride upon the king's mule:

chapters.zh: 祭司撒督和先知拿单在基训已经膏他作王。众人都从那里欢呼著上来，声音使城震动，这就是你们所听见的声音；
chapters.en: And Zadok the priest and Nathan the prophet have anointed him king in Gihon: and they are come up from thence rejoicing, so that the city rang again. This the noise that ye have heard.

chapters.zh: 并且所罗门登了国位。
chapters.en: And also Solomon sitteth on the throne of the kingdom.

chapters.zh: 王的臣仆也来为我们的主大卫王祝福，说：愿王的神使所罗门的名比王的名更尊荣；使他的国位比王的国位更大。王就在床上屈身下拜。
chapters.en: And moreover the king's servants came to bless our lord king David, saying, God make the name of Solomon better than thy name, and make his throne greater than thy throne. And the king bowed himself upon the bed.

chapters.zh: 王又说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神是应当称颂的；因他赐我一人今日坐在我的位上，我也亲眼看见了。
chapters.en: And also thus said the king, Blessed the LORD God of Israel, which hath given to sit on my throne this day, mine eyes even seeing .

chapters.zh: 亚多尼雅的众客听见这话就都惊惧，起来四散。
chapters.en: And all the guests that with Adonijah were afraid, and rose up, and went every man his way.

chapters.zh: 亚多尼雅惧怕所罗门，就起来，去抓住祭坛的角。
chapters.en: And Adonijah feared because of Solomon, and arose, and went, and caught hold on the horns of the altar.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉所罗门说：亚多尼雅惧怕所罗门王，现在抓住祭坛的角，说：愿所罗门王今日向我起誓，必不用刀杀仆人。
chapters.en: And it was told Solomon, saying, Behold, Adonijah feareth king Solomon: for, lo, he hath caught hold on the horns of the altar, saying, Let king Solomon swear unto me to day that he will not slay his servant with the sword.

chapters.zh: 所罗门说：他若作忠义的人，连一根头发也不致落在地上；他若行恶，必要死亡。
chapters.en: And Solomon said, If he will shew himself a worthy man, there shall not an hair of him fall to the earth: but if wickedness shall be found in him, he shall die.

chapters.zh: 于是所罗门王差遣人，使亚多尼雅从坛上下来，他就来，向所罗门王下拜；所罗门对他说：你回家去罢！
chapters.en: So king Solomon sent, and they brought him down from the altar. And he came and bowed himself to king Solomon: and Solomon said unto him, Go to thine house.

chapters.zh: 大卫的死期临近了，就嘱吩他儿子所罗门说：
chapters.en: Now the days of David drew nigh that he should die; and he charged Solomon his son, saying,

chapters.zh: 我现在要走世人必走的路。所以，你当刚强，作大丈夫，
chapters.en: I go the way of all the earth: be thou strong therefore, and shew thyself a man;

chapters.zh: 遵守耶和华 ─ 你神所吩咐的，照著摩西律法上所写的行主的道，谨守他的律例、诫命、典章、法度。这样，你无论做甚么事，不拘往何处去，尽都亨通。
chapters.en: And keep the charge of the LORD thy God, to walk in his ways, to keep his statutes, and his commandments, and his judgments, and his testimonies, as it is written in the law of Moses, that thou mayest prosper in all that thou doest, and whithersoever thou turnest thyself:

chapters.zh: 耶和华必成就向我所应许的话说：你的子孙若谨慎自己的行为，尽心尽意诚诚实实地行在我面前，就不断人坐以色列的国位。
chapters.en: That the LORD may continue his word which he spake concerning me, saying, If thy children take heed to their way, to walk before me in truth with all their heart and with all their soul, there shall not fail thee (said he) a man on the throne of Israel.

chapters.zh: 你知道洗鲁雅的儿子约押向我所行的，就是杀了以色列的两个元帅：尼珥的儿子押尼珥和益帖儿子亚玛撒。他在太平之时流这二人的血，如在争战之时一样，将这血染了腰间束的带和脚上穿的鞋。
chapters.en: Moreover thou knowest also what Joab the son of Zeruiah did to me, what he did to the two captains of the hosts of Israel, unto Abner the son of Ner, and unto Amasa the son of Jether, whom he slew, and shed the blood of war in peace, and put the blood of war upon his girdle that about his loins, and in his shoes that on his feet.

chapters.zh: 所以你要照你的智慧行，不容他白头安然下阴间。
chapters.en: Do therefore according to thy wisdom, and let not his hoar head go down to the grave in peace.

chapters.zh: 你当恩待基列人巴西莱的众子，使他们常与你同席吃饭；因为我躲避你哥哥押沙龙的时候，他们拿食物来迎接我。
chapters.en: But shew kindness unto the sons of Barzillai the Gileadite, and let them be of those that eat at thy table: for so they came to me when I fled because of Absalom thy brother.

chapters.zh: 在你这里有巴户琳的便雅悯人，基拉的儿子示每；我往玛哈念去的那日，他用狠毒的言语咒骂我，后来却下约但河迎接我，我就指著耶和华向他起誓说：我必不用刀杀你。
chapters.en: And, behold, with thee Shimei the son of Gera, a Benjamite of Bahurim, which cursed me with a grievous curse in the day when I went to Mahanaim: but he came down to meet me at Jordan, and I sware to him by the LORD, saying, I will not put thee to death with the sword.

chapters.zh: 现在你不要以他为无罪。你是聪明人，必知道怎样待他，使他白头见杀，流血下到阴间。
chapters.en: Now therefore hold him not guiltless: for thou a wise man, and knowest what thou oughtest to do unto him; but his hoar head bring thou down to the grave with blood.

chapters.zh: 大卫与他列祖同睡，葬在大卫城。
chapters.en: So David slept with his fathers, and was buried in the city of David.

chapters.zh: 大卫作以色列王四十年：在希伯仑作王七年，在耶路撒冷作王三十三年。
chapters.en: And the days that David reigned over Israel forty years: seven years reigned he in Hebron, and thirty and three years reigned he in Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 所罗门坐他父亲大卫的位，他的国甚是坚固。
chapters.en: Then sat Solomon upon the throne of David his father; and his kingdom was established greatly.

chapters.zh: 哈及的儿子亚多尼雅去见所罗门的母亲拔示巴，拔示巴问他说：你来是为平安么？回答说：是为平安；
chapters.en: And Adonijah the son of Haggith came to Bathsheba the mother of Solomon. And she said, Comest thou peaceably? And he said, Peaceably.

chapters.zh: 又说：我有话对你说。拔示巴说：你说罢。
chapters.en: He said moreover, I have somewhat to say unto thee. And she said, Say on.

chapters.zh: 亚多尼雅说：你知道国原是归我的，以色列众人也都仰望我作王，不料，国反归了我兄弟，因他得国是出乎耶和华。
chapters.en: And he said, Thou knowest that the kingdom was mine, and all Israel set their faces on me, that I should reign: howbeit the kingdom is turned about, and is become my brother's: for it was his from the LORD.

chapters.zh: 现在我有一件事求你，望你不要推辞。拔示巴说：你说罢。
chapters.en: And now I ask one petition of thee, deny me not. And she said unto him, Say on.

chapters.zh: 他说：求你请所罗门王将书念的女子亚比煞赐我为妻，因他必不推辞你。
chapters.en: And he said, Speak, I pray thee, unto Solomon the king, (for he will not say thee nay,) that he give me Abishag the Shunammite to wife.

chapters.zh: 拔示巴说：好，我必为你对王提说。
chapters.en: And Bathsheba said, Well; I will speak for thee unto the king.

chapters.zh: 于是，拔示巴去见所罗门王，要为亚多尼雅提说；王起来迎接，向他下拜，就坐在位上，吩咐人为王母设一座位，他便坐在王的右边。
chapters.en: Bathsheba therefore went unto king Solomon, to speak unto him for Adonijah. And the king rose up to meet her, and bowed himself unto her, and sat down on his throne, and caused a seat to be set for the king's mother; and she sat on his right hand.

chapters.zh: 拔示巴说：我有一件小事求你，望你不要推辞。王说：请母亲说，我必不推辞。
chapters.en: Then she said, I desire one small petition of thee; , say me not nay. And the king said unto her, Ask on, my mother: for I will not say thee nay.

chapters.zh: 拔示巴说：求你将书念的女子亚比煞赐给你哥哥亚多尼雅为妻。
chapters.en: And she said, Let Abishag the Shunammite be given to Adonijah thy brother to wife.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王对他母亲说：为何单替他求书念的女子亚比煞呢？也可以为他求国罢！他是我的哥哥，他有祭司亚比亚他和洗鲁雅的儿子约押为辅佐。
chapters.en: And king Solomon answered and said unto his mother, And why dost thou ask Abishag the Shunammite for Adonijah? ask for him the kingdom also; for he mine elder brother; even for him, and for Abiathar the priest, and for Joab the son of Zeruiah.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王就指著耶和华起誓说：亚多尼雅这话是自己送命，不然，愿神重重地降罚与我。
chapters.en: Then king Solomon sware by the LORD, saying, God do so to me, and more also, if Adonijah have not spoken this word against his own life.

chapters.zh: 耶和华坚立我，使我坐在父亲大卫的位上，照著所应许的话为我建立家室；现在我指著永生的耶和华起誓，亚多尼雅今日必被治死。
chapters.en: Now therefore, the LORD liveth, which hath established me, and set me on the throne of David my father, and who hath made me an house, as he promised, Adonijah shall be put to death this day.

chapters.zh: 于是所罗门王差遣耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅，将亚多尼雅杀死。
chapters.en: And king Solomon sent by the hand of Benaiah the son of Jehoiada; and he fell upon him that he died.

chapters.zh: 王对祭司亚比亚他说：你回亚拿突归自己的田地去罢！你本是该死的，但因你在我父亲大卫面前抬过主耶和华的约柜，又与我父亲同受一切苦难，所以我今日不将你杀死。
chapters.en: And unto Abiathar the priest said the king, Get thee to Anathoth, unto thine own fields; for thou worthy of death: but I will not at this time put thee to death, because thou barest the ark of the Lord GOD before David my father, and because thou hast been afflicted in all wherein my father was afflicted.

chapters.zh: 所罗门就革除亚比亚他，不许他作耶和华的祭司。这样，便应验耶和华在示罗论以利家所说的话。
chapters.en: So Solomon thrust out Abiathar from being priest unto the LORD; that he might fulfil the word of the LORD, which he spake concerning the house of Eli in Shiloh.

chapters.zh: 约押虽然没有归从押沙龙，却归从了亚多尼雅。他听见这风声，就逃到耶和华的帐幕，抓住祭坛的角。
chapters.en: Then tidings came to Joab: for Joab had turned after Adonijah, though he turned not after Absalom. And Joab fled unto the tabernacle of the LORD, and caught hold on the horns of the altar.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉所罗门王说：约押逃到耶和华的帐幕，现今在祭坛的旁边。所罗门就差遣耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅，说你去将他杀死。
chapters.en: And it was told king Solomon that Joab was fled unto the tabernacle of the LORD; and, behold, by the altar. Then Solomon sent Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, saying, Go, fall upon him.

chapters.zh: 比拿雅来到耶和华的帐幕，对约押说：王吩咐说，你出来罢！他说：我不出去，我要死在这里。比拿雅就去回覆王，说约押如此如此回答我。
chapters.en: And Benaiah came to the tabernacle of the LORD, and said unto him, Thus saith the king, Come forth. And he said, Nay; but I will die here. And Benaiah brought the king word again, saying, Thus said Joab, and thus he answered me.

chapters.zh: 王说：你可以照著他的话行，杀死他，将他葬埋，好叫约押流无辜人血的罪不归我和我的父家了。
chapters.en: And the king said unto him, Do as he hath said, and fall upon him, and bury him; that thou mayest take away the innocent blood, which Joab shed, from me, and from the house of my father.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必使约押流人血的罪归到他自己的头上；因为他用刀杀了两个比他又义又好的人，就是以色列元帅尼珥的儿子押尼珥和犹大元帅益帖的儿子亚玛撒，我父亲大卫却不知道。
chapters.en: And the LORD shall return his blood upon his own head, who fell upon two men more righteous and better than he, and slew them with the sword, my father David not knowing , Abner the son of Ner, captain of the host of Israel, and Amasa the son of Jether, captain of the host of Judah.

chapters.zh: 故此，流这二人血的罪必归到约押和他后裔的头上，直到永远；惟有大卫和他的后裔，并他的家与国，必从耶和华那里得平安，直到永远。
chapters.en: Their blood shall therefore return upon the head of Joab, and upon the head of his seed for ever: but upon David, and upon his seed, and upon his house, and upon his throne, shall there be peace for ever from the LORD.

chapters.zh: 于是耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅上去，将约押杀死，葬在旷野约押自己的坟墓 ( 原文作房屋 ) 里。
chapters.en: So Benaiah the son of Jehoiada went up, and fell upon him, and slew him: and he was buried in his own house in the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 王就立耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅作元帅，代替约押，又使祭司撒督代替亚比亚他。
chapters.en: And the king put Benaiah the son of Jehoiada in his room over the host: and Zadok the priest did the king put in the room of Abiathar.

chapters.zh: 王差遣人将示每召来，对他说：你要在耶路撒冷建造房屋居住，不可出来往别处去。
chapters.en: And the king sent and called for Shimei, and said unto him, Build thee an house in Jerusalem, and dwell there, and go not forth thence any whither.

chapters.zh: 你当确实地知道，你何日出来过汲沦溪，何日必死！你的罪 ( 原文作血 ) 必归到自己的头上。
chapters.en: For it shall be, on the day thou goest out, and passest over the brook Kidron, thou shalt know for certain that thou shalt surely die: thy blood shall be upon thine own head.

chapters.zh: 示每对王说：这话甚好！我主我王怎样说，仆人必怎样行。于是示每多日住在耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: And Shimei said unto the king, The saying good: as my lord the king hath said, so will thy servant do. And Shimei dwelt in Jerusalem many days.

chapters.zh: 过了三年，示每的两个仆人逃到迦特王玛迦的儿子亚吉那里去。有人告诉示每说：你的仆人在迦特。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the end of three years, that two of the servants of Shimei ran away unto Achish son of Maachah king of Gath. And they told Shimei, saying, Behold, thy servants in Gath.

chapters.zh: 示每起来，备上驴，往迦特到亚吉那里去找他的仆人，就从迦特带他仆人回来。
chapters.en: And Shimei arose, and saddled his ass, and went to Gath to Achish to seek his servants: and Shimei went, and brought his servants from Gath.

chapters.zh: 有人告诉所罗门说：示每出耶路撒冷往迦特去，回来了。
chapters.en: And it was told Solomon that Shimei had gone from Jerusalem to Gath, and was come again.

chapters.zh: 王就差遣人将示每召了来，对他说：我岂不是叫你指著耶和华起誓，并且警戒你说你当确实地知道，你哪日出来往别处去，那日必死么？你也对我说：这话甚好，我必听从。
chapters.en: And the king sent and called for Shimei, and said unto him, Did I not make thee to swear by the LORD, and protested unto thee, saying, Know for a certain, on the day thou goest out, and walkest abroad any whither, that thou shalt surely die? and thou saidst unto me, The word I have heard good.

chapters.zh: 现在你为何不遵守你指著耶和华起的誓和我所吩咐你的命令呢？
chapters.en: Why then hast thou not kept the oath of the LORD, and the commandment that I have charged thee with?

chapters.zh: 王又对示每说：你向我父亲大卫所行的一切恶事，你自己心里也知道，所以耶和华必使你的罪恶归到自己的头上；
chapters.en: The king said moreover to Shimei, Thou knowest all the wickedness which thine heart is privy to, that thou didst to David my father: therefore the LORD shall return thy wickedness upon thine own head;

chapters.zh: 惟有所罗门王必得福，并且大卫的国位必在耶和华面前坚定，直到永远。
chapters.en: And king Solomon blessed, and the throne of David shall be established before the LORD for ever.

chapters.zh: 于是王吩咐耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅，他就去杀死示每。这样，便坚定了所罗门的国位。
chapters.en: So the king commanded Benaiah the son of Jehoiada; which went out, and fell upon him, that he died. And the kingdom was established in the hand of Solomon.

chapters.zh: 所罗门与埃及王法老结亲，娶了法老的女儿为妻，接他进入大卫城，直等到造完了自己的宫和耶和华的殿，并耶路撒冷周围的城墙。
chapters.en: And Solomon made affinity with Pharaoh king of Egypt, and took Pharaoh's daughter, and brought her into the city of David, until he had made an end of building his own house, and the house of the LORD, and the wall of Jerusalem round about.

chapters.zh: 当那些日子，百姓仍在邱坛献祭，因为还没有为耶和华的名建殿。
chapters.en: Only the people sacrificed in high places, because there was no house built unto the name of the LORD, until those days.

chapters.zh: 所罗门爱耶和华，遵行他父亲大卫的律例，只是还在邱坛献祭烧香。
chapters.en: And Solomon loved the LORD, walking in the statutes of David his father: only he sacrificed and burnt incense in high places.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王上基遍去献祭；因为在那里有极大 ( 或作出名 ) 的邱坛，他在那坛上献一千牺牲作燔祭。
chapters.en: And the king went to Gibeon to sacrifice there; for that the great high place: a thousand burnt offerings did Solomon offer upon that altar.

chapters.zh: 在基遍，夜间梦中，耶和华向所罗门显现，对他说：你愿我赐你甚么？你可以求。
chapters.en: In Gibeon the LORD appeared to Solomon in a dream by night: and God said, Ask what I shall give thee.

chapters.zh: 所罗门说：你仆人 ─ 我父亲大卫用诚实、公义、正直的心行在你面前，你就向他大施恩典，又为他存留大恩，赐他一个儿子坐在他的位上，正如今日一样。
chapters.en: And Solomon said, Thou hast shewed unto thy servant David my father great mercy, according as he walked before thee in truth, and in righteousness, and in uprightness of heart with thee; and thou hast kept for him this great kindness, that thou hast given him a son to sit on his throne, as this day.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 我的神啊，如今你使仆人接续我父亲大卫作王；但我是幼童，不知道应当怎样出入。
chapters.en: And now, O LORD my God, thou hast made thy servant king instead of David my father: and I a little child: I know not to go out or come in.

chapters.zh: 仆人住在你所拣选的民中，这民多得不可胜数。
chapters.en: And thy servant in the midst of thy people which thou hast chosen, a great people, that cannot be numbered nor counted for multitude.

chapters.zh: 所以求你赐我智慧，可以判断你的民，能辨别是非。不然，谁能判断这众多的民呢？
chapters.en: Give therefore thy servant an understanding heart to judge thy people, that I may discern between good and bad: for who is able to judge this thy so great a people?

chapters.zh: 所罗门因为求这事，就蒙主喜悦。
chapters.en: And the speech pleased the Lord, that Solomon had asked this thing.

chapters.zh: 神对他说：你既然求这事，不为自己求寿、求富，也不求灭绝你仇敌的性命，单求智慧可以听讼，
chapters.en: And God said unto him, Because thou hast asked this thing, and hast not asked for thyself long life; neither hast asked riches for thyself, nor hast asked the life of thine enemies; but hast asked for thyself understanding to discern judgment;

chapters.zh: 我就应允你所求的，赐你聪明智慧，甚至在你以前没有像你的，在你以后也没有像你的。
chapters.en: Behold, I have done according to thy words: lo, I have given thee a wise and an understanding heart; so that there was none like thee before thee, neither after thee shall any arise like unto thee.

chapters.zh: 你所没有求的，我也赐给你，就是富足、尊荣，使你在世的日子，列王中没有一个能比你的。
chapters.en: And I have also given thee that which thou hast not asked, both riches, and honour: so that there shall not be any among the kings like unto thee all thy days.

chapters.zh: 你若效法你父亲大卫，遵行我的道，谨守我的律例、诫命，我必使你长寿。
chapters.en: And if thou wilt walk in my ways, to keep my statutes and my commandments, as thy father David did walk, then I will lengthen thy days.

chapters.zh: 所罗门醒了，不料是个梦。他就回到耶路撒冷，站在耶和华的约柜前，献燔祭和平安祭，又为他众臣仆设摆筵席。
chapters.en: And Solomon awoke; and, behold, a dream. And he came to Jerusalem, and stood before the ark of the covenant of the LORD, and offered up burnt offerings, and offered peace offerings, and made a feast to all his servants.

chapters.zh: 一日，有两个妓女来，站在王面前。
chapters.en: Then came there two women, harlots, unto the king, and stood before him.

chapters.zh: 一个说：我主啊，我和这妇人同住一房；他在房中的时候，我生了一个男孩。
chapters.en: And the one woman said, O my lord, I and this woman dwell in one house; and I was delivered of a child with her in the house.

chapters.zh: 我生孩子后第三日，这妇人也生了孩子。我们是同住的，除了我们二人之外，房中再没有别人。
chapters.en: And it came to pass the third day after that I was delivered, that this woman was delivered also: and we together; no stranger with us in the house, save we two in the house.

chapters.zh: 夜间，这妇人睡著的时候，压死了他的孩子。
chapters.en: And this woman's child died in the night; because she overlaid it.

chapters.zh: 他半夜起来，趁我睡著，从我旁边把我的孩子抱去，放在他怀里，将他的死孩子放在我怀里。
chapters.en: And she arose at midnight, and took my son from beside me, while thine handmaid slept, and laid it in her bosom, and laid her dead child in my bosom.

chapters.zh: 天要亮的时候，我起来要给我的孩子吃奶，不料，孩子死了；及至天亮，我细细地察看，不是我所生的孩子。
chapters.en: And when I rose in the morning to give my child suck, behold, it was dead: but when I had considered it in the morning, behold, it was not my son, which I did bear.

chapters.zh: 那妇人说：不然，活孩子是我的，死孩子是你的。这妇人说：不然，死孩子是你的，活孩子是我的。他们在王面前如此争论。
chapters.en: And the other woman said, Nay; but the living my son, and the dead thy son. And this said, No; but the dead thy son, and the living my son. Thus they spake before the king.

chapters.zh: 王说：这妇人说活孩子是我的，死孩子是你的，那妇人说不然，死孩子是你的，活孩子是我的，
chapters.en: Then said the king, The one saith, This my son that liveth, and thy son the dead: and the other saith, Nay; but thy son the dead, and my son the living.

chapters.zh: 就吩咐说：拿刀来！人就拿刀来。
chapters.en: And the king said, Bring me a sword. And they brought a sword before the king.

chapters.zh: 王说：将活孩子劈成两半，一半给那妇人，一半给这妇人。
chapters.en: And the king said, Divide the living child in two, and give half to the one, and half to the other.

chapters.zh: 活孩子的母亲为自己的孩子心里急痛，就说：求我主将活孩子给那妇人罢，万不可杀他！那妇人说：这孩子也不归我，也不归你，把他劈了罢！
chapters.en: Then spake the woman whose the living child unto the king, for her bowels yearned upon her son, and she said, O my lord, give her the living child, and in no wise slay it. But the other said, Let it be neither mine nor thine, divide .

chapters.zh: 王说：将活孩子给这妇人，万不可杀他；这妇人实在是他的母亲。
chapters.en: Then the king answered and said, Give her the living child, and in no wise slay it: she the mother thereof.

chapters.zh: 以色列众人听见王这样判断，就都敬畏他；因为见他心里有神的智慧，能以断案。
chapters.en: And all Israel heard of the judgment which the king had judged; and they feared the king: for they saw that the wisdom of God in him, to do judgment.

chapters.zh: 所罗门作以色列众人的王。
chapters.en: So king Solomon was king over all Israel.

chapters.zh: 他的臣子记在下面：撒督的儿子亚撒利雅作祭司，
chapters.en: And these the princes which he had; Azariah the son of Zadok the priest,

chapters.zh: 示沙的两个儿子以利何烈、亚希亚作书记，亚希律的儿子约沙法作史官，
chapters.en: Elihoreph and Ahiah, the sons of Shisha, scribes; Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud, the recorder.

chapters.zh: 耶何耶大的儿子比拿雅作元帅，撒督和亚比亚他作祭司长，
chapters.en: And Benaiah the son of Jehoiada over the host: and Zadok and Abiathar the priests:

chapters.zh: 拿单的儿子亚撒利雅作众吏长，王的朋友拿单的儿子撒布得作领袖，
chapters.en: And Azariah the son of Nathan over the officers: and Zabud the son of Nathan principal officer, the king's friend:

chapters.zh: 亚希煞作家宰，亚比大的儿子亚多尼兰掌管服苦的人。
chapters.en: And Ahishar over the household: and Adoniram the son of Abda over the tribute.

chapters.zh: 所罗门在以色列全地立了十二个官吏，使他们供给王和王家的食物，每年各人供给一月。
chapters.en: And Solomon had twelve officers over all Israel, which provided victuals for the king and his household: each man his month in a year made provision.

chapters.zh: 他们的名字记在下面：在以法莲山地有便户珥；
chapters.en: And these their names: The son of Hur, in mount Ephraim:

chapters.zh: 在玛迦斯、沙宾、伯示麦、以伦伯哈南有便底甲；
chapters.en: The son of Dekar, in Makaz, and in Shaalbim, and Bethshemesh, and Elonbethhanan:

chapters.zh: 在亚鲁泊有便希悉，他管理梭哥和希弗全地；
chapters.en: The son of Hesed, in Aruboth; to him Sochoh, and all the land of Hepher:

chapters.zh: 在多珥山冈 ( 或作全境 ) 有便亚比拿达，他娶了所罗门的女儿他法为妻；
chapters.en: The son of Abinadab, in all the region of Dor; which had Taphath the daughter of Solomon to wife:

chapters.zh: 在他纳和米吉多，并靠近撒拉他拿、耶斯列下边的伯善全地，从伯善到亚伯米何拉直到约念之外，有亚希律的儿子巴拿；
chapters.en: Baana the son of Ahilud; Taanach and Megiddo, and all Bethshean, which by Zartanah beneath Jezreel, from Bethshean to Abelmeholah, unto beyond Jokneam:

chapters.zh: 在基列的拉末有便基别，他管理在基列的玛拿西子孙睚珥的城邑，巴珊的亚珥歌伯地的大城六十座，都有城墙和铜闩；
chapters.en: The son of Geber, in Ramothgilead; to him the towns of Jair the son of Manasseh, which in Gilead; to him the region of Argob, which in Bashan, threescore great cities with walls and brasen bars:

chapters.zh: 在玛哈念有易多的儿子亚希拿达；
chapters.en: Ahinadab the son of Iddo Mahanaim:

chapters.zh: 在拿弗他利有亚希玛斯，他也娶了所罗门的一个女儿巴实抹为妻；
chapters.en: Ahimaaz in Naphtali; he also took Basmath the daughter of Solomon to wife:

chapters.zh: 在亚设和亚禄有户筛的儿子巴拿；
chapters.en: Baanah the son of Hushai in Asher and in Aloth:

chapters.zh: 在以萨迦有帕路亚的儿子约沙法；
chapters.en: Jehoshaphat the son of Paruah, in Issachar:

chapters.zh: 在便雅悯有以拉的儿子示每；
chapters.en: Shimei the son of Elah, in Benjamin:

chapters.zh: 在基列地，就是从前属亚摩利王西宏和巴珊王噩之地，有乌利的儿子基别一人管理。
chapters.en: Geber the son of Uri in the country of Gilead, the country of Sihon king of the Amorites, and of Og king of Bashan; and the only officer which in the land.

chapters.zh: 犹大人和以色列人如同海边的沙那样多，都吃喝快乐。
chapters.en: Judah and Israel many, as the sand which by the sea in multitude, eating and drinking, and making merry.

chapters.zh: 所罗门统管诸国，从大河到非利士地，直到埃及的边界。所罗门在世的日子，这些国都进贡服事他。
chapters.en: And Solomon reigned over all kingdoms from the river unto the land of the Philistines, and unto the border of Egypt: they brought presents, and served Solomon all the days of his life.

chapters.zh: 所罗门每日所用的食物：细面三十歌珥，粗面六十歌珥，
chapters.en: And Solomon's provision for one day was thirty measures of fine flour, and threescore measures of meal,

chapters.zh: 肥牛十只，草场的牛二十只，羊一百只，还有鹿、羚羊、麃子，并肥禽。
chapters.en: Ten fat oxen, and twenty oxen out of the pastures, and an hundred sheep, beside harts, and roebucks, and fallowdeer, and fatted fowl.

chapters.zh: 所罗门管理大河西边的诸王，以及从提弗萨直到迦萨的全地，四境尽都平安。
chapters.en: For he had dominion over all on this side the river, from Tiphsah even to Azzah, over all the kings on this side the river: and he had peace on all sides round about him.

chapters.zh: 所罗门在世的日子，从但到别是巴的犹大人和以色列人都在自己的葡萄树下和无花果树下安然居住。
chapters.en: And Judah and Israel dwelt safely, every man under his vine and under his fig tree, from Dan even to Beersheba, all the days of Solomon.

chapters.zh: 所罗门有套车的马四万，还有马兵一万二千。
chapters.en: And Solomon had forty thousand stalls of horses for his chariots, and twelve thousand horsemen.

chapters.zh: 那十二个官吏各按各月供给所罗门王，并一切与他同席之人的食物，一无所缺。
chapters.en: And those officers provided victual for king Solomon, and for all that came unto king Solomon's table, every man in his month: they lacked nothing.

chapters.zh: 众人各按各分，将养马与快马的大麦和干草送到官吏那里。
chapters.en: Barley also and straw for the horses and dromedaries brought they unto the place where were, every man according to his charge.

chapters.zh: 神赐给所罗门极大的智慧聪明和广大的心，如同海沙不可测量。
chapters.en: And God gave Solomon wisdom and understanding exceeding much, and largeness of heart, even as the sand that on the sea shore.

chapters.zh: 所罗门的智慧超过东方人和埃及人的一切智慧。
chapters.en: And Solomon's wisdom excelled the wisdom of all the children of the east country, and all the wisdom of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 他的智慧胜过万人，胜过以斯拉人以探，并玛曷的儿子希幔、甲各、达大的智慧。他的名声传扬在四围的列国。
chapters.en: For he was wiser than all men; than Ethan the Ezrahite, and Heman, and Chalcol, and Darda, the sons of Mahol: and his fame was in all nations round about.

chapters.zh: 他作箴言三千句，诗歌一千零五首。
chapters.en: And he spake three thousand proverbs: and his songs were a thousand and five.

chapters.zh: 他讲论草木，自利巴嫩的香柏树直到墙上长的牛膝草，又讲论飞禽走兽、昆虫水族。
chapters.en: And he spake of trees, from the cedar tree that in Lebanon even unto the hyssop that springeth out of the wall: he spake also of beasts, and of fowl, and of creeping things, and of fishes.

chapters.zh: 天下列王听见所罗门的智慧，就都差人来听他的智慧话。
chapters.en: And there came of all people to hear the wisdom of Solomon, from all kings of the earth, which had heard of his wisdom.

chapters.zh: 推罗王希兰，平素爱大卫；他听见以色列人膏所罗门，接续他父亲作王，就差遣臣仆来见他。
chapters.en: And Hiram king of Tyre sent his servants unto Solomon; for he had heard that they had anointed him king in the room of his father: for Hiram was ever a lover of David.

chapters.zh: 所罗门也差遣人去见希兰，说：
chapters.en: And Solomon sent to Hiram, saying,

chapters.zh: 你知道我父亲大卫因四围的争战，不能为耶和华 ─ 他神的名建殿，直等到耶和华使仇敌都服在他脚下。
chapters.en: Thou knowest how that David my father could not build an house unto the name of the LORD his God for the wars which were about him on every side, until the LORD put them under the soles of his feet.

chapters.zh: 现在耶和华 ─ 我的神使我四围平安，没有仇敌，没有灾祸。
chapters.en: But now the LORD my God hath given me rest on every side, neither adversary nor evil occurrent.

chapters.zh: 我定意要为耶和华 ─ 我神的名建殿，是照耶和华应许我父亲大卫的话说：我必使你儿子接续你坐你的位，他必为我的名建殿。
chapters.en: And, behold, I purpose to build an house unto the name of the LORD my God, as the LORD spake unto David my father, saying, Thy son, whom I will set upon thy throne in thy room, he shall build an house unto my name.

chapters.zh: 所以求你吩咐你的仆人在利巴嫩为我砍伐香柏木，我的仆人也必帮助他们，我必照你所定的，给你仆人的工价；因为你知道，在我们中间没有人像西顿人善于砍伐树木。
chapters.en: Now therefore command thou that they hew me cedar trees out of Lebanon; and my servants shall be with thy servants: and unto thee will I give hire for thy servants according to all that thou shalt appoint: for thou knowest that not among us any that can skill to hew timber like unto the Sidonians.

chapters.zh: 希兰听见所罗门的话，就甚喜悦，说：今日应当称颂耶和华；因他赐给大卫一个有智慧的儿子，治理这众多的民。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Hiram heard the words of Solomon, that he rejoiced greatly, and said, Blessed the LORD this day, which hath given unto David a wise son over this great people.

chapters.zh: 希兰打发人去见所罗门，说：你差遣人向我所提的那事，我都听见了；论到香柏木和松木，我必照你的心愿而行。
chapters.en: And Hiram sent to Solomon, saying, I have considered the things which thou sentest to me for: I will do all thy desire concerning timber of cedar, and concerning timber of fir.

chapters.zh: 我的仆人必将这木料从利巴嫩运到海里，扎成筏子，浮海运到你所指定我的地方，在那里拆开，你就可以收取；你也要成全我的心愿，将食物给我的家。
chapters.en: My servants shall bring down from Lebanon unto the sea: and I will convey them by sea in floats unto the place that thou shalt appoint me, and will cause them to be discharged there, and thou shalt receive : and thou shalt accomplish my desire, in giving food for my household.

chapters.zh: 于是希兰照著所罗门所要的，给他香柏木和松木；
chapters.en: So Hiram gave Solomon cedar trees and fir trees all his desire.

chapters.zh: 所罗门给希兰麦子二万歌珥，清油二十歌珥，作他家的食物。所罗门每年都是这样给希兰。
chapters.en: And Solomon gave Hiram twenty thousand measures of wheat food to his household, and twenty measures of pure oil: thus gave Solomon to Hiram year by year.

chapters.zh: 耶和华照著所应许的赐智慧给所罗门。希兰与所罗门和好，彼此立约。
chapters.en: And the LORD gave Solomon wisdom, as he promised him: and there was peace between Hiram and Solomon; and they two made a league together.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王从以色列人中挑取服苦的人共有三万，
chapters.en: And king Solomon raised a levy out of all Israel; and the levy was thirty thousand men.

chapters.zh: 派他们轮流每月一万人上利巴嫩去；一个月在利巴嫩，两个月在家里。亚多尼兰掌管他们。
chapters.en: And he sent them to Lebanon, ten thousand a month by courses: a month they were in Lebanon, two months at home: and Adoniram over the levy.

chapters.zh: 所罗门用七万扛抬的，八万在山上凿石头的。
chapters.en: And Solomon had threescore and ten thousand that bare burdens, and fourscore thousand hewers in the mountains;

chapters.zh: 此外，所罗门用三千三百督工的，监管工人。
chapters.en: Beside the chief of Solomon's officers which over the work, three thousand and three hundred, which ruled over the people that wrought in the work.

chapters.zh: 王下令，人就凿出又大又宝贵的石头来，用以立殿的根基。
chapters.en: And the king commanded, and they brought great stones, costly stones, hewed stones, to lay the foundation of the house.

chapters.zh: 所罗门的匠人和希兰的匠人，并迦巴勒人，都将石头凿好，预备木料和石头建殿。
chapters.en: And Solomon's builders and Hiram's builders did hew , and the stonesquarers: so they prepared timber and stones to build the house.

chapters.zh: 以色列人出埃及地后四百八十年，所罗门作以色列王第四年西弗月，就是二月，开工建造耶和华的殿。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the four hundred and eightieth year after the children of Israel were come out of the land of Egypt, in the fourth year of Solomon's reign over Israel, in the month Zif, which the second month, that he began to build the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王为耶和华所建的殿，长六十肘，宽二十肘，高三十肘。
chapters.en: And the house which king Solomon built for the LORD, the length thereof threescore cubits, and the breadth thereof twenty , and the height thereof thirty cubits.

chapters.zh: 殿前的廊子长二十肘，与殿的宽窄一样，阔十肘；
chapters.en: And the porch before the temple of the house, twenty cubits the length thereof, according to the breadth of the house; ten cubits the breadth thereof before the house.

chapters.zh: 又为殿做了严紧的窗櫺。
chapters.en: And for the house he made windows of narrow lights.

chapters.zh: 靠著殿墙，围著外殿内殿，造了三层旁屋；
chapters.en: And against the wall of the house he built chambers round about, the walls of the house round about, of the temple and of the oracle: and he made chambers round about:

chapters.zh: 下层宽五肘，中层宽六肘，上层宽七肘。殿外旁屋的梁木搁在殿墙坎上，免得插入殿墙。
chapters.en: The nethermost chamber five cubits broad, and the middle six cubits broad, and the third seven cubits broad: for without of the house he made narrowed rests round about, that should not be fastened in the walls of the house.

chapters.zh: 建殿是用山中凿成的石头。建殿的时候，锤子、斧子，和别样铁器的响声都没有听见。
chapters.en: And the house, when it was in building, was built of stone made ready before it was brought thither: so that there was neither hammer nor axe any tool of iron heard in the house, while it was in building.

chapters.zh: 在殿右边当中的旁屋有门，门内有旋螺的楼梯，可以上到第二层，从第二层可以上到第三层。
chapters.en: The door for the middle chamber in the right side of the house: and they went up with winding stairs into the middle , and out of the middle into the third.

chapters.zh: 所罗门建殿，安置香柏木的栋梁，又用香柏木板遮盖。
chapters.en: So he built the house, and finished it; and covered the house with beams and boards of cedar.

chapters.zh: 靠著殿所造的旁屋，每层高五肘，香柏木的栋梁搁在殿墙坎上。
chapters.en: And he built chambers against all the house, five cubits high: and they rested on the house timber of cedar.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到所罗门说：
chapters.en: And the word of the LORD came to Solomon, saying,

chapters.zh: 论到你所建的这殿，你若遵行我的律例，谨守我的典章，遵从我的一切诫命，我必向你应验我所应许你父亲大卫的话。
chapters.en: this house which thou art in building, if thou wilt walk in my statutes, and execute my judgments, and keep all my commandments to walk in them; then will I perform my word with thee, which I spake unto David thy father:

chapters.zh: 我必住在以色列人中间，并不丢弃我民以色列。
chapters.en: And I will dwell among the children of Israel, and will not forsake my people Israel.

chapters.zh: 所罗门建造殿宇。
chapters.en: So Solomon built the house, and finished it.

chapters.zh: 殿里面用香柏木板贴墙，从地到棚顶都用木板遮蔽，又用松木板铺地。
chapters.en: And he built the walls of the house within with boards of cedar, both the floor of the house, and the walls of the cieling: he covered on the inside with wood, and covered the floor of the house with planks of fir.

chapters.zh: 内殿，就是至圣所，长二十肘，从地到棚顶用香柏木板遮蔽 ( 或作隔断 )。
chapters.en: And he built twenty cubits on the sides of the house, both the floor and the walls with boards of cedar: he even built for it within, for the oracle, for the most holy .

chapters.zh: 内殿前的外殿，长四十肘。
chapters.en: And the house, that , the temple before it, was forty cubits .

chapters.zh: 殿里一点石头都不显露，一概用香柏木遮蔽；上面刻著野瓜和初开的花。
chapters.en: And the cedar of the house within carved with knops and open flowers: all cedar; there was no stone seen.

chapters.zh: 殿里预备了内殿，好安放耶和华的约柜。
chapters.en: And the oracle he prepared in the house within, to set there the ark of the covenant of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 内殿长二十肘，宽二十肘，高二十肘，墙面都贴上精金；又用香柏木做坛，包上精金。
chapters.en: And the oracle in the forepart twenty cubits in length, and twenty cubits in breadth, and twenty cubits in the height thereof: and he overlaid it with pure gold; and covered the altar cedar.

chapters.zh: 所罗门用精金贴了殿内的墙，又用金炼子挂在内殿前门扇，用金包裹。
chapters.en: So Solomon overlaid the house within with pure gold: and he made a partition by the chains of gold before the oracle; and he overlaid it with gold.

chapters.zh: 全殿都贴上金子，直到贴完；内殿前的坛，也都用金包裹。
chapters.en: And the whole house he overlaid with gold, until he had finished all the house: also the whole altar that by the oracle he overlaid with gold.

chapters.zh: 他用橄榄木做两个基路伯，各高十肘，安在内殿。
chapters.en: And within the oracle he made two cherubims olive tree, ten cubits high.

chapters.zh: 这一个基路伯有两个翅膀，各长五肘，从这翅膀尖到那翅膀尖共有十肘；
chapters.en: And five cubits the one wing of the cherub, and five cubits the other wing of the cherub: from the uttermost part of the one wing unto the uttermost part of the other ten cubits.

chapters.zh: 那一个基路伯的两个翅膀也是十肘，两个基路伯的尺寸、形像都是一样。
chapters.en: And the other cherub ten cubits: both the cherubims of one measure and one size.

chapters.zh: 这基路伯高十肘，那基路伯也是如此。
chapters.en: The height of the one cherub ten cubits, and so of the other cherub.

chapters.zh: 他将两个基路伯安在内殿里；基路伯的翅膀是张开的，这基路伯的一个翅膀挨著这边的墙，那基路伯的一个翅膀挨著那边的墙，里边的两个翅膀在殿中间彼此相接；
chapters.en: And he set the cherubims within the inner house: and they stretched forth the wings of the cherubims, so that the wing of the one touched the wall, and the wing of the other cherub touched the other wall; and their wings touched one another in the midst of the house.

chapters.zh: 又用金子包裹二基路伯。
chapters.en: And he overlaid the cherubims with gold.

chapters.zh: 内殿、外殿周围的墙上都刻著基路伯、棕树，和初开的花。
chapters.en: And he carved all the walls of the house round about with carved figures of cherubims and palm trees and open flowers, within and without.

chapters.zh: 内殿、外殿的地板都贴上金子。
chapters.en: And the floor of the house he overlaid with gold, within and without.

chapters.zh: 又用橄榄木制造内殿的门扇、门楣、门框；门口有墙的五分之一。
chapters.en: And for the entering of the oracle he made doors olive tree: the lintel side posts a fifth part .

chapters.zh: 在橄榄木做的两门扇上刻著基路伯、棕树，和初开的花，都贴上金子。
chapters.en: The two doors also olive tree; and he carved upon them carvings of cherubims and palm trees and open flowers, and overlaid with gold, and spread gold upon the cherubims, and upon the palm trees.

chapters.zh: 又用橄榄木制造外殿的门框，门口有墙的四分之一。
chapters.en: So also made he for the door of the temple posts olive tree, a fourth part .

chapters.zh: 用松木做门两扇。这扇分两扇，是折叠的；那扇分两扇；也是折叠的。
chapters.en: And the two doors fir tree: the two leaves of the one door folding, and the two leaves of the other door folding.

chapters.zh: 上面刻著基路伯、棕树，和初开的花，都用金子贴了。
chapters.en: And he carved cherubims and palm trees and open flowers: and covered with gold fitted upon the carved work.

chapters.zh: 他又用凿成的石头三层、香柏木一层建筑内院。
chapters.en: And he built the inner court with three rows of hewed stone, and a row of cedar beams.

chapters.zh: 所罗门在位第四年西弗月，立了耶和华殿的根基。
chapters.en: In the fourth year was the foundation of the house of the LORD laid, in the month Zif:

chapters.zh: 到十一年布勒月，就是八月，殿和一切属殿的都按著样式造成。他建殿的工夫共有七年。
chapters.en: And in the eleventh year, in the month Bul, which the eighth month, was the house finished throughout all the parts thereof, and according to all the fashion of it. So was he seven years in building it.

chapters.zh: 所罗门为自己建造宫室，十三年方才造成；
chapters.en: But Solomon was building his own house thirteen years, and he finished all his house.

chapters.zh: 又建造利巴嫩林宫，长一百肘，宽五十肘，高三十肘，有香柏木柱三 ( 原文作四 ) 行，柱上有香柏木柁梁。
chapters.en: He built also the house of the forest of Lebanon; the length thereof an hundred cubits, and the breadth thereof fifty cubits, and the height thereof thirty cubits, upon four rows of cedar pillars, with cedar beams upon the pillars.

chapters.zh: 其上以香柏木为盖，每行柱子十五根，共有四十五根。
chapters.en: And covered with cedar above upon the beams, that on forty five pillars, fifteen a row.

chapters.zh: 有窗户三层，窗与窗相对。
chapters.en: And windows three rows, and light against light three ranks.

chapters.zh: 所有的门框都是厚木见方的，有窗户三层，窗与窗相对。
chapters.en: And all the doors and posts square, with the windows: and light against light three ranks.

chapters.zh: 并建造有柱子的廊子，长五十肘，宽三十肘；在这廊前又有廊子，廊外有柱子和台阶。
chapters.en: And he made a porch of pillars; the length thereof fifty cubits, and the breadth thereof thirty cubits: and the porch before them: and the pillars and the thick beam before them.

chapters.zh: 又建造一廊，其中设立审判的座位，这廊从地到顶都用香柏木遮蔽。
chapters.en: Then he made a porch for the throne where he might judge, the porch of judgment: and covered with cedar from one side of the floor to the other.

chapters.zh: 廊后院内有所罗门住的宫室；工作与这工作相同。所罗门又为所娶法老的女儿建造一宫，做法与这廊子一样。
chapters.en: And his house where he dwelt another court within the porch, was of the like work. Solomon made also an house for Pharaoh's daughter, whom he had taken , like unto this porch.

chapters.zh: 建造这一切所用的石头都是宝贵的，是按著尺寸凿成的，是用锯里外锯齐的；从根基直到檐石，从外头直到大院，都是如此。
chapters.en: All these costly stones, according to the measures of hewed stones, sawed with saws, within and without, even from the foundation unto the coping, and on the outside toward the great court.

chapters.zh: 根基是宝贵的大石头，有长十肘的，有长八肘的；
chapters.en: And the foundation costly stones, even great stones, stones of ten cubits, and stones of eight cubits.

chapters.zh: 上面有香柏木和按著尺寸凿成宝贵的石头。
chapters.en: And above costly stones, after the measures of hewed stones, and cedars.

chapters.zh: 大院周围有凿成的石头三层、香柏木一层，都照耶和华殿的内院和殿廊的样式。
chapters.en: And the great court round about with three rows of hewed stones, and a row of cedar beams, both for the inner court of the house of the LORD, and for the porch of the house.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王差遣人往推罗去，将户兰召了来。
chapters.en: And king Solomon sent and fetched Hiram out of Tyre.

chapters.zh: 他是拿弗他利支派中一个寡妇的儿子，他父亲是推罗人，作铜匠的。户兰满有智慧、聪明、技能，善于各样铜作。他来到所罗门王那里，做王一切所要做的。
chapters.en: He a widow's son of the tribe of Naphtali, and his father a man of Tyre, a worker in brass: and he was filled with wisdom, and understanding, and cunning to work all works in brass. And he came to king Solomon, and wrought all his work.

chapters.zh: 他制造两根铜柱，每根高十八肘，围十二肘。
chapters.en: For he cast two pillars of brass, of eighteen cubits high apiece: and a line of twelve cubits did compass either of them about.

chapters.zh: 又用铜铸了两个柱顶安在柱上，各高五肘。
chapters.en: And he made two chapiters molten brass, to set upon the tops of the pillars: the height of the one chapiter five cubits, and the height of the other chapiter five cubits:

chapters.zh: 柱顶上有装修的网子和拧成的炼索，每顶七个。
chapters.en: nets of checker work, and wreaths of chain work, for the chapiters which upon the top of the pillars; seven for the one chapiter, and seven for the other chapiter.

chapters.zh: 网子周围有两行石榴遮盖柱顶，两个柱顶都是如此。
chapters.en: And he made the pillars, and two rows round about upon the one network, to cover the chapiters that upon the top, with pomegranates: and so did he for the other chapiter.

chapters.zh: 廊子的柱顶径四肘，刻著百合花。
chapters.en: And the chapiters that upon the top of the pillars of lily work in the porch, four cubits.

chapters.zh: 两柱顶的鼓肚上挨著网子，各有两行石榴环绕，两行共有二百。
chapters.en: And the chapiters upon the two pillars also above, over against the belly which by the network: and the pomegranates two hundred in rows round about upon the other chapiter.

chapters.zh: 他将两根柱子立在殿廊前头：右边立一根，起名叫雅斤；左边立一根，起名叫波阿斯。
chapters.en: And he set up the pillars in the porch of the temple: and he set up the right pillar, and called the name thereof Jachin: and he set up the left pillar, and called the name thereof Boaz.

chapters.zh: 在柱顶上刻著百合花。这样，造柱子的工就完毕了。
chapters.en: And upon the top of the pillars lily work: so was the work of the pillars finished.

chapters.zh: 他又铸一个铜海，样式是圆的，高五肘，径十肘，围三十肘。
chapters.en: And he made a molten sea, ten cubits from the one brim to the other: round all about, and his height five cubits: and a line of thirty cubits did compass it round about.

chapters.zh: 在海边之下，周围有野瓜的样式；每肘十瓜，共有两行，是铸海的时候铸上的。
chapters.en: And under the brim of it round about knops compassing it, ten in a cubit, compassing the sea round about: the knops cast in two rows, when it was cast.

chapters.zh: 有十二只铜牛驮海：三只向北，三只向西，三只向南，三只向东；海在牛上，牛尾都向内。
chapters.en: It stood upon twelve oxen, three looking toward the north, and three looking toward the west, and three looking toward the south, and three looking toward the east: and the sea above upon them, and all their hinder parts inward.

chapters.zh: 海厚一掌，边如杯边，又如百合花，可容二千罢特。
chapters.en: And it an hand breadth thick, and the brim thereof was wrought like the brim of a cup, with flowers of lilies: it contained two thousand baths.

chapters.zh: 他用铜制造十个盆座，每座长四肘，宽四肘，高三肘。
chapters.en: And he made ten bases of brass; four cubits the length of one base, and four cubits the breadth thereof, and three cubits the height of it.

chapters.zh: 座的造法是这样：四面都有心子，心子在边子当中，
chapters.en: And the work of the bases on this : they had borders, and the borders between the ledges:

chapters.zh: 心子上有狮子和牛，并基路伯；边上有小座，狮子和牛以下有垂下的璎珞。
chapters.en: And on the borders that between the ledges lions, oxen, and cherubims: and upon the ledges a base above: and beneath the lions and oxen certain additions made of thin work.

chapters.zh: 每盆座有四个铜轮和铜轴。小座的四角上在盆以下，有铸成的盆架，其旁都有璎珞。
chapters.en: And every base had four brasen wheels, and plates of brass: and the four corners thereof had undersetters: under the laver undersetters molten, at the side of every addition.

chapters.zh: 小座高一肘，口是圆的，彷佛座的样式，径一肘半，在口上有雕工，心子是方的，不是圆的。
chapters.en: And the mouth of it within the chapiter and above a cubit: but the mouth thereof round the work of the base, a cubit and an half: and also upon the mouth of it gravings with their borders, foursquare, not round.

chapters.zh: 四个轮子在心子以下，轮轴与座相连，每轮高一肘半。
chapters.en: And under the borders four wheels; and the axletrees of the wheels to the base: and the height of a wheel a cubit and half a cubit.

chapters.zh: 轮的样式如同车轮；轴、辋、辐、毂都是铸的。
chapters.en: And the work of the wheels like the work of a chariot wheel: their axletrees, and their naves, and their felloes, and their spokes, all molten.

chapters.zh: 每座四角上都有盆架，是与座一同铸成的。
chapters.en: And four undersetters to the four corners of one base: the undersetters of the very base itself.

chapters.zh: 座上有圆架，高半肘；座上有撑子和心子，是与座一同铸的。
chapters.en: And in the top of the base a round compass of half a cubit high: and on the top of the base the ledges thereof and the borders thereof of the same.

chapters.zh: 在撑子和心子上刻著基路伯、狮子，和棕树，周围有璎珞。
chapters.en: For on the plates of the ledges thereof, and on the borders thereof, he graved cherubims, lions, and palm trees, according to the proportion of every one, and additions round about.

chapters.zh: 十个盆座都是这样，铸法、尺寸、样式相同。
chapters.en: After this he made the ten bases: all of them had one casting, one measure, one size.

chapters.zh: 又用铜制造十个盆，每盆可容四十罢特。盆径四肘，在那十座上，每座安设一盆。
chapters.en: Then made he ten lavers of brass: one laver contained forty baths: every laver was four cubits: upon every one of the ten bases one laver.

chapters.zh: 五个安在殿门的右边，五个放在殿门的左边；又将海放在殿门的右旁，就是南边。
chapters.en: And he put five bases on the right side of the house, and five on the left side of the house: and he set the sea on the right side of the house eastward over against the south.

chapters.zh: 户兰又造了盆、铲子，和盘子。这样，他为所罗门王做完了耶和华殿的一切工。
chapters.en: And Hiram made the lavers, and the shovels, and the basons. So Hiram made an end of doing all the work that he made king Solomon for the house of the LORD:

chapters.zh: 所造的就是：两根柱子和柱上两个如球的顶；并两个盖柱顶的网子；
chapters.en: The two pillars, and the bowls of the chapiters that on the top of the two pillars; and the two networks, to cover the two bowls of the chapiters which upon the top of the pillars;

chapters.zh: 和四百石榴，安在两个网子上，每网两行，盖著两个柱上如球的顶；
chapters.en: And four hundred pomegranates for the two networks, two rows of pomegranates for one network, to cover the two bowls of the chapiters that upon the pillars;

chapters.zh: 十个座和其上的十个盆；
chapters.en: And the ten bases, and ten lavers on the bases;

chapters.zh: 海和海下的十二只牛；
chapters.en: And one sea, and twelve oxen under the sea;

chapters.zh: 盆、铲子、盘子。这一切都是户兰给所罗门王用光亮的铜为耶和华的殿造成的，
chapters.en: And the pots, and the shovels, and the basons: and all these vessels, which Hiram made to king Solomon for the house of the LORD, bright brass.

chapters.zh: 是遵王命在约但平原、疏割和撒拉但中间藉胶泥铸成的。
chapters.en: In the plain of Jordan did the king cast them, in the clay ground between Succoth and Zarthan.

chapters.zh: 这一切所罗门都没有过秤；因为甚多，铜的轻重也无法可查。
chapters.en: And Solomon left all the vessels , because they were exceeding many: neither was the weight of the brass found out.

chapters.zh: 所罗门又造耶和华殿里的金坛和陈设饼的金桌子；
chapters.en: And Solomon made all the vessels that unto the house of the LORD: the altar of gold, and the table of gold, whereupon the shewbread ,

chapters.zh: 内殿前的精金灯台：右边五个，左边五个，并其上的金花、灯盏、蜡剪，
chapters.en: And the candlesticks of pure gold, five on the right , and five on the left, before the oracle, with the flowers, and the lamps, and the tongs gold,

chapters.zh: 与精金的杯、盘、镊子、调羹、火鼎，以及至圣所、内殿的门枢，和外殿的门枢。
chapters.en: And the bowls, and the snuffers, and the basons, and the spoons, and the censers pure gold; and the hinges gold, for the doors of the inner house, the most holy for the doors of the house, , of the temple.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王做完了耶和华殿的一切工，就把他父大卫分别为圣的金银和器皿都带来放在耶和华殿的府库里。
chapters.en: So was ended all the work that king Solomon made for the house of the LORD. And Solomon brought in the things which David his father had dedicated; the silver, and the gold, and the vessels, did he put among the treasures of the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 那时，所罗门将以色列的长老和各支派的首领，并以色列的族长，招聚到耶路撒冷，要把耶和华的约柜从大卫城 ─ 就是锡安 ─ 运上来。
chapters.en: Then Solomon assembled the elders of Israel, and all the heads of the tribes, the chief of the fathers of the children of Israel, unto king Solomon in Jerusalem, that they might bring up the ark of the covenant of the LORD out of the city of David, which Zion.

chapters.zh: 以他念月，就是七月，在节前，以色列人都聚集到所罗门王那里。
chapters.en: And all the men of Israel assembled themselves unto king Solomon at the feast in the month Ethanim, which the seventh month.

chapters.zh: 以色列长老来到，祭司便抬起约柜，
chapters.en: And all the elders of Israel came, and the priests took up the ark.

chapters.zh: 祭司和利未人将耶和华的约柜运上来，又将会幕和会幕的一切圣器具都带上来。
chapters.en: And they brought up the ark of the LORD, and the tabernacle of the congregation, and all the holy vessels that in the tabernacle, even those did the priests and the Levites bring up.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王和聚集到他那里的以色列全会众，一同在约柜前献牛羊为祭，多得不可胜数。
chapters.en: And king Solomon, and all the congregation of Israel, that were assembled unto him, with him before the ark, sacrificing sheep and oxen, that could not be told nor numbered for multitude.

chapters.zh: 祭司将耶和华的约柜抬进内殿，就是至圣所，放在两个基路伯的翅膀底下。
chapters.en: And the priests brought in the ark of the covenant of the LORD unto his place, into the oracle of the house, to the most holy under the wings of the cherubims.

chapters.zh: 基路伯张著翅膀在约柜之上，遮掩约柜和抬柜的杠。
chapters.en: For the cherubims spread forth two wings over the place of the ark, and the cherubims covered the ark and the staves thereof above.

chapters.zh: 这杠甚长，杠头在内殿前的圣所可以看见，在殿外却不能看见，直到如今还在那里。
chapters.en: And they drew out the staves, that the ends of the staves were seen out in the holy before the oracle, and they were not seen without: and there they are unto this day.

chapters.zh: 约柜里惟有两块石版，就是以色列人出埃及地后，耶和华与他们立约的时候摩西在何烈山所放的。除此以外，并无别物。
chapters.en: nothing in the ark save the two tables of stone, which Moses put there at Horeb, when the LORD made with the children of Israel, when they came out of the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 祭司从圣所出来的时候，有云充满耶和华的殿；
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the priests were come out of the holy , that the cloud filled the house of the LORD,

chapters.zh: 甚至祭司不能站立供职，因为耶和华的荣光充满了殿。
chapters.en: So that the priests could not stand to minister because of the cloud: for the glory of the LORD had filled the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 那时所罗门说：耶和华曾说，他必住在幽暗之处。
chapters.en: Then spake Solomon, The LORD said that he would dwell in the thick darkness.

chapters.zh: 我已经建造殿宇作你的居所，为你永远的住处。
chapters.en: I have surely built thee an house to dwell in, a settled place for thee to abide in for ever.

chapters.zh: 王转脸为以色列会众祝福，以色列会众就都站立。
chapters.en: And the king turned his face about, and blessed all the congregation of Israel: (and all the congregation of Israel stood;)

chapters.zh: 所罗门说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神是应当称颂的！因他亲口向我父大卫所应许的，也亲手成就了。
chapters.en: And he said, Blessed the LORD God of Israel, which spake with his mouth unto David my father, and hath with his hand fulfilled , saying,

chapters.zh: 他说：自从我领我民以色列出埃及以来，我未曾在以色列各支派中选择一城建造殿宇 ─ 为我名的居所，但拣选大卫治理我民以色列。
chapters.en: Since the day that I brought forth my people Israel out of Egypt, I chose no city out of all the tribes of Israel to build an house, that my name might be therein; but I chose David to be over my people Israel.

chapters.zh: 所罗门说：我父大卫曾立意，要为耶和华 ─ 以色列神的名建殿。
chapters.en: And it was in the heart of David my father to build an house for the name of the LORD God of Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华却对我父大卫说：你立意为我的名建殿，这意思甚好。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto David my father, Whereas it was in thine heart to build an house unto my name, thou didst well that it was in thine heart.

chapters.zh: 只是你不可建殿，惟你所生的儿子必为我名建殿。
chapters.en: Nevertheless thou shalt not build the house; but thy son that shall come forth out of thy loins, he shall build the house unto my name.

chapters.zh: 现在耶和华成就了他所应许的话，使我接续我父大卫坐以色列的国位，又为耶和华 ─ 以色列神的名建造了殿。
chapters.en: And the LORD hath performed his word that he spake, and I am risen up in the room of David my father, and sit on the throne of Israel, as the LORD promised, and have built an house for the name of the LORD God of Israel.

chapters.zh: 我也在其中为约柜预备一处。约柜内有耶和华的约，就是他领我们列祖出埃及地的时候，与他们所立的约。
chapters.en: And I have set there a place for the ark, wherein the covenant of the LORD, which he made with our fathers, when he brought them out of the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 所罗门当著以色列会众，站在耶和华的坛前，向天举手说：
chapters.en: And Solomon stood before the altar of the LORD in the presence of all the congregation of Israel, and spread forth his hands toward heaven:

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 以色列的神啊，天上地下没有神可比你的！你向那尽心行在你面前的仆人守约施慈爱；
chapters.en: And he said, LORD God of Israel, no God like thee, in heaven above, or on earth beneath, who keepest covenant and mercy with thy servants that walk before thee with all their heart:

chapters.zh: 向你仆人 ─ 我父大卫所应许的话现在应验了。你亲口应许，亲手成就，正如今日一样。
chapters.en: Who hast kept with thy servant David my father that thou promisedst him: thou spakest also with thy mouth, and hast fulfilled with thine hand, as this day.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 以色列的神啊，你所应许你仆人 ─ 我父大卫的话说：你的子孙若谨慎自己的行为，在我面前行事像你所行的一样，就不断人坐以色列的国位。现在求你应验这话。
chapters.en: Therefore now, LORD God of Israel, keep with thy servant David my father that thou promisedst him, saying, There shall not fail thee a man in my sight to sit on the throne of Israel; so that thy children take heed to their way, that they walk before me as thou hast walked before me.

chapters.zh: 以色列的神啊，求你成就向你仆人 ─ 我父大卫所应许的话。
chapters.en: And now, O God of Israel, let thy word, I pray thee, be verified, which thou spakest unto thy servant David my father.

chapters.zh: 神果真住在地上么？看哪，天和天上的天尚且不足你居住的，何况我所建的这殿呢？
chapters.en: But will God indeed dwell on the earth? behold, the heaven and heaven of heavens cannot contain thee; how much less this house that I have builded?

chapters.zh: 惟求耶和华 ─ 我的神垂顾仆人的祷告祈求，俯听仆人今日在你面前的祈祷呼吁。
chapters.en: Yet have thou respect unto the prayer of thy servant, and to his supplication, O LORD my God, to hearken unto the cry and to the prayer, which thy servant prayeth before thee to day:

chapters.zh: 愿你昼夜看顾这殿，就是你应许立为你名的居所；求你垂听仆人向此处祷告的话。
chapters.en: That thine eyes may be open toward this house night and day, toward the place of which thou hast said, My name shall be there: that thou mayest hearken unto the prayer which thy servant shall make toward this place.

chapters.zh: 你仆人和你民以色列向此处祈祷的时候，求你在天上你的居所垂听，垂听而赦免。
chapters.en: And hearken thou to the supplication of thy servant, and of thy people Israel, when they shall pray toward this place: and hear thou in heaven thy dwelling place: and when thou hearest, forgive.

chapters.zh: 人若得罪邻舍，有人叫他起誓，他来到这殿在你的坛前起誓，
chapters.en: If any man trespass against his neighbour, and an oath be laid upon him to cause him to swear, and the oath come before thine altar in this house:

chapters.zh: 求你在天上垂听，判断你的仆人：定恶人有罪，照他所行的报应在他头上；定义人有理，照他的义赏赐他。
chapters.en: Then hear thou in heaven, and do, and judge thy servants, condemning the wicked, to bring his way upon his head; and justifying the righteous, to give him according to his righteousness.

chapters.zh: 你的民以色列若得罪你，败在仇敌面前，又归向你，承认你的名，在这殿里祈求祷告，
chapters.en: When thy people Israel be smitten down before the enemy, because they have sinned against thee, and shall turn again to thee, and confess thy name, and pray, and make supplication unto thee in this house:

chapters.zh: 求你在天上垂听，赦免你民以色列的罪，使他们归回你赐给他们列祖之地。
chapters.en: Then hear thou in heaven, and forgive the sin of thy people Israel, and bring them again unto the land which thou gavest unto their fathers.

chapters.zh: 你的民因得罪你，你惩罚他们，使天闭塞不下雨；他们若向此处祷告，承认你的名，离开他们的罪，
chapters.en: When heaven is shut up, and there is no rain, because they have sinned against thee; if they pray toward this place, and confess thy name, and turn from their sin, when thou afflictest them:

chapters.zh: 求你在天上垂听，赦免你仆人以色列民的罪，将当行的善道指教他们，且降雨在你的地，就是你赐给你民为业之地。
chapters.en: Then hear thou in heaven, and forgive the sin of thy servants, and of thy people Israel, that thou teach them the good way wherein they should walk, and give rain upon thy land, which thou hast given to thy people for an inheritance.

chapters.zh: 国中若有饥荒、瘟疫、旱风、霉烂、蝗虫、蚂蚱，或有仇敌犯境围困城邑，无论遭遇甚么灾祸疾病，
chapters.en: If there be in the land famine, if there be pestilence, blasting, mildew, locust, if there be caterpiller; if their enemy besiege them in the land of their cities; whatsoever plague, whatsoever sickness ;

chapters.zh: 你的民以色列，或是众人，或是一人，自觉有罪 ( 原文作灾 )，向这殿举手，无论祈求甚么，祷告甚么，
chapters.en: What prayer and supplication soever be by any man, by all thy people Israel, which shall know every man the plague of his own heart, and spread forth his hands toward this house:

chapters.zh: 求你在天上你的居所垂听赦免。你是知道人心的，要照各人所行的待他们（惟有你知道世人的心），
chapters.en: Then hear thou in heaven thy dwelling place, and forgive, and do, and give to every man according to his ways, whose heart thou knowest; (for thou, thou only, knowest the hearts of all the children of men;)

chapters.zh: 使他们在你赐给我们列祖之地上一生一世敬畏你。
chapters.en: That they may fear thee all the days that they live in the land which thou gavest unto our fathers.

chapters.zh: 论到不属你民以色列的外邦人，为你名从远方而来，
chapters.en: Moreover concerning a stranger, that not of thy people Israel, but cometh out of a far country for thy name's sake;

chapters.zh: （他们听人论说你的大名和大能的手，并伸出来的膀臂）向这殿祷告，
chapters.en: (For they shall hear of thy great name, and of thy strong hand, and of thy stretched out arm;) when he shall come and pray toward this house;

chapters.zh: 求你在天上你的居所垂听，照著外邦人所祈求的而行，使天下万民都认识你的名，敬畏你像你的民以色列一样；又使他们知道我建造的这殿是称为你名下的。
chapters.en: Hear thou in heaven thy dwelling place, and do according to all that the stranger calleth to thee for: that all people of the earth may know thy name, to fear thee, as thy people Israel; and that they may know that this house, which I have builded, is called by thy name.

chapters.zh: 你的民若奉你的差遣，无论往何处去与仇敌争战，向耶和华所选择的城与我为你名所建造的殿祷告，
chapters.en: If thy people go out to battle against their enemy, whithersoever thou shalt send them, and shall pray unto the LORD toward the city which thou hast chosen, and the house that I have built for thy name:

chapters.zh: 求你在天上垂听他们的祷告祈求，使他们得胜。
chapters.en: Then hear thou in heaven their prayer and their supplication, and maintain their cause.

chapters.zh: 你的民若得罪你（世上没有不犯罪的人），你向他们发怒，将他们交给仇敌掳到仇敌之地，或远或近，
chapters.en: If they sin against thee, (for no man that sinneth not,) and thou be angry with them, and deliver them to the enemy, so that they carry them away captives unto the land of the enemy, far or near;

chapters.zh: 他们若在掳到之地想起罪来，回心转意，恳求你说：我们有罪了，我们悖逆了，我们作恶了；
chapters.en: if they shall bethink themselves in the land whither they were carried captives, and repent, and make supplication unto thee in the land of them that carried them captives, saying, We have sinned, and have done perversely, we have committed wickedness;

chapters.zh: 他们若在掳到之地尽心尽性归服你，又向自己的地，就是你赐给他们列祖之地和你所选择的城，并我为你名所建造的殿祷告，
chapters.en: And return unto thee with all their heart, and with all their soul, in the land of their enemies, which led them away captive, and pray unto thee toward their land, which thou gavest unto their fathers, the city which thou hast chosen, and the house which I have built for thy name:

chapters.zh: 求你在天上你的居所垂听他们的祷告祈求，为他们伸冤；
chapters.en: Then hear thou their prayer and their supplication in heaven thy dwelling place, and maintain their cause,

chapters.zh: 饶恕得罪你的民，赦免他们的一切过犯，使他们在掳他们的人面前蒙怜恤。
chapters.en: And forgive thy people that have sinned against thee, and all their transgressions wherein they have transgressed against thee, and give them compassion before them who carried them captive, that they may have compassion on them:

chapters.zh: 因为他们是你的子民，你的产业，是你从埃及领出来脱离铁炉的。
chapters.en: For they thy people, and thine inheritance, which thou broughtest forth out of Egypt, from the midst of the furnace of iron:

chapters.zh: 愿你的眼目看顾仆人，听你民以色列的祈求，无论何时向你祈求，愿你垂听。
chapters.en: That thine eyes may be open unto the supplication of thy servant, and unto the supplication of thy people Israel, to hearken unto them in all that they call for unto thee.

chapters.zh: 主耶和华啊，你将他们从地上的万民中分别出来作你的产业，是照你领我们列祖出埃及的时候，藉你仆人摩西所应许的话。
chapters.en: For thou didst separate them from among all the people of the earth, thine inheritance, as thou spakest by the hand of Moses thy servant, when thou broughtest our fathers out of Egypt, O Lord GOD.

chapters.zh: 所罗门在耶和华的坛前屈膝跪著，向天举手，在耶和华面前祷告祈求已毕，就起来，
chapters.en: And it was , that when Solomon had made an end of praying all this prayer and supplication unto the LORD, he arose from before the altar of the LORD, from kneeling on his knees with his hands spread up to heaven.

chapters.zh: 站著，大声为以色列全会众祝福，说：
chapters.en: And he stood, and blessed all the congregation of Israel with a loud voice, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华是应当称颂的！因为他照著一切所应许的赐平安给他的民以色列人，凡藉他仆人摩西应许赐福的话，一句都没有落空。
chapters.en: Blessed the LORD, that hath given rest unto his people Israel, according to all that he promised: there hath not failed one word of all his good promise, which he promised by the hand of Moses his servant.

chapters.zh: 愿耶和华 ─ 我们的神与我们同在，像与我们列祖同在一样，不撇下我们，不丢弃我们，
chapters.en: The LORD our God be with us, as he was with our fathers: let him not leave us, nor forsake us:

chapters.zh: 使我们的心归向他，遵行他的道，谨守他吩咐我们列祖的诫命、律例、典章。
chapters.en: That he may incline our hearts unto him, to walk in all his ways, and to keep his commandments, and his statutes, and his judgments, which he commanded our fathers.

chapters.zh: 我在耶和华面前祈求的这些话，愿耶和华 ─ 我们的神昼夜垂念，每日为他仆人与他民以色列伸冤，
chapters.en: And let these my words, wherewith I have made supplication before the LORD, be nigh unto the LORD our God day and night, that he maintain the cause of his servant, and the cause of his people Israel at all times, as the matter shall require:

chapters.zh: 使地上的万民都知道惟独耶和华是神，并无别神。
chapters.en: That all the people of the earth may know that the LORD God, none else.

chapters.zh: 所以你们当向耶和华 ─ 我们的神存诚实的心，遵行他的律例，谨守他的诫命，至终如今日一样。
chapters.en: Let your heart therefore be perfect with the LORD our God, to walk in his statutes, and to keep his commandments, as at this day.

chapters.zh: 王和以色列众民一同在耶和华面前献祭。
chapters.en: And the king, and all Israel with him, offered sacrifice before the LORD.

chapters.zh: 所罗门向耶和华献平安祭，用牛二万二千，羊十二万。这样，王和以色列众民为耶和华的殿行奉献之礼。
chapters.en: And Solomon offered a sacrifice of peace offerings, which he offered unto the LORD, two and twenty thousand oxen, and an hundred and twenty thousand sheep. So the king and all the children of Israel dedicated the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 当日，王因耶和华殿前的铜坛太小，容不下燔祭、素祭，和平安祭牲的脂油，便将耶和华殿前院子当中分别为圣，在那里献燔祭、素祭，和平安祭牲的脂油。
chapters.en: The same day did the king hallow the middle of the court that before the house of the LORD: for there he offered burnt offerings, and meat offerings, and the fat of the peace offerings: because the brasen altar that before the LORD too little to receive the burnt offerings, and meat offerings, and the fat of the peace offerings.

chapters.zh: 那时，所罗门和以色列众人，就是从哈马口直到埃及小河所有的以色列人，都聚集成为大会，在耶和华 ─ 我们的神面前守节七日又七日，共十四日。
chapters.en: And at that time Solomon held a feast, and all Israel with him, a great congregation, from the entering in of Hamath unto the river of Egypt, before the LORD our God, seven days and seven days, fourteen days.

chapters.zh: 第八日，王遣散众民；他们都为王祝福。因见耶和华向他仆人大卫和他民以色列所施的一切恩惠，就都心中喜乐，各归各家去了。
chapters.en: On the eighth day he sent the people away: and they blessed the king, and went unto their tents joyful and glad of heart for all the goodness that the LORD had done for David his servant, and for Israel his people.

chapters.zh: 所罗门建造耶和华殿和王宫，并一切所愿意建造的都完毕了，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Solomon had finished the building of the house of the LORD, and the king's house, and all Solomon's desire which he was pleased to do,

chapters.zh: 耶和华就二次向所罗门显现，如先前在基遍向他显现一样，
chapters.en: That the LORD appeared to Solomon the second time, as he had appeared unto him at Gibeon.

chapters.zh: 对他说：你向我所祷告祈求的，我都应允了。我已将你所建的这殿分别为圣，使我的名永远在其中；我的眼、我的心也必常在那里。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto him, I have heard thy prayer and thy supplication, that thou hast made before me: I have hallowed this house, which thou hast built, to put my name there for ever; and mine eyes and mine heart shall be there perpetually.

chapters.zh: 你若效法你父大卫，存诚实正直的心行在我面前，遵行我一切所吩咐你的，谨守我的律例典章，
chapters.en: And if thou wilt walk before me, as David thy father walked, in integrity of heart, and in uprightness, to do according to all that I have commanded thee, wilt keep my statutes and my judgments:

chapters.zh: 我就必坚固你的国位在以色列中，直到永远，正如我应许你父大卫说：你的子孙必不断人坐以色列的国位。
chapters.en: Then I will establish the throne of thy kingdom upon Israel for ever, as I promised to David thy father, saying, There shall not fail thee a man upon the throne of Israel.

chapters.zh: 倘若你们和你们的子孙转去不跟从我，不守我指示你们的诫命律例，去事奉敬拜别神，
chapters.en: if ye shall at all turn from following me, ye or your children, and will not keep my commandments my statutes which I have set before you, but go and serve other gods, and worship them:

chapters.zh: 我就必将以色列人从我赐给他们的地上剪除，并且我为己名所分别为圣的殿也必舍弃不顾，使以色列人在万民中作笑谈，被讥诮。
chapters.en: Then will I cut off Israel out of the land which I have given them; and this house, which I have hallowed for my name, will I cast out of my sight; and Israel shall be a proverb and a byword among all people:

chapters.zh: 这殿虽然甚高，将来经过的人必惊讶、嗤笑，说：耶和华为何向这地和这殿如此行呢？
chapters.en: And at this house, is high, every one that passeth by it shall be astonished, and shall hiss; and they shall say, Why hath the LORD done thus unto this land, and to this house?

chapters.zh: 人必回答说：是因此地的人离弃领他们列祖出埃及地之耶和华 ─ 他们的神，去亲近别神，事奉敬拜他，所以耶和华使这一切灾祸临到他们。
chapters.en: And they shall answer, Because they forsook the LORD their God, who brought forth their fathers out of the land of Egypt, and have taken hold upon other gods, and have worshipped them, and served them: therefore hath the LORD brought upon them all this evil.

chapters.zh: 所罗门建造耶和华殿和王宫，这两所二十年才完毕了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the end of twenty years, when Solomon had built the two houses, the house of the LORD, and the king's house,

chapters.zh: 推罗王希兰曾照所罗门所要的，资助他香柏木、松木，和金子；所罗门王就把加利利地的二十座城给了希兰。
chapters.en: ( Hiram the king of Tyre had furnished Solomon with cedar trees and fir trees, and with gold, according to all his desire,) that then king Solomon gave Hiram twenty cities in the land of Galilee.

chapters.zh: 希兰从推罗出来，察看所罗门给他的城邑，就不喜悦，
chapters.en: And Hiram came out from Tyre to see the cities which Solomon had given him; and they pleased him not.

chapters.zh: 说：我兄啊，你给我的是甚么城邑呢？他就给这城邑之地起名叫迦步勒，直到今日。
chapters.en: And he said, What cities these which thou hast given me, my brother? And he called them the land of Cabul unto this day.

chapters.zh: 希兰给所罗门一百二十他连得金子。
chapters.en: And Hiram sent to the king sixscore talents of gold.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王挑取服苦的人，是为建造耶和华的殿、自己的宫、米罗、耶路撒冷的城墙、夏琐、米吉多，并基色。
chapters.en: And this the reason of the levy which king Solomon raised; for to build the house of the LORD, and his own house, and Millo, and the wall of Jerusalem, and Hazor, and Megiddo, and Gezer.

chapters.zh: 先前埃及王法老上来攻取基色，用火焚烧，杀了城内居住的迦南人，将城赐给他女儿所罗门的妻作妆奁。
chapters.en: Pharaoh king of Egypt had gone up, and taken Gezer, and burnt it with fire, and slain the Canaanites that dwelt in the city, and given it a present unto his daughter, Solomon's wife.

chapters.zh: 所罗门建造基色、下伯和仑、
chapters.en: And Solomon built Gezer, and Bethhoron the nether,

chapters.zh: 巴拉，并国中旷野里的达莫，
chapters.en: And Baalath, and Tadmor in the wilderness, in the land,

chapters.zh: 又建造所有的积货城，并屯车和马兵的城，与耶路撒冷、利巴嫩，以及自己治理的全国中所愿建造的。
chapters.en: And all the cities of store that Solomon had, and cities for his chariots, and cities for his horsemen, and that which Solomon desired to build in Jerusalem, and in Lebanon, and in all the land of his dominion.

chapters.zh: 至于国中所剩下不属以色列人的亚摩利人、赫人、比利洗人、希未人、耶布斯人，
chapters.en: all the people left of the Amorites, Hittites, Perizzites, Hivites, and Jebusites, which not of the children of Israel,

chapters.zh: 就是以色列人不能灭尽的，所罗门挑取他们的后裔作服苦的奴仆，直到今日。
chapters.en: Their children that were left after them in the land, whom the children of Israel also were not able utterly to destroy, upon those did Solomon levy a tribute of bondservice unto this day.

chapters.zh: 惟有以色列人，所罗门不使他们作奴仆，乃是作他的战士、臣仆、统领、军长、车兵长、马兵长。
chapters.en: But of the children of Israel did Solomon make no bondmen: but they men of war, and his servants, and his princes, and his captains, and rulers of his chariots, and his horsemen.

chapters.zh: 所罗门有五百五十督工的，监管工人。
chapters.en: These the chief of the officers that over Solomon's work, five hundred and fifty, which bare rule over the people that wrought in the work.

chapters.zh: 法老的女儿从大卫城搬到所罗门为他建造的宫里。那时，所罗门才建造米罗。
chapters.en: But Pharaoh's daughter came up out of the city of David unto her house which had built for her: then did he build Millo.

chapters.zh: 所罗门每年三次在他为耶和华所筑的坛上献燔祭和平安祭，又在耶和华面前的坛上烧香。这样，他建造殿的工程完毕了。
chapters.en: And three times in a year did Solomon offer burnt offerings and peace offerings upon the altar which he built unto the LORD, and he burnt incense upon the altar that before the LORD. So he finished the house.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王在以东地红海边，靠近以禄的以旬迦别制造船只。
chapters.en: And king Solomon made a navy of ships in Eziongeber, which beside Eloth, on the shore of the Red sea, in the land of Edom.

chapters.zh: 希兰差遣他的仆人，就是熟悉泛海的船家，与所罗门的仆人一同坐船航海。
chapters.en: And Hiram sent in the navy his servants, shipmen that had knowledge of the sea, with the servants of Solomon.

chapters.zh: 他们到了俄斐，从那里得了四百二十他连得金子，运到所罗门王那里。
chapters.en: And they came to Ophir, and fetched from thence gold, four hundred and twenty talents, and brought to king Solomon.

chapters.zh: 示巴女王听见所罗门因耶和华之名所得的名声，就来要用难解的话试问所罗门。
chapters.en: And when the queen of Sheba heard of the fame of Solomon concerning the name of the LORD, she came to prove him with hard questions.

chapters.zh: 跟随他到耶路撒冷的人甚多，又有骆驼驮著香料、宝石，和许多金子。他来见了所罗门王，就把心里所有的对所罗门都说出来。
chapters.en: And she came to Jerusalem with a very great train, with camels that bare spices, and very much gold, and precious stones: and when she was come to Solomon, she communed with him of all that was in her heart.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王将他所问的都答上了，没有一句不明白、不能答的。
chapters.en: And Solomon told her all her questions: there was not thing hid from the king, which he told her not.

chapters.zh: 示巴女王见所罗门大有智慧，和他所建造的宫室，
chapters.en: And when the queen of Sheba had seen all Solomon's wisdom, and the house that he had built,

chapters.zh: 席上的珍馐美味，群臣分列而坐，仆人两旁侍立，以及他们的衣服装饰和酒政的衣服装饰，又见他上耶和华殿的台阶 ( 或作他在耶和华殿里所献的燔祭 )，就诧异得神不守舍；
chapters.en: And the meat of his table, and the sitting of his servants, and the attendance of his ministers, and their apparel, and his cupbearers, and his ascent by which he went up unto the house of the LORD; there was no more spirit in her.

chapters.zh: 对王说：我在本国里所听见论到你的事和你的智慧实在是真的！
chapters.en: And she said to the king, It was a true report that I heard in mine own land of thy acts and of thy wisdom.

chapters.zh: 我先不信那些话，及至我来亲眼见了才知道人所告诉我的还不到一半。你的智慧和你的福分越过我所听见的风声。
chapters.en: Howbeit I believed not the words, until I came, and mine eyes had seen : and, behold, the half was not told me: thy wisdom and prosperity exceedeth the fame which I heard.

chapters.zh: 你的臣子、你的仆人常侍立在你面前听你智慧的话是有福的！
chapters.en: Happy thy men, happy these thy servants, which stand continually before thee, that hear thy wisdom.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 你的神是应当称颂的！他喜悦你，使你坐以色列的国位；因为他永远爱以色列，所以立你作王，使你秉公行义。
chapters.en: Blessed be the LORD thy God, which delighted in thee, to set thee on the throne of Israel: because the LORD loved Israel for ever, therefore made he thee king, to do judgment and justice.

chapters.zh: 于是，示巴女王将一百二十他连得金子和宝石，与极多的香料，送给所罗门王。他送给王的香料，以后奉来的不再有这样多。
chapters.en: And she gave the king an hundred and twenty talents of gold, and of spices very great store, and precious stones: there came no more such abundance of spices as these which the queen of Sheba gave to king Solomon.

chapters.zh: 〈 希兰的船只从俄斐运了金子来，又从俄斐运了许多檀香木 ( 或作乌木；下同 ) 和宝石来。
chapters.en: And the navy also of Hiram, that brought gold from Ophir, brought in from Ophir great plenty of almug trees, and precious stones.

chapters.zh: 王用檀香木为耶和华殿和王宫做栏杆，又为歌唱的人做琴瑟。以后再没有这样的檀香木进国来，也没有人看见过，直到如今。〉
chapters.en: And the king made of the almug trees pillars for the house of the LORD, and for the king's house, harps also and psalteries for singers: there came no such almug trees, nor were seen unto this day.

chapters.zh: 示巴女王一切所要所求的，所罗门王都送给他，另外照自己的厚意餽送他。于是女王和他臣仆转回本国去了。
chapters.en: And king Solomon gave unto the queen of Sheba all her desire, whatsoever she asked, beside which Solomon gave her of his royal bounty. So she turned and went to her own country, she and her servants.

chapters.zh: 所罗门每年所得的金子共有六百六十六他连得。
chapters.en: Now the weight of gold that came to Solomon in one year was six hundred threescore and six talents of gold,
