chapters.zh: 另外还有商人和杂族 ( 历代下九章14节作亚拉伯 ) 的诸王，与国中的省长所进的金子。
chapters.en: Beside of the merchantmen, and of the traffick of the spice merchants, and of all the kings of Arabia, and of the governors of the country.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王用锤出来的金子打成挡牌二百面，每面用金子六百舍客勒；
chapters.en: And king Solomon made two hundred targets beaten gold: six hundred of gold went to one target.

chapters.zh: 又用锤出来的金子打成盾牌三百面，每面用金子三弥那，都放在利巴嫩林宫里。
chapters.en: And three hundred shields beaten gold; three pound of gold went to one shield: and the king put them in the house of the forest of Lebanon.

chapters.zh: 王用象牙制造一个宝座，用精金包裹。
chapters.en: Moreover the king made a great throne of ivory, and overlaid it with the best gold.

chapters.zh: 宝座有六层台阶，座的后背是圆的，两旁有扶手，靠近扶手有两个狮子站立。
chapters.en: The throne had six steps, and the top of the throne round behind: and stays on either side on the place of the seat, and two lions stood beside the stays.

chapters.zh: 六层台阶上有十二个狮子站立，每层有两个：左边一个，右边一个；在列国中没有这样做的。
chapters.en: And twelve lions stood there on the one side and on the other upon the six steps: there was not the like made in any kingdom.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王一切的饮器都是金子的。利巴嫩林宫里的一切器皿都是精金的。所罗门年间，银子算不了甚么。
chapters.en: And all king Solomon's drinking vessels gold, and all the vessels of the house of the forest of Lebanon pure gold; none silver: it was nothing accounted of in the days of Solomon.

chapters.zh: 因为王有他施船只与希兰的船只一同航海，三年一次，装载金银、象牙、猿猴、孔雀回来。
chapters.en: For the king had at sea a navy of Tharshish with the navy of Hiram: once in three years came the navy of Tharshish, bringing gold, and silver, ivory, and apes, and peacocks.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王的财宝与智慧胜过天下的列王。
chapters.en: So king Solomon exceeded all the kings of the earth for riches and for wisdom.

chapters.zh: 普天下的王都求见所罗门，要听神赐给他智慧的话。
chapters.en: And all the earth sought to Solomon, to hear his wisdom, which God had put in his heart.

chapters.zh: 他们各带贡物，就是金器、银器、衣服、军械、香料、骡马，每年有一定之例。
chapters.en: And they brought every man his present, vessels of silver, and vessels of gold, and garments, and armour, and spices, horses, and mules, a rate year by year.

chapters.zh: 所罗门聚集战车马兵，有战车一千四百辆，马兵一万二千名，安置在屯车的城邑和耶路撒冷，就是王那里。
chapters.en: And Solomon gathered together chariots and horsemen: and he had a thousand and four hundred chariots, and twelve thousand horsemen, whom he bestowed in the cities for chariots, and with the king at Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 王在耶路撒冷使银子多如石头，香柏木多如高原的桑树。
chapters.en: And the king made silver in Jerusalem as stones, and cedars made he as the sycomore trees that in the vale, for abundance.

chapters.zh: 所罗门的马是从埃及带来的，是王的商人一群一群按著定价买来的。
chapters.en: And Solomon had horses brought out of Egypt, and linen yarn: the king's merchants received the linen yarn at a price.

chapters.zh: 从埃及买来的车，每辆价银六百舍客勒，马每匹一百五十舍客勒。赫人诸王和亚兰诸王所买的车马，也是按这价值经他们手买来的。
chapters.en: And a chariot came up and went out of Egypt for six hundred of silver, and an horse for an hundred and fifty: and so for all the kings of the Hittites, and for the kings of Syria, did they bring out by their means.

chapters.zh: 所罗门王在法老的女儿之外，又宠爱许多外邦女子，就是摩押女子、亚扪女子、以东女子、西顿女子、赫人女子。
chapters.en: But king Solomon loved many strange women, together with the daughter of Pharaoh, women of the Moabites, Ammonites, Edomites, Zidonians, Hittites;

chapters.zh: 论到这些国的人，耶和华曾晓谕以色列人说：你们不可与他们往来相通，因为他们必诱惑你们的心去随从他们的神。所罗门却恋爱这些女子。
chapters.en: Of the nations which the LORD said unto the children of Israel, Ye shall not go in to them, neither shall they come in unto you: surely they will turn away your heart after their gods: Solomon clave unto these in love.

chapters.zh: 所罗门有妃七百，都是公主；还有嫔三百。这些妃嫔诱惑他的心。
chapters.en: And he had seven hundred wives, princesses, and three hundred concubines: and his wives turned away his heart.

chapters.zh: 所罗门年老的时候，他的妃嫔诱惑他的心去随从别神，不效法他父亲大卫诚诚实实地顺服耶和华 ─ 他的神。
chapters.en: For it came to pass, when Solomon was old, his wives turned away his heart after other gods: and his heart was not perfect with the LORD his God, as the heart of David his father.

chapters.zh: 因为所罗门随从西顿人的女神亚斯他录和亚扪人可憎的神米勒公。
chapters.en: For Solomon went after Ashtoreth the goddess of the Zidonians, and after Milcom the abomination of the Ammonites.

chapters.zh: 所罗门行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，不效法他父亲大卫专心顺从耶和华。
chapters.en: And Solomon did evil in the sight of the LORD, and went not fully after the LORD, as David his father.

chapters.zh: 所罗门为摩押可憎的神基抹和亚扪人可憎的神摩洛，在耶路撒冷对面的山上建筑邱坛。
chapters.en: Then did Solomon build an high place for Chemosh, the abomination of Moab, in the hill that before Jerusalem, and for Molech, the abomination of the children of Ammon.

chapters.zh: 他为那些向自己的神烧香献祭的外邦女子，就是他娶来的妃嫔也是这样行。
chapters.en: And likewise did he for all his strange wives, which burnt incense and sacrificed unto their gods.

chapters.zh: 耶和华向所罗门发怒，因为他的心偏离向他两次显现的耶和华 ─ 以色列的神。
chapters.en: And the LORD was angry with Solomon, because his heart was turned from the LORD God of Israel, which had appeared unto him twice,

chapters.zh: 耶和华曾吩咐他不可随从别神，他却没有遵守耶和华所吩咐的。
chapters.en: And had commanded him concerning this thing, that he should not go after other gods: but he kept not that which the LORD commanded.

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华对他说：你既行了这事，不遵守我所吩咐你守的约和律例，我必将你的国夺回，赐给你的臣子。
chapters.en: Wherefore the LORD said unto Solomon, Forasmuch as this is done of thee, and thou hast not kept my covenant and my statutes, which I have commanded thee, I will surely rend the kingdom from thee, and will give it to thy servant.

chapters.zh: 然而，因你父亲大卫的缘故，我不在你活著的日子行这事，必从你儿子的手中将国夺回。
chapters.en: Notwithstanding in thy days I will not do it for David thy father's sake: I will rend it out of the hand of thy son.

chapters.zh: 只是我不将全国夺回，要因我仆人大卫和我所选择的耶路撒冷，还留一支派给你的儿子。
chapters.en: Howbeit I will not rend away all the kingdom; will give one tribe to thy son for David my servant's sake, and for Jerusalem's sake which I have chosen.

chapters.zh: 耶和华使以东人哈达兴起，作所罗门的敌人；他是以东王的后裔。
chapters.en: And the LORD stirred up an adversary unto Solomon, Hadad the Edomite: he of the king's seed in Edom.

chapters.zh: 先前大卫攻击以东，元帅约押上去葬埋阵亡的人，将以东的男丁都杀了。
chapters.en: For it came to pass, when David was in Edom, and Joab the captain of the host was gone up to bury the slain, after he had smitten every male in Edom;

chapters.zh: 约押和以色列众人在以东住了六个月，直到将以东的男丁尽都剪除。
chapters.en: (For six months did Joab remain there with all Israel, until he had cut off every male in Edom:)

chapters.zh: 那时哈达还是幼童；他和他父亲的臣仆，几个以东人逃往埃及。
chapters.en: That Hadad fled, he and certain Edomites of his father's servants with him, to go into Egypt; Hadad yet a little child.

chapters.zh: 他们从米甸起行，到了巴兰；从巴兰带著几个人来到埃及见埃及王法老；法老为他派定粮食，又给他房屋田地。
chapters.en: And they arose out of Midian, and came to Paran: and they took men with them out of Paran, and they came to Egypt, unto Pharaoh king of Egypt; which gave him an house, and appointed him victuals, and gave him land.

chapters.zh: 哈达在法老面前大蒙恩惠，以致法老将王后答比匿的妹子赐他为妻。
chapters.en: And Hadad found great favour in the sight of Pharaoh, so that he gave him to wife the sister of his own wife, the sister of Tahpenes the queen.

chapters.zh: 答比匿的妹子给哈达生了一个儿子，名叫基努拔。答比匿使基努拔在法老的宫里断奶，基努拔就与法老的众子一同住在法老的宫里。
chapters.en: And the sister of Tahpenes bare him Genubath his son, whom Tahpenes weaned in Pharaoh's house: and Genubath was in Pharaoh's household among the sons of Pharaoh.

chapters.zh: 哈达在埃及听见大卫与他列祖同睡，元帅约押也死了，就对法老说：求王容我回本国去。
chapters.en: And when Hadad heard in Egypt that David slept with his fathers, and that Joab the captain of the host was dead, Hadad said to Pharaoh, Let me depart, that I may go to mine own country.

chapters.zh: 法老对他说：你在我这里有甚么缺乏，你竟要回你本国去呢？他回答说：我没有缺乏甚么，只是求王容我回去。
chapters.en: Then Pharaoh said unto him, But what hast thou lacked with me, that, behold, thou seekest to go to thine own country? And he answered, Nothing: howbeit let me go in any wise.

chapters.zh: 神又使以利亚大的儿子利逊兴起，作所罗门的敌人。他先前逃避主人琐巴王哈大底谢。
chapters.en: And God stirred him up adversary, Rezon the son of Eliadah, which fled from his lord Hadadezer king of Zobah:

chapters.zh: 大卫击杀琐巴人的时候，利逊招聚了一群人，自己作他们的头目，往大马色居住，在那里作王。
chapters.en: And he gathered men unto him, and became captain over a band, when David slew them : and they went to Damascus, and dwelt therein, and reigned in Damascus.

chapters.zh: 所罗门活著的时候，哈达为患之外，利逊也作以色列的敌人。他恨恶以色列人，且作了亚兰人的王。
chapters.en: And he was an adversary to Israel all the days of Solomon, beside the mischief that Hadad : and he abhorred Israel, and reigned over Syria.

chapters.zh: 所罗门的臣仆、尼八的儿子耶罗波安也举手攻击王。他是以法莲支派的洗利达人，他母亲是寡妇，名叫洗鲁阿。
chapters.en: And Jeroboam the son of Nebat, an Ephrathite of Zereda, Solomon's servant, whose mother's name Zeruah, a widow woman, even he lifted up hand against the king.

chapters.zh: 他举手攻击王的缘故，乃由先前所罗门建造米罗，修补他父亲大卫城的破口。
chapters.en: And this the cause that he lifted up hand against the king: Solomon built Millo, repaired the breaches of the city of David his father.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安是大有才能的人。所罗门见这少年人殷勤，就派他监管约瑟家的一切工程。
chapters.en: And the man Jeroboam a mighty man of valour: and Solomon seeing the young man that he was industrious, he made him ruler over all the charge of the house of Joseph.

chapters.zh: 一日，耶罗波安出了耶路撒冷，示罗人先知亚希雅在路上遇见他；亚希雅身上穿著一件新衣。他们二人在田野，以外并无别人。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at that time when Jeroboam went out of Jerusalem, that the prophet Ahijah the Shilonite found him in the way; and he had clad himself with a new garment; and they two alone in the field:

chapters.zh: 亚希雅将自己穿的那件新衣撕成十二片，
chapters.en: And Ahijah caught the new garment that on him, and rent it twelve pieces:

chapters.zh: 对耶罗波安说：你可以拿十片。耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我必将国从所罗门手里夺回，将十个支派赐给你。
chapters.en: And he said to Jeroboam, Take thee ten pieces: for thus saith the LORD, the God of Israel, Behold, I will rend the kingdom out of the hand of Solomon, and will give ten tribes to thee:

chapters.zh: （我因仆人大卫和我在以色列众支派中所选择的耶路撒冷城的缘故，仍给所罗门留一个支派。）
chapters.en: (But he shall have one tribe for my servant David's sake, and for Jerusalem's sake, the city which I have chosen out of all the tribes of Israel:)

chapters.zh: 因为他离弃我，敬拜西顿人的女神亚斯他录、摩押的神基抹，和亚扪人的神米勒公，没有遵从我的道，行我眼中看为正的事，守我的律例典章，像他父亲大卫一样。
chapters.en: Because that they have forsaken me, and have worshipped Ashtoreth the goddess of the Zidonians, Chemosh the god of the Moabites, and Milcom the god of the children of Ammon, and have not walked in my ways, to do right in mine eyes, and my statutes and my judgments, as David his father.

chapters.zh: 但我不从他手里将全国夺回；使他终身为君，是因我所拣选的仆人大卫谨守我的诫命律例。
chapters.en: Howbeit I will not take the whole kingdom out of his hand: but I will make him prince all the days of his life for David my servant's sake, whom I chose, because he kept my commandments and my statutes:

chapters.zh: 我必从他儿子的手里将国夺回，以十个支派赐给你，
chapters.en: But I will take the kingdom out of his son's hand, and will give it unto thee, ten tribes.

chapters.zh: 还留一个支派给他的儿子，使我仆人大卫在我所选择立我名的耶路撒冷城里，在我面前长有灯光。
chapters.en: And unto his son will I give one tribe, that David my servant may have a light alway before me in Jerusalem, the city which I have chosen me to put my name there.

chapters.zh: 我必拣选你，使你照心里一切所愿的，作王治理以色列。
chapters.en: And I will take thee, and thou shalt reign according to all that thy soul desireth, and shalt be king over Israel.

chapters.zh: 你若听从我一切所吩咐你的，遵行我的道，行我眼中看为正的事，谨守我的律例诫命，像我仆人大卫所行的，我就与你同在，为你立坚固的家，像我为大卫所立的一样，将以色列人赐给你。
chapters.en: And it shall be, if thou wilt hearken unto all that I command thee, and wilt walk in my ways, and do right in my sight, to keep my statutes and my commandments, as David my servant did; that I will be with thee, and build thee a sure house, as I built for David, and will give Israel unto thee.

chapters.zh: 我必因所罗门所行的使大卫后裔受患难，但不至于永远。
chapters.en: And I will for this afflict the seed of David, but not for ever.

chapters.zh: 所罗门因此想要杀耶罗波安。耶罗波安却起身逃往埃及；到了埃及王示撒那里，就住在埃及，直到所罗门死了。
chapters.en: Solomon sought therefore to kill Jeroboam. And Jeroboam arose, and fled into Egypt, unto Shishak king of Egypt, and was in Egypt until the death of Solomon.

chapters.zh: 所罗门其余的事，凡他所行的和他的智慧都写在所罗门记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Solomon, and all that he did, and his wisdom, they not written in the book of the acts of Solomon?

chapters.zh: 所罗门在耶路撒冷作以色列众人的王共四十年。
chapters.en: And the time that Solomon reigned in Jerusalem over all Israel forty years.

chapters.zh: 所罗门与他列祖同睡，葬在他父亲大卫的城里。他儿子罗波安接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Solomon slept with his fathers, and was buried in the city of David his father: and Rehoboam his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 罗波安往示剑去；因为以色列人都到了示剑要立他作王。
chapters.en: And Rehoboam went to Shechem: for all Israel were come to Shechem to make him king.

chapters.zh: 尼八的儿子耶罗波安先前躲避所罗门王，逃往埃及，住在那里（他听见这事。）
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who was yet in Egypt, heard , (for he was fled from the presence of king Solomon, and Jeroboam dwelt in Egypt;)

chapters.zh: 以色列人打发人去请他来，他就和以色列会众都来见罗波安，对他说：
chapters.en: That they sent and called him. And Jeroboam and all the congregation of Israel came, and spake unto Rehoboam, saying,

chapters.zh: 你父亲使我们负重轭，做苦工，现在求你使我们做的苦工、负的重轭轻松些，我们就事奉你。
chapters.en: Thy father made our yoke grievous: now therefore make thou the grievous service of thy father, and his heavy yoke which he put upon us, lighter, and we will serve thee.

chapters.zh: 罗波安对他们说：你们暂且去，第三日再来见我。民就去了。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, Depart yet three days, then come again to me. And the people departed.

chapters.zh: 罗波安之父所罗门在世的日子，有侍立在他面前的老年人，罗波安王和他们商议，说：你们给我出个甚么主意，我好回覆这民。
chapters.en: And king Rehoboam consulted with the old men, that stood before Solomon his father while he yet lived, and said, How do ye advise that I may answer this people?

chapters.zh: 老年人对他说：现在王若服事这民如仆人，用好话回答他们，他们就永远作王的仆人。
chapters.en: And they spake unto him, saying, If thou wilt be a servant unto this people this day, and wilt serve them, and answer them, and speak good words to them, then they will be thy servants for ever.

chapters.zh: 王却不用老年人给他出的主意，就和那些与他一同长大、在他面前侍立的少年人商议，
chapters.en: But he forsook the counsel of the old men, which they had given him, and consulted with the young men that were grown up with him, which stood before him:

chapters.zh: 说：这民对我说：你父亲使我们负重轭，求你使我们轻松些。你们给我出个甚么主意，我好回覆他们。
chapters.en: And he said unto them, What counsel give ye that we may answer this people, who have spoken to me, saying, Make the yoke which thy father did put upon us lighter?

chapters.zh: 那同他长大的少年人说：这民对王说：你父亲使我们负重轭，求你使我们轻松些。王要对他们如此说：我的小拇指头比我父亲的腰还粗。
chapters.en: And the young men that were grown up with him spake unto him, saying, Thus shalt thou speak unto this people that spake unto thee, saying, Thy father made our yoke heavy, but make thou lighter unto us; thus shalt thou say unto them, My little shall be thicker than my father's loins.

chapters.zh: 我父亲使你们负重轭，我必使你们负更重的轭！我父亲用鞭子责打你们，我要用蝎子鞭责打你们！
chapters.en: And now whereas my father did lade you with a heavy yoke, I will add to your yoke: my father hath chastised you with whips, but I will chastise you with scorpions.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安和众百姓遵著罗波安王所说你们第三日再来见我的那话，第三日他们果然来了。
chapters.en: So Jeroboam and all the people came to Rehoboam the third day, as the king had appointed, saying, Come to me again the third day.

chapters.zh: 王用严厉的话回答百姓，不用老年人给他所出的主意，
chapters.en: And the king answered the people roughly, and forsook the old men's counsel that they gave him;

chapters.zh: 照著少年人所出的主意对民说：我父亲使你们负重轭，我必使你们负更重的轭！我父亲用鞭子责打你们，我要用蝎子鞭责打你们！
chapters.en: And spake to them after the counsel of the young men, saying, My father made your yoke heavy, and I will add to your yoke: my father chastised you with whips, but I will chastise you with scorpions.

chapters.zh: 王不肯依从百姓，这事乃出于耶和华，为要应验他藉示罗人亚希雅对尼八的儿子耶罗波安所说的话。
chapters.en: Wherefore the king hearkened not unto the people; for the cause was from the LORD, that he might perform his saying, which the LORD spake by Ahijah the Shilonite unto Jeroboam the son of Nebat.

chapters.zh: 以色列众民见王不依从他们，就对王说：我们与大卫有甚么分儿呢？与耶西的儿子并没有关涉。以色列人哪，各回各家去罢！大卫家啊，自己顾自己罢！于是，以色列人都回自己家里去了，
chapters.en: So when all Israel saw that the king hearkened not unto them, the people answered the king, saying, What portion have we in David? neither inheritance in the son of Jesse: to your tents, O Israel: now see to thine own house, David. So Israel departed unto their tents.

chapters.zh: 惟独住犹大城邑的以色列人，罗波安仍作他们的王。
chapters.en: But the children of Israel which dwelt in the cities of Judah, Rehoboam reigned over them.

chapters.zh: 罗波安王差遣掌管服苦之人的亚多兰往以色列人那里去，以色列人就用石头打死他。罗波安王急忙上车，逃回耶路撒冷去了。
chapters.en: Then king Rehoboam sent Adoram, who over the tribute; and all Israel stoned him with stones, that he died. Therefore king Rehoboam made speed to get him up to his chariot, to flee to Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 这样，以色列人背叛大卫家，直到今日。
chapters.en: So Israel rebelled against the house of David unto this day.

chapters.zh: 以色列众人听见耶罗波安回来了，就打发人去请他到会众面前，立他作以色列众人的王。除了犹大支派以外，没有顺从大卫家的。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when all Israel heard that Jeroboam was come again, that they sent and called him unto the congregation, and made him king over all Israel: there was none that followed the house of David, but the tribe of Judah only.

chapters.zh: 罗波安来到耶路撒冷，招聚犹大全家和便雅悯支派的人共十八万，都是挑选的战士，要与以色列家争战，好将国夺回，再归所罗门的儿子罗波安。
chapters.en: And when Rehoboam was come to Jerusalem, he assembled all the house of Judah, with the tribe of Benjamin, an hundred and fourscore thousand chosen men, which were warriors, to fight against the house of Israel, to bring the kingdom again to Rehoboam the son of Solomon.

chapters.zh: 但神的话临到神人示玛雅，说：
chapters.en: But the word of God came unto Shemaiah the man of God, saying,

chapters.zh: 你去告诉所罗门的儿子犹大王罗波安和犹大、便雅悯全家，并其余的民说：
chapters.en: Speak unto Rehoboam, the son of Solomon, king of Judah, and unto all the house of Judah and Benjamin, and to the remnant of the people, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：你们不可上去与你们的弟兄以色列人争战。各归各家去罢！因为这事出于我。众人就听从耶和华的话，遵著耶和华的命回去了。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD, Ye shall not go up, nor fight against your brethren the children of Israel: return every man to his house; for this thing is from me. They hearkened therefore to the word of the LORD, and returned to depart, according to the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安在以法莲山地建筑示剑，就住在其中；又从示剑出去，建筑毗努伊勒。
chapters.en: Then Jeroboam built Shechem in mount Ephraim, and dwelt therein; and went out from thence, and built Penuel.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安心里说：恐怕这国仍归大卫家；
chapters.en: And Jeroboam said in his heart, Now shall the kingdom return to the house of David:

chapters.zh: 这民若上耶路撒冷去，在耶和华的殿里献祭，他们的心必归向他们的主 ─ 犹大王罗波安，就把我杀了，仍归犹大王罗波安。
chapters.en: If this people go up to do sacrifice in the house of the LORD at Jerusalem, then shall the heart of this people turn again unto their lord, unto Rehoboam king of Judah, and they shall kill me, and go again to Rehoboam king of Judah.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安王就筹划定妥，铸造了两个金牛犊，对众民说：以色列人哪，你们上耶路撒冷去实在是难；这就是领你们出埃及地的神。
chapters.en: Whereupon the king took counsel, and made two calves gold, and said unto them, It is too much for you to go up to Jerusalem: behold thy gods, O Israel, which brought thee up out of the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 他就把牛犊一只安在伯特利，一只安在但。
chapters.en: And he set the one in Bethel, and the other put he in Dan.

chapters.zh: 这事叫百姓陷在罪里，因为他们往但去拜那牛犊。
chapters.en: And this thing became a sin: for the people went before the one, unto Dan.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安在邱坛那里建殿，将那不属利未人的凡民立为祭司。
chapters.en: And he made an house of high places, and made priests of the lowest of the people, which were not of the sons of Levi.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安定八月十五日为节期，像在犹大的节期一样，自己上坛献祭。他在伯特利也这样向他所铸的牛犊献祭，又将立为邱坛的祭司安置在伯特利。
chapters.en: And Jeroboam ordained a feast in the eighth month, on the fifteenth day of the month, like unto the feast that in Judah, and he offered upon the altar. So did he in Bethel, sacrificing unto the calves that he had made: and he placed in Bethel the priests of the high places which he had made.

chapters.zh: 他在八月十五日，就是他私自所定的月日，为以色列人立作节期的日子，在伯特利上坛烧香。
chapters.en: So he offered upon the altar which he had made in Bethel the fifteenth day of the eighth month, in the month which he had devised of his own heart; and ordained a feast unto the children of Israel: and he offered upon the altar, and burnt incense.

chapters.zh: 那时，有一个神人奉耶和华的命从犹大来到伯特利。耶罗波安正站在坛旁要烧香；
chapters.en: And, behold, there came a man of God out of Judah by the word of the LORD unto Bethel: and Jeroboam stood by the altar to burn incense.

chapters.zh: 神人奉耶和华的命向坛呼叫，说：坛哪，坛哪！耶和华如此说：大卫家里必生一个儿子，名叫约西亚，他必将邱坛的祭司，就是在你上面烧香的，杀在你上面，人的骨头也必烧在你上面。
chapters.en: And he cried against the altar in the word of the LORD, and said, O altar, altar, thus saith the LORD; Behold, a child shall be born unto the house of David, Josiah by name; and upon thee shall he offer the priests of the high places that burn incense upon thee, and men's bones shall be burnt upon thee.

chapters.zh: 当日，神人设个预兆，说：这坛必破裂，坛上的灰必倾撒，这是耶和华说的预兆。
chapters.en: And he gave a sign the same day, saying, This the sign which the LORD hath spoken; Behold, the altar shall be rent, and the ashes that upon it shall be poured out.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安王听见神人向伯特利的坛所呼叫的话，就从坛上伸手，说：拿住他罢！王向神人所伸的手就枯干了，不能弯回；
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when king Jeroboam heard the saying of the man of God, which had cried against the altar in Bethel, that he put forth his hand from the altar, saying, Lay hold on him. And his hand, which he put forth against him, dried up, so that he could not pull it in again to him.

chapters.zh: 坛也破裂了，坛上的灰倾撒了，正如神人奉耶和华的命所设的预兆。
chapters.en: The altar also was rent, and the ashes poured out from the altar, according to the sign which the man of God had given by the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 王对神人说：请你为我祷告，求耶和华 ─ 你神的恩典使我的手复原。于是神人祈祷耶和华，王的手就复了原，仍如寻常一样。
chapters.en: And the king answered and said unto the man of God, Intreat now the face of the LORD thy God, and pray for me, that my hand may be restored me again. And the man of God besought the LORD, and the king's hand was restored him again, and became as before.

chapters.zh: 王对神人说：请你同我回去吃饭，加添心力，我也必给你赏赐。
chapters.en: And the king said unto the man of God, Come home with me, and refresh thyself, and I will give thee a reward.

chapters.zh: 神人对王说：你就是把你的宫一半给我，我也不同你进去，也不在这地方吃饭喝水；
chapters.en: And the man of God said unto the king, If thou wilt give me half thine house, I will not go in with thee, neither will I eat bread nor drink water in this place:

chapters.zh: 因为有耶和华的话嘱咐我，说不可在伯特利吃饭喝水，也不可从你去的原路回来。
chapters.en: For so was it charged me by the word of the LORD, saying, Eat no bread, nor drink water, nor turn again by the same way that thou camest.

chapters.zh: 于是神人从别的路回去，不从伯特利来的原路回去。
chapters.en: So he went another way, and returned not by the way that he came to Bethel.

chapters.zh: 有一个老先知住在伯特利，他儿子们来，将神人当日在伯特利所行的一切事和向王所说的话都告诉了父亲。
chapters.en: Now there dwelt an old prophet in Bethel; and his sons came and told him all the works that the man of God had done that day in Bethel: the words which he had spoken unto the king, them they told also to their father.

chapters.zh: 父亲问他们说：神人从哪条路去了呢？儿子们就告诉他；原来他们看见那从犹大来的神人所去的路。
chapters.en: And their father said unto them, What way went he? For his sons had seen what way the man of God went, which came from Judah.

chapters.zh: 老先知就吩咐他儿子们说：你们为我备驴。他们备好了驴，他就骑上，
chapters.en: And he said unto his sons, Saddle me the ass. So they saddled him the ass: and he rode thereon,

chapters.zh: 去追赶神人，遇见他坐在橡树底下，就问他说：你是从犹大来的神人不是？他说：是。
chapters.en: And went after the man of God, and found him sitting under an oak: and he said unto him, thou the man of God that camest from Judah? And he said, I .

chapters.zh: 老先知对他说：请你同我回家吃饭。
chapters.en: Then he said unto him, Come home with me, and eat bread.

chapters.zh: 神人说：我不可同你回去进你的家，也不可在这里同你吃饭喝水；
chapters.en: And he said, I may not return with thee, nor go in with thee: neither will I eat bread nor drink water with thee in this place:

chapters.zh: 因为有耶和华的话嘱咐我说：你在那里不可吃饭喝水，也不可从你去的原路回来。
chapters.en: For it was said to me by the word of the LORD, Thou shalt eat no bread nor drink water there, nor turn again to go by the way that thou camest.

chapters.zh: 老先知对他说：我也是先知，和你一样。有天使奉耶和华的命对我说：你去把他带回你的家，叫他吃饭喝水。这都是老先知诓哄他。
chapters.en: He said unto him, I a prophet also as thou ; and an angel spake unto me by the word of the LORD, saying, Bring him back with thee into thine house, that he may eat bread and drink water. he lied unto him.

chapters.zh: 于是神人同老先知回去，在他家里吃饭喝水。
chapters.en: So he went back with him, and did eat bread in his house, and drank water.

chapters.zh: 二人坐席的时候，耶和华的话临到那带神人回来的先知，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as they sat at the table, that the word of the LORD came unto the prophet that brought him back:

chapters.zh: 他就对那从犹大来的神人说：耶和华如此说：你既违背耶和华的话，不遵守耶和华 ─ 你神的命令，
chapters.en: And he cried unto the man of God that came from Judah, saying, Thus saith the LORD, Forasmuch as thou hast disobeyed the mouth of the LORD, and hast not kept the commandment which the LORD thy God commanded thee,

chapters.zh: 反倒回来，在耶和华禁止你吃饭喝水的地方吃了喝了，因此你的尸身不得入你列祖的坟墓。
chapters.en: But camest back, and hast eaten bread and drunk water in the place, of the which did say to thee, Eat no bread, and drink no water; thy carcase shall not come unto the sepulchre of thy fathers.

chapters.zh: 吃喝完了，老先知为所带回来的先知备驴。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, after he had eaten bread, and after he had drunk, that he saddled for him the ass, , for the prophet whom he had brought back.

chapters.zh: 他就去了，在路上有个狮子遇见他，将他咬死，尸身倒在路上，驴站在尸身旁边，狮子也站在尸身旁边。
chapters.en: And when he was gone, a lion met him by the way, and slew him: and his carcase was cast in the way, and the ass stood by it, the lion also stood by the carcase.

chapters.zh: 有人从那里经过，看见尸身倒在路上，狮子站在尸身旁边，就来到老先知所住的城里述说这事。
chapters.en: And, behold, men passed by, and saw the carcase cast in the way, and the lion standing by the carcase: and they came and told in the city where the old prophet dwelt.

chapters.zh: 那带神人回来的先知听见这事，就说：这是那违背了耶和华命令的神人，所以耶和华把他交给狮子；狮子抓伤他，咬死他，是应验耶和华对他说的话。
chapters.en: And when the prophet that brought him back from the way heard , he said, It the man of God, who was disobedient unto the word of the LORD: therefore the LORD hath delivered him unto the lion, which hath torn him, and slain him, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake unto him.

chapters.zh: 老先知就吩咐他儿子们说：你们为我备驴。他们就备了驴。
chapters.en: And he spake to his sons, saying, Saddle me the ass. And they saddled .

chapters.zh: 他去了，看见神人的尸身倒在路上，驴和狮子站在尸身旁边，狮子却没有吃尸身，也没有抓伤驴。
chapters.en: And he went and found his carcase cast in the way, and the ass and the lion standing by the carcase: the lion had not eaten the carcase, nor torn the ass.

chapters.zh: 老先知就把神人的尸身驮在驴上，带回自己的城里，要哀哭他，葬埋他；
chapters.en: And the prophet took up the carcase of the man of God, and laid it upon the ass, and brought it back: and the old prophet came to the city, to mourn and to bury him.

chapters.zh: 就把他的尸身葬在自己的坟墓里，哀哭他，说：哀哉！我兄啊。
chapters.en: And he laid his carcase in his own grave; and they mourned over him, , Alas, my brother!

chapters.zh: 安葬之后，老先知对他儿子们说：我死了，你们要葬我在神人的坟墓里，使我的尸骨靠近他的尸骨，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, after he had buried him, that he spake to his sons, saying, When I am dead, then bury me in the sepulchre wherein the man of God buried; lay my bones beside his bones:

chapters.zh: 因为他奉耶和华的命指著伯特利的坛和撒玛利亚各城有邱坛之殿所说的话必定应验。
chapters.en: For the saying which he cried by the word of the LORD against the altar in Bethel, and against all the houses of the high places which in the cities of Samaria, shall surely come to pass.

chapters.zh: 这事以后，耶罗波安仍不离开他的恶道，将凡民立为邱坛的祭司；凡愿意的，他都分别为圣，立为邱坛的祭司。
chapters.en: After this thing Jeroboam returned not from his evil way, but made again of the lowest of the people priests of the high places: whosoever would, he consecrated him, and he became of the priests of the high places.

chapters.zh: 这事叫耶罗波安的家陷在罪里，甚至他的家从地上除灭了。
chapters.en: And this thing became sin unto the house of Jeroboam, even to cut off, and to destroy from off the face of the earth.

chapters.zh: 那时，耶罗波安的儿子亚比雅病了。
chapters.en: At that time Abijah the son of Jeroboam fell sick.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安对他的妻说：你可以起来改装，使人不知道你是耶罗波安的妻，往示罗去，在那里有先知亚希雅。他曾告诉我说，你必作这民的王。
chapters.en: And Jeroboam said to his wife, Arise, I pray thee, and disguise thyself, that thou be not known to be the wife of Jeroboam; and get thee to Shiloh: behold, there Ahijah the prophet, which told me that king over this people.

chapters.zh: 现在你要带十个饼，与几个薄饼，和一瓶蜜去见他，他必告诉你儿子将要怎样。
chapters.en: And take with thee ten loaves, and cracknels, and a cruse of honey, and go to him: he shall tell thee what shall become of the child.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安的妻就这样行，起身往示罗去，到了亚希雅的家。亚希雅因年纪老迈，眼目发直，不能看见。
chapters.en: And Jeroboam's wife did so, and arose, and went to Shiloh, and came to the house of Ahijah. But Ahijah could not see; for his eyes were set by reason of his age.

chapters.zh: 耶和华先晓谕亚希雅说：耶罗波安的妻要来问你，因他儿子病了，你当此此如此告诉他。他进来的时候必装作别的妇人。
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto Ahijah, Behold, the wife of Jeroboam cometh to ask a thing of thee for her son; for he sick: thus and thus shalt thou say unto her: for it shall be, when she cometh in, that she shall feign herself another .

chapters.zh: 他刚进门，亚希雅听见他脚步的响声，就说：耶罗波安的妻，进来罢！你为何装作别的妇人呢？我奉差遣将凶事告诉你。
chapters.en: And it was , when Ahijah heard the sound of her feet, as she came in at the door, that he said, Come in, thou wife of Jeroboam; why feignest thou thyself another? for I sent to thee heavy .

chapters.zh: 你回去告诉耶罗波安说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我从民中将你高举，立你作我民以色列的君，
chapters.en: Go, tell Jeroboam, Thus saith the LORD God of Israel, Forasmuch as I exalted thee from among the people, and made thee prince over my people Israel,

chapters.zh: 将国从大卫家夺回赐给你；你却不效法我仆人大卫，遵守我的诫命，一心顺从我，行我眼中看为正的事。
chapters.en: And rent the kingdom away from the house of David, and gave it thee: and thou hast not been as my servant David, who kept my commandments, and who followed me with all his heart, to do only right in mine eyes;

chapters.zh: 你竟行恶，比那在你以先的更甚，为自己立了别神，铸了偶像，惹我发怒，将我丢在背后。
chapters.en: But hast done evil above all that were before thee: for thou hast gone and made thee other gods, and molten images, to provoke me to anger, and hast cast me behind thy back:

chapters.zh: 因此，我必使灾祸临到耶罗波安的家，将属耶罗波安的男丁，无论困住的、自由的都从以色列中剪除，必除尽耶罗波安的家，如人除尽粪土一般。
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, I will bring evil upon the house of Jeroboam, and will cut off from Jeroboam him that pisseth against the wall, him that is shut up and left in Israel, and will take away the remnant of the house of Jeroboam, as a man taketh away dung, till it be all gone.

chapters.zh: 凡属耶罗波安的人，死在城中的必被狗吃，死在田野的必被空中的鸟吃。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Him that dieth of Jeroboam in the city shall the dogs eat; and him that dieth in the field shall the fowls of the air eat: for the LORD hath spoken .

chapters.zh: 所以你起身回家去罢！你的脚一进城，你儿子就必死了。
chapters.en: Arise thou therefore, get thee to thine own house: when thy feet enter into the city, the child shall die.

chapters.zh: 以色列众人必为他哀哭，将他葬埋。凡属耶罗波安的人，惟有他得入坟墓；因为在耶罗波安的家中，只有他向耶和华 ─ 以色列的神显出善行。
chapters.en: And all Israel shall mourn for him, and bury him: for he only of Jeroboam shall come to the grave, because in him there is found good thing toward the LORD God of Israel in the house of Jeroboam.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必另立一王治理以色列。到了日期，他必剪除耶罗波安的家；那日期已经到了。
chapters.en: Moreover the LORD shall raise him up a king over Israel, who shall cut off the house of Jeroboam that day: but what? even now.

chapters.zh: 耶和华必击打以色列人，使他们摇动，像水中的芦苇一般；又将他们从耶和华赐给他们列祖的美地上拔出来，分散在大河那边；因为他们做木偶，惹耶和华发怒。
chapters.en: For the LORD shall smite Israel, as a reed is shaken in the water, and he shall root up Israel out of this good land, which he gave to their fathers, and shall scatter them beyond the river, because they have made their groves, provoking the LORD to anger.

chapters.zh: 因耶罗波安所犯的罪，又使以色列人陷在罪里，耶和华必将以色列人交给仇敌。
chapters.en: And he shall give Israel up because of the sins of Jeroboam, who did sin, and who made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安的妻起身回去，到了得撒，刚到门槛，儿子就死了。
chapters.en: And Jeroboam's wife arose, and departed, and came to Tirzah: when she came to the threshold of the door, the child died;

chapters.zh: 以色列众人将他葬埋，为他哀哭，正如耶和华藉他仆人先知亚希雅所说的话。
chapters.en: And they buried him; and all Israel mourned for him, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake by the hand of his servant Ahijah the prophet.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安其余的事，他怎样争战，怎样作王，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: And the rest of the acts of Jeroboam, how he warred, and how he reigned, behold, they written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel.

chapters.zh: 耶罗波安作王二十二年，就与他列祖同睡。他儿子拿答接续他作王。
chapters.en: And the days which Jeroboam reigned two and twenty years: and he slept with his fathers, and Nadab his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 所罗门的儿子罗波安作犹大王。他登基的时候年四十一岁，在耶路撒冷，就是耶和华从以色列众支派中所选择立他名的城，作王十七年。罗波安的母亲名叫拿玛，是亚扪人。
chapters.en: And Rehoboam the son of Solomon reigned in Judah. Rehoboam forty and one years old when he began to reign, and he reigned seventeen years in Jerusalem, the city which the LORD did choose out of all the tribes of Israel, to put his name there. And his mother's name Naamah an Ammonitess.

chapters.zh: 犹大人行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，犯罪触动他的愤恨，比他们列祖更甚。
chapters.en: And Judah did evil in the sight of the LORD, and they provoked him to jealousy with their sins which they had committed, above all that their fathers had done.

chapters.zh: 因为他们在各高冈上，各青翠树下筑坛，立柱像和木偶。
chapters.en: For they also built them high places, and images, and groves, on every high hill, and under every green tree.

chapters.zh: 国中也有娈童。犹大人效法耶和华在以色列人面前所赶出的外邦人，行一切可憎恶的事。
chapters.en: And there were also sodomites in the land: they did according to all the abominations of the nations which the LORD cast out before the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 罗波安王第五年，埃及王示撒上来攻取耶路撒冷，
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the fifth year of king Rehoboam, Shishak king of Egypt came up against Jerusalem:

chapters.zh: 夺了耶和华殿和王宫里的宝物，尽都带走，又夺去所罗门制造的金盾牌。
chapters.en: And he took away the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king's house; he even took away all: and he took away all the shields of gold which Solomon had made.

chapters.zh: 罗波安王制造铜盾牌代替那金盾牌，交给守王宫门的护卫长看守。
chapters.en: And king Rehoboam made in their stead brasen shields, and committed unto the hands of the chief of the guard, which kept the door of the king's house.

chapters.zh: 王每逢进耶和华的殿，护卫兵就拿这盾牌，随后仍将盾牌送回，放在护卫房。
chapters.en: And it was , when the king went into the house of the LORD, that the guard bare them, and brought them back into the guard chamber.

chapters.zh: 罗波安其余的事，凡他所行的，都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Rehoboam, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 罗波安与耶罗波安时常争战。
chapters.en: And there was war between Rehoboam and Jeroboam all days.

chapters.zh: 罗波安与他列祖同睡，葬在大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他母亲名叫拿玛，是亚扪人。他儿子亚比央 ( 又名亚比雅 ) 接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Rehoboam slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David. And his mother's name Naamah an Ammonitess. And Abijam his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 尼八的儿子耶罗波安王十八年，亚比央登基作犹大王，
chapters.en: Now in the eighteenth year of king Jeroboam the son of Nebat reigned Abijam over Judah.

chapters.zh: 在耶路撒冷作王三年。他母亲名叫玛迦，是押沙龙的女儿。
chapters.en: Three years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.

chapters.zh: 亚比央行他父亲在他以前所行的一切恶，他的心不像他祖大卫的心，诚诚实实地顺服耶和华 ─ 他的神。
chapters.en: And he walked in all the sins of his father, which he had done before him: and his heart was not perfect with the LORD his God, as the heart of David his father.

chapters.zh: 然而耶和华 ─ 他的神因大卫的缘故，仍使他在耶路撒冷有灯光，叫他儿子接续他作王，坚立耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: Nevertheless for David's sake did the LORD his God give him a lamp in Jerusalem, to set up his son after him, and to establish Jerusalem:

chapters.zh: 因为大卫除了赫人乌利亚那件事，都是行耶和华眼中看为正的事，一生没有违背耶和华一切所吩咐的。
chapters.en: Because David did right in the eyes of the LORD, and turned not aside from any that he commanded him all the days of his life, save only in the matter of Uriah the Hittite.

chapters.zh: 罗波安在世的日子常与耶罗波安争战。
chapters.en: And there was war between Rehoboam and Jeroboam all the days of his life.

chapters.zh: 亚比央其余的事，凡他所行的，都写在犹大列王记上。亚比央常与耶罗波安争战。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Abijam, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah? And there was war between Abijam and Jeroboam.

chapters.zh: 亚比央与他列祖同睡，葬在大卫的城里。他儿子亚撒接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Abijam slept with his fathers; and they buried him in the city of David: and Asa his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 以色列王耶罗波安二十年，亚撒登基作犹大王，
chapters.en: And in the twentieth year of Jeroboam king of Israel reigned Asa over Judah.

chapters.zh: 在耶路撒冷作王四十一年。他祖母名叫玛迦，是押沙龙的女儿。
chapters.en: And forty and one years reigned he in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Maachah, the daughter of Abishalom.

chapters.zh: 亚撒效法他祖大卫行耶和华眼中看为正的事，
chapters.en: And Asa did right in the eyes of the LORD, as David his father.

chapters.zh: 从国中除去娈童，又除掉他列祖所造的一切偶像；
chapters.en: And he took away the sodomites out of the land, and removed all the idols that his fathers had made.

chapters.zh: 并且贬了他祖母玛迦太后的位，因他造了可憎的偶像亚舍拉。亚撒砍下他的偶像，烧在汲沦溪边，
chapters.en: And also Maachah his mother, even her he removed from queen, because she had made an idol in a grove; and Asa destroyed her idol, and burnt by the brook Kidron.

chapters.zh: 只是邱坛还没有废去。亚撒一生却向耶和华存诚实的心。
chapters.en: But the high places were not removed: nevertheless Asa's heart was perfect with the LORD all his days.

chapters.zh: 亚撒将他父亲所分别为圣与自己所分别为圣的金银和器皿都奉到耶和华的殿里。
chapters.en: And he brought in the things which his father had dedicated, and the things which himself had dedicated, into the house of the LORD, silver, and gold, and vessels.

chapters.zh: 亚撒和以色列王巴沙在世的日子常常争战。
chapters.en: And there was war between Asa and Baasha king of Israel all their days.

chapters.zh: 以色列王巴沙上来要攻击犹大，修筑拉玛，不许人从犹大王亚撒那里出入。
chapters.en: And Baasha king of Israel went up against Judah, and built Ramah, that he might not suffer any to go out or come in to Asa king of Judah.

chapters.zh: 于是亚撒将耶和华殿和王宫府库里所剩下的金银都交在他臣仆手中，打发他们往住大马色的亚兰王 ─ 希旬的孙子、他伯利们的儿子便哈达那里去，
chapters.en: Then Asa took all the silver and the gold left in the treasures of the house of the LORD, and the treasures of the king's house, and delivered them into the hand of his servants: and king Asa sent them to Benhadad, the son of Tabrimon, the son of Hezion, king of Syria, that dwelt at Damascus, saying,

chapters.zh: 说：你父曾与我父立约，我与你也要立约。现在我将金银送你为礼物，求你废掉你与以色列王巴沙所立的约，使他离开我。
chapters.en: a league between me and thee, between my father and thy father: behold, I have sent unto thee a present of silver and gold; come and break thy league with Baasha king of Israel, that he may depart from me.

chapters.zh: 便哈达听从亚撒王的话，派军长去攻击以色列的城邑；他们就攻破以云、但、亚伯伯玛迦、基尼烈全境、拿弗他利全境。
chapters.en: So Benhadad hearkened unto king Asa, and sent the captains of the hosts which he had against the cities of Israel, and smote Ijon, and Dan, and Abelbethmaachah, and all Cinneroth, with all the land of Naphtali.

chapters.zh: 巴沙听见，就停工不修筑拉玛了，仍住在得撒。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Baasha heard , that he left off building of Ramah, and dwelt in Tirzah.

chapters.zh: 于是亚撒王宣告犹大众人，不准一个推辞，吩咐他们将巴沙修筑拉玛所用的石头、木头都运去，用以修筑便雅悯的迦巴和米斯巴。
chapters.en: Then king Asa made a proclamation throughout all Judah; none exempted: and they took away the stones of Ramah, and the timber thereof, wherewith Baasha had builded; and king Asa built with them Geba of Benjamin, and Mizpah.

chapters.zh: 亚撒其余的事，凡他所行的，并他的勇力与他所建筑的城邑，都写在犹大列王记上。亚撒年老的时候，脚上有病。
chapters.en: The rest of all the acts of Asa, and all his might, and all that he did, and the cities which he built, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah? Nevertheless in the time of his old age he was diseased in his feet.

chapters.zh: 亚撒与他列祖同睡，葬在他祖大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他儿子约沙法接续他作王。
chapters.en: And Asa slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father: and Jehoshaphat his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒第二年，耶罗波安的儿子拿答登基作以色列王共二年，
chapters.en: And Nadab the son of Jeroboam began to reign over Israel in the second year of Asa king of Judah, and reigned over Israel two years.

chapters.zh: 拿答行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，行他父亲所行的，犯他父亲使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, and walked in the way of his father, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 以萨迦人亚希雅的儿子巴沙背叛拿答，在非利士的基比顿杀了他。那时拿答和以色列众人正围困基比顿。
chapters.en: And Baasha the son of Ahijah, of the house of Issachar, conspired against him; and Baasha smote him at Gibbethon, which to the Philistines; for Nadab and all Israel laid siege to Gibbethon.

chapters.zh: 在犹大王亚撒第三年巴沙杀了他，篡了他的位。
chapters.en: Even in the third year of Asa king of Judah did Baasha slay him, and reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 巴沙一作王就杀了耶罗波安的全家，凡有气息的没有留下一个，都灭尽了，正应验耶和华藉他仆人示罗人亚希雅所说的话。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when he reigned, he smote all the house of Jeroboam; he left not to Jeroboam any that breathed, until he had destroyed him, according unto the saying of the LORD, which he spake by his servant Ahijah the Shilonite:

chapters.zh: 这是因为耶罗波安所犯的罪使以色列人陷在罪里，惹动耶和华 ─ 以色列神的怒气。
chapters.en: Because of the sins of Jeroboam which he sinned, and which he made Israel sin, by his provocation wherewith he provoked the LORD God of Israel to anger.

chapters.zh: 拿答其余的事，凡他所行的，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Nadab, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 亚撒和以色列王巴沙在世的日子常常争战。
chapters.en: And there was war between Asa and Baasha king of Israel all their days.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒第三年，亚希雅的儿子巴沙在得撒登基作以色列众人的王共廿四年。
chapters.en: In the third year of Asa king of Judah began Baasha the son of Ahijah to reign over all Israel in Tirzah, twenty and four years.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，行耶罗波安所行的道，犯他使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, and walked in the way of Jeroboam, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到哈拿尼的儿子耶户，责备巴沙说：
chapters.en: Then the word of the LORD came to Jehu the son of Hanani against Baasha, saying,

chapters.zh: 我既从尘埃中提拔你，立你作我民以色列的君，你竟行耶罗波安所行的道，使我民以色列陷在罪里，惹我发怒，
chapters.en: Forasmuch as I exalted thee out of the dust, and made thee prince over my people Israel; and thou hast walked in the way of Jeroboam, and hast made my people Israel to sin, to provoke me to anger with their sins;

chapters.zh: 我必除尽你和你的家，使你的家像尼八的儿子耶罗波安的家一样。
chapters.en: Behold, I will take away the posterity of Baasha, and the posterity of his house; and will make thy house like the house of Jeroboam the son of Nebat.

chapters.zh: 凡属巴沙的人，死在城中的必被狗吃，死在田野的必被空中的鸟吃。
chapters.en: Him that dieth of Baasha in the city shall the dogs eat; and him that dieth of his in the fields shall the fowls of the air eat.

chapters.zh: 巴沙其余的事，凡他所行的和他的勇力，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Baasha, and what he did, and his might, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 巴沙与他列祖同睡，葬在得撒。他儿子以拉接续他作王。
chapters.en: So Baasha slept with his fathers, and was buried in Tirzah: and Elah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到哈拿尼的儿子先知耶户，责备巴沙和他的家，因他行耶和华眼中看为恶的一切事，以他手所做的惹耶和华发怒，像耶罗波安的家一样，又因他杀了耶罗波安的全家。
chapters.en: And also by the hand of the prophet Jehu the son of Hanani came the word of the LORD against Baasha, and against his house, even for all the evil that he did in the sight of the LORD, in provoking him to anger with the work of his hands, in being like the house of Jeroboam; and because he killed him.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒二十六年，巴沙的儿子以拉在得撒登基作以色列王共二年。
chapters.en: In the twenty and sixth year of Asa king of Judah began Elah the son of Baasha to reign over Israel in Tirzah, two years.

chapters.zh: 有管理他一半战车的臣子心利背叛他。当他在得撒家宰亚杂家里喝醉的时候，
chapters.en: And his servant Zimri, captain of half chariots, conspired against him, as he was in Tirzah, drinking himself drunk in the house of Arza steward of house in Tirzah.

chapters.zh: 心利就进去杀了他，篡了他的位。这是犹大王亚撒二十七年的事。
chapters.en: And Zimri went in and smote him, and killed him, in the twenty and seventh year of Asa king of Judah, and reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 心利一坐王位就杀了巴沙的全家，连他的亲属、朋友也没有留下一个男丁。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when he began to reign, as soon as he sat on his throne, he slew all the house of Baasha: he left him not one that pisseth against a wall, neither of his kinsfolks, nor of his friends.

chapters.zh: 心利这样灭绝巴沙的全家，正如耶和华藉先知耶户责备巴沙的话。
chapters.en: Thus did Zimri destroy all the house of Baasha, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake against Baasha by Jehu the prophet,

chapters.zh: 这是因巴沙和他儿子以拉的一切罪，就是他们使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪，以虚无的神惹耶和华 ─ 以色列神的怒气。
chapters.en: For all the sins of Baasha, and the sins of Elah his son, by which they sinned, and by which they made Israel to sin, in provoking the LORD God of Israel to anger with their vanities.

chapters.zh: 以拉其余的事，凡他所行的，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Elah, and all that he did, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒二十七年，心利在得撒作王七日。那时民正安营围攻非利士的基比顿。
chapters.en: In the twenty and seventh year of Asa king of Judah did Zimri reign seven days in Tirzah. And the people encamped against Gibbethon, which to the Philistines.

chapters.zh: 民在营中听说心利背叛，又杀了王，故此以色列众人当日在营中立元帅暗利作以色列王。
chapters.en: And the people encamped heard say, Zimri hath conspired, and hath also slain the king: wherefore all Israel made Omri, the captain of the host, king over Israel that day in the camp.

chapters.zh: 暗利率领以色列众人，从基比顿上去，围困得撒。
chapters.en: And Omri went up from Gibbethon, and all Israel with him, and they besieged Tirzah.

chapters.zh: 心利见城破失，就进了王宫的卫所，放火焚烧宫殿，自焚而死。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Zimri saw that the city was taken, that he went into the palace of the king's house, and burnt the king's house over him with fire, and died,

chapters.zh: 这是因他犯罪，行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，行耶罗波安所行的，犯他使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪。
chapters.en: For his sins which he sinned in doing evil in the sight of the LORD, in walking in the way of Jeroboam, and in his sin which he did, to make Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 心利其余的事和他背叛的情形都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Zimri, and his treason that he wrought, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 那时，以色列民分为两半：一半随从基纳的儿子提比尼，要立他作王；一半随从暗利。
chapters.en: Then were the people of Israel divided into two parts: half of the people followed Tibni the son of Ginath, to make him king; and half followed Omri.

chapters.zh: 但随从暗利的民胜过随从基纳的儿子提比尼的民。提比尼死了，暗利就作了王。
chapters.en: But the people that followed Omri prevailed against the people that followed Tibni the son of Ginath: so Tibni died, and Omri reigned.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒三十一年，暗利登基作以色列王共十二年；在得撒作王六年。
chapters.en: In the thirty and first year of Asa king of Judah began Omri to reign over Israel, twelve years: six years reigned he in Tirzah.

chapters.zh: 暗利用二他连得银子向撒玛买了撒玛利亚山，在山上造城，就按著山的原主撒玛的名，给所造的城起名叫撒玛利亚。
chapters.en: And he bought the hill Samaria of Shemer for two talents of silver, and built on the hill, and called the name of the city which he built, after the name of Shemer, owner of the hill, Samaria.

chapters.zh: 暗利行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，比他以前的列王作恶更甚。
chapters.en: But Omri wrought evil in the eyes of the LORD, and did worse than all that before him.

chapters.zh: 因他行了尼八的儿子耶罗波安所行的，犯他使以色列人陷在罪里的那罪，以虚无的神惹耶和华 ─ 以色列神的怒气。
chapters.en: For he walked in all the way of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, and in his sin wherewith he made Israel to sin, to provoke the LORD God of Israel to anger with their vanities.

chapters.zh: 暗利其余的事和他所显出的勇力都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Omri which he did, and his might that he shewed, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 暗利与他列祖同睡，葬在撒玛利亚。他儿子亚哈接续他作王。
chapters.en: So Omri slept with his fathers, and was buried in Samaria: and Ahab his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 犹大王亚撒三十八年，暗利的儿子亚哈登基作了以色列王。暗利的儿子亚哈在撒玛利亚作以色列王二十二年。
chapters.en: And in the thirty and eighth year of Asa king of Judah began Ahab the son of Omri to reign over Israel: and Ahab the son of Omri reigned over Israel in Samaria twenty and two years.

chapters.zh: 暗利的儿子亚哈行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，比他以前的列王更甚，
chapters.en: And Ahab the son of Omri did evil in the sight of the LORD above all that before him.

chapters.zh: 犯了尼八的儿子耶罗波安所犯的罪；他还以为轻，又娶了西顿王谒巴力的女儿耶洗别为妻，去事奉敬拜巴力，
chapters.en: And it came to pass, as if it had been a light thing for him to walk in the sins of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, that he took to wife Jezebel the daughter of Ethbaal king of the Zidonians, and went and served Baal, and worshipped him.

chapters.zh: 在撒玛利亚建造巴力的庙，在庙里为巴力筑坛。
chapters.en: And he reared up an altar for Baal in the house of Baal, which he had built in Samaria.

chapters.zh: 亚哈又做亚舍拉，他所行的惹耶和华 ─ 以色列神的怒气，比他以前的以色列诸王更甚。
chapters.en: And Ahab made a grove; and Ahab did more to provoke the LORD God of Israel to anger than all the kings of Israel that were before him.

chapters.zh: 亚哈在位的时候，有伯特利人希伊勒重修耶利哥城；立根基的时候，丧了长子亚比兰；安门的时候，丧了幼子西割，正如耶和华藉嫩的儿子约书亚所说的话。
chapters.en: In his days did Hiel the Bethelite build Jericho: he laid the foundation thereof in Abiram his firstborn, and set up the gates thereof in his youngest Segub, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake by Joshua the son of Nun.

chapters.zh: 基列寄居的提斯比人以利亚对亚哈说：我指著所事奉永生耶和华 ─ 以色列的神起誓，这几年我若不祷告，必不降露，不下雨。
chapters.en: And Elijah the Tishbite, of the inhabitants of Gilead, said unto Ahab, the LORD God of Israel liveth, before whom I stand, there shall not be dew nor rain these years, but according to my word.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到以利亚说：
chapters.en: And the word of the LORD came unto him, saying,

chapters.zh: 你离开这里往东去，藏在约但河东边的基立溪旁。
chapters.en: Get thee hence, and turn thee eastward, and hide thyself by the brook Cherith, that before Jordan.

chapters.zh: 你要喝那溪里的水，我已吩咐乌鸦在那里供养你。
chapters.en: And it shall be, thou shalt drink of the brook; and I have commanded the ravens to feed thee there.

chapters.zh: 于是以利亚照著耶和华的话，去住在约但河东的基立溪旁。
chapters.en: So he went and did according unto the word of the LORD: for he went and dwelt by the brook Cherith, that before Jordan.

chapters.zh: 乌鸦早晚给他叼饼和肉来，他也喝那溪里的水。
chapters.en: And the ravens brought him bread and flesh in the morning, and bread and flesh in the evening; and he drank of the brook.

chapters.zh: 过了些日子，溪水就干了，因为雨没有下在地上。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after a while, that the brook dried up, because there had been no rain in the land.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到他说：
chapters.en: And the word of the LORD came unto him, saying,

chapters.zh: 你起身往西顿的撒勒法 ( 撒勒法与路四26同 ) 去，住在那里；我已吩咐那里的一个寡妇供养你。
chapters.en: Arise, get thee to Zarephath, which to Zidon, and dwell there: behold, I have commanded a widow woman there to sustain thee.

chapters.zh: 以利亚就起身往撒勒法去。到了城门，见有一个寡妇在那里捡柴，以利亚呼叫他说：求你用器皿取点水来给我喝。
chapters.en: So he arose and went to Zarephath. And when he came to the gate of the city, behold, the widow woman there gathering of sticks: and he called to her, and said, Fetch me, I pray thee, a little water in a vessel, that I may drink.

chapters.zh: 他去取水的时候，以利亚又呼叫他说：也求你拿点饼来给我！
chapters.en: And as she was going to fetch , he called to her, and said, Bring me, I pray thee, a morsel of bread in thine hand.

chapters.zh: 他说：我指著永生耶和华 ─ 你的神起誓，我没有饼，坛内只有一把面，瓶里只有一点油；我现在找两根柴，回家要为我和我儿子做饼；我们吃了，死就死罢！
chapters.en: And she said, the LORD thy God liveth, I have not a cake, but an handful of meal in a barrel, and a little oil in a cruse: and, behold, I gathering two sticks, that I may go in and dress it for me and my son, that we may eat it, and die.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对他说：不要惧怕！可以照你所说的去做罢！只要先为我做一个小饼拿来给我，然后为你和你的儿子做饼。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto her, Fear not; go do as thou hast said: but make me thereof a little cake first, and bring unto me, and after make for thee and for thy son.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：坛内的面必不减少，瓶里的油必不缺短，直到耶和华使雨降在地上的日子。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD God of Israel, The barrel of meal shall not waste, neither shall the cruse of oil fail, until the day the LORD sendeth rain upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 妇人就照以利亚的话去行。他和他家中的人，并以利亚，吃了许多日子。
chapters.en: And she went and did according to the saying of Elijah: and she, and he, and her house, did eat days.

chapters.zh: 坛内的面果不减少，瓶里的油也不缺短，正如耶和华藉以利亚所说的话。
chapters.en: the barrel of meal wasted not, neither did the cruse of oil fail, according to the word of the LORD, which he spake by Elijah.

chapters.zh: 这事以后，作那家主母的妇人，他儿子病了；病得甚重，以致身无气息。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after these things, the son of the woman, the mistress of the house, fell sick; and his sickness was so sore, that there was no breath left in him.

chapters.zh: 妇人对以利亚说：神人哪，我与你何干？你竟到我这里来，使神想念我的罪，以致我的儿子死呢？
chapters.en: And she said unto Elijah, What have I to do with thee, O thou man of God? art thou come unto me to call my sin to remembrance, and to slay my son?

chapters.zh: 以利亚对他说：把你儿子交给我。以利亚就从妇人怀中将孩子接过来，抱到他所住的楼中，放在自己的床上，
chapters.en: And he said unto her, Give me thy son. And he took him out of her bosom, and carried him up into a loft, where he abode, and laid him upon his own bed.

chapters.zh: 就求告耶和华说：耶和华 ─ 我的神啊，我寄居在这寡妇的家里，你就降祸与他，使他的儿子死了么？
chapters.en: And he cried unto the LORD, and said, O LORD my God, hast thou also brought evil upon the widow with whom I sojourn, by slaying her son?

chapters.zh: 以利亚三次伏在孩子的身上，求告耶和华说：耶和华 ─ 我的神啊，求你使这孩子的灵魂仍入他的身体！
chapters.en: And he stretched himself upon the child three times, and cried unto the LORD, and said, O LORD my God, I pray thee, let this child's soul come into him again.

chapters.zh: 耶和华应允以利亚的话，孩子的灵魂仍入他的身体，他就活了。
chapters.en: And the LORD heard the voice of Elijah; and the soul of the child came into him again, and he revived.

chapters.zh: 以利亚将孩子从楼上抱下来，进屋子交给他母亲，说：看哪，你的儿子活了！
chapters.en: And Elijah took the child, and brought him down out of the chamber into the house, and delivered him unto his mother: and Elijah said, See, thy son liveth.

chapters.zh: 妇人对以利亚说：现在我知道你是神人，耶和华藉你口所说的话是真的。
chapters.en: And the woman said to Elijah, Now by this I know that thou a man of God, that the word of the LORD in thy mouth truth.

chapters.zh: 过了许久，到第三年，耶和华的话临到以利亚说：你去，使亚哈得见你；我要降雨在地上。
chapters.en: And it came to pass many days, that the word of the LORD came to Elijah in the third year, saying, Go, shew thyself unto Ahab; and I will send rain upon the earth.

chapters.zh: 以利亚就去，要使亚哈得见他。那时，撒玛利亚有大饥荒；
chapters.en: And Elijah went to shew himself unto Ahab. And a sore famine in Samaria.

chapters.zh: 亚哈将他的家宰俄巴底召了来。〈 俄巴底甚是敬畏耶和华，
chapters.en: And Ahab called Obadiah, which the governor of house. (Now Obadiah feared the LORD greatly:

chapters.zh: 耶洗别杀耶和华众先知的时候，俄巴底将一百个先知藏了，每五十人藏在一个洞里，拿饼和水供养他们。〉
chapters.en: For it was , when Jezebel cut off the prophets of the LORD, that Obadiah took an hundred prophets, and hid them by fifty in a cave, and fed them with bread and water.)

chapters.zh: 亚哈对俄巴底说：我们走遍这地，到一切水泉旁和一切溪边，或者找得著青草，可以救活骡马，免得绝了牲畜。
chapters.en: And Ahab said unto Obadiah, Go into the land, unto all fountains of water, and unto all brooks: peradventure we may find grass to save the horses and mules alive, that we lose not all the beasts.

chapters.zh: 于是二人分地游行，亚哈独走一路，俄巴底独走一路。
chapters.en: So they divided the land between them to pass throughout it: Ahab went one way by himself, and Obadiah went another way by himself.

chapters.zh: 俄巴底在路上恰与以利亚相遇，俄巴底认出他来，就俯伏在地，说：你是我主以利亚不是？
chapters.en: And as Obadiah was in the way, behold, Elijah met him: and he knew him, and fell on his face, and said, thou that my lord Elijah?

chapters.zh: 回答说：是。你去告诉你主人说，以利亚在这里。
chapters.en: And he answered him, I : go, tell thy lord, Behold, Elijah .

chapters.zh: 俄巴底说：仆人有甚么罪，你竟要将我交在亚哈手里，使他杀我呢？
chapters.en: And he said, What have I sinned, that thou wouldest deliver thy servant into the hand of Ahab, to slay me?

chapters.zh: 我指著永生耶和华 ─ 你的神起誓，无论哪一邦哪一国，我主都打发人去找你。若说你没有在那里，就必使那邦那国的人起誓说，实在是找不著你。
chapters.en: the LORD thy God liveth, there is no nation or kingdom, whither my lord hath not sent to seek thee: and when they said, not ; he took an oath of the kingdom and nation, that they found thee not.

chapters.zh: 现在你说，要去告诉你主人说，以利亚在这里；
chapters.en: And now thou sayest, Go, tell thy lord, Behold, Elijah .

chapters.zh: 恐怕我一离开你，耶和华的灵就提你到我所不知道的地方去。这样，我去告诉亚哈，他若找不著你，就必杀我；仆人却是自幼敬畏耶和华的。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, I am gone from thee, that the Spirit of the LORD shall carry thee whither I know not; and when I come and tell Ahab, and he cannot find thee, he shall slay me: but I thy servant fear the LORD from my youth.

chapters.zh: 耶洗别杀耶和华众先知的时候，我将耶和华的一百个先知藏了，每五十人藏在一个洞里，拿饼和水供养他们，岂没有人将这事告诉我主么？
chapters.en: Was it not told my lord what I did when Jezebel slew the prophets of the LORD, how I hid an hundred men of the LORD'S prophets by fifty in a cave, and fed them with bread and water?

chapters.zh: 现在你说，要去告诉你主人说，以利亚在这里，他必杀我。
chapters.en: And now thou sayest, Go, tell thy lord, Behold, Elijah : and he shall slay me.

chapters.zh: 以利亚说：我指著所事奉永生的万军之耶和华起誓，我今日必使亚哈得见我。
chapters.en: And Elijah said, the LORD of hosts liveth, before whom I stand, I will surely shew myself unto him to day.

chapters.zh: 于是俄巴底去迎著亚哈，告诉他；亚哈就去迎著以利亚。
chapters.en: So Obadiah went to meet Ahab, and told him: and Ahab went to meet Elijah.

chapters.zh: 亚哈见了以利亚，便说：使以色列遭灾的就是你么？
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Ahab saw Elijah, that Ahab said unto him, thou he that troubleth Israel?

chapters.zh: 以利亚说：使以色列遭灾的不是我，乃是你和你父家；因为你们离弃耶和华的诫命，去随从巴力。
chapters.en: And he answered, I have not troubled Israel; but thou, and thy father's house, in that ye have forsaken the commandments of the LORD, and thou hast followed Baalim.

chapters.zh: 现在你当差遣人，招聚以色列众人和事奉巴力的那四百五十个先知，并耶洗别所供养事奉亚舍拉的那四百个先知，使他们都上迦密山去见我。
chapters.en: Now therefore send, gather to me all Israel unto mount Carmel, and the prophets of Baal four hundred and fifty, and the prophets of the groves four hundred, which eat at Jezebel's table.

chapters.zh: 亚哈就差遣人招聚以色列众人和先知都上迦密山。
chapters.en: So Ahab sent unto all the children of Israel, and gathered the prophets together unto mount Carmel.

chapters.zh: 以利亚前来对众民说：你们心持两意要到几时呢？若耶和华是神，就当顺从耶和华；若巴力是神，就当顺从巴力。众民一言不答。
chapters.en: And Elijah came unto all the people, and said, How long halt ye between two opinions? if the LORD God, follow him: but if Baal, follow him. And the people answered him not a word.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对众民说：作耶和华先知的只剩下我一个人；巴力的先知却有四百五十个人。
chapters.en: Then said Elijah unto the people, I, I only, remain a prophet of the LORD; but Baal's prophets four hundred and fifty men.

chapters.zh: 当给我们两只牛犊，巴力的先知可以挑选一只，切成块子，放在柴上，不要点火；我也预备一只牛犊放在柴上，也不点火。
chapters.en: Let them therefore give us two bullocks; and let them choose one bullock for themselves, and cut it in pieces, and lay on wood, and put no fire : and I will dress the other bullock, and lay on wood, and put no fire :

chapters.zh: 你们求告你们神的名，我也求告耶和华的名。那降火显应的神，就是神。众民回答说：这话甚好。
chapters.en: And call ye on the name of your gods, and I will call on the name of the LORD: and the God that answereth by fire, let him be God. And all the people answered and said, It is well spoken.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对巴力的先知说：你们既是人多，当先挑选一只牛犊，预备好了，就求告你们神的名，却不要点火。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto the prophets of Baal, Choose you one bullock for yourselves, and dress first; for ye many; and call on the name of your gods, but put no fire .

chapters.zh: 他们将所得的牛犊预备好了，从早晨到午间，求告巴力的名说：巴力啊，求你应允我们！却没有声音，没有应允的。他们在所筑的坛四围踊跳。
chapters.en: And they took the bullock which was given them, and they dressed , and called on the name of Baal from morning even until noon, saying, O Baal, hear us. But no voice, nor any that answered. And they leaped upon the altar which was made.

chapters.zh: 到了正午，以利亚嬉笑他们，说：大声求告罢！因为他是神，他或默想，或走到一边，或行路，或睡觉，你们当叫醒他。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at noon, that Elijah mocked them, and said, Cry aloud: for he a god; either he is talking, or he is pursuing, or he is in a journey, peradventure he sleepeth, and must be awaked.

chapters.zh: 他们大声求告，按著他们的规矩，用刀枪自割、自刺，直到身体流血。
chapters.en: And they cried aloud, and cut themselves after their manner with knives and lancets, till the blood gushed out upon them.

chapters.zh: 从午后直到献晚祭的时候，他们狂呼乱叫，却没有声音，没有应允的，也没有理会的。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when midday was past, and they prophesied until the of the offering of the sacrifice, that neither voice, nor any to answer, nor any that regarded.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对众民说：你们到我这里来。众民就到他那里。他便重修已经毁坏耶和华的坛。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto all the people, Come near unto me. And all the people came near unto him. And he repaired the altar of the LORD broken down.

chapters.zh: 以利亚照雅各子孙支派的数目，取了十二块石头（耶和华的话曾临到雅各说：你的名要叫以色列），
chapters.en: And Elijah took twelve stones, according to the number of the tribes of the sons of Jacob, unto whom the word of the LORD came, saying, Israel shall be thy name:

chapters.zh: 用这些石头为耶和华的名筑一座坛，在坛的四围挖沟，可容谷种二细亚，
chapters.en: And with the stones he built an altar in the name of the LORD: and he made a trench about the altar, as great as would contain two measures of seed.

chapters.zh: 又在坛上摆好了柴，把牛犊切成块子放在柴上，对众人说：你们用四个桶盛满水，倒在燔祭和柴上；
chapters.en: And he put the wood in order, and cut the bullock in pieces, and laid on the wood, and said, Fill four barrels with water, and pour on the burnt sacrifice, and on the wood.

chapters.zh: 又说：倒第二次。他们就倒第二次；又说：倒第三次。他们就倒第三次。
chapters.en: And he said, Do the second time. And they did the second time. And he said, Do the third time. And they did the third time.

chapters.zh: 水流在坛的四围，沟里也满了水。
chapters.en: And the water ran round about the altar; and he filled the trench also with water.

chapters.zh: 到了献晚祭的时候，先知以利亚近前来，说：亚伯拉罕、以撒、以色列的神，耶和华啊，求你今日使人知道你是以色列的神，也知道我是你的仆人，又是奉你的命行这一切事。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the offering of the sacrifice, that Elijah the prophet came near, and said, LORD God of Abraham, Isaac, and of Israel, let it be known this day that thou God in Israel, and I thy servant, and I have done all these things at thy word.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你应允我，应允我！使这民知道你 ─ 耶和华是神，又知道是你叫这民的心回转。
chapters.en: Hear me, O LORD, hear me, that this people may know that thou the LORD God, and thou hast turned their heart back again.

chapters.zh: 于是，耶和华降下火来，烧尽燔祭、木柴、石头、尘土，又烧干沟里的水。
chapters.en: Then the fire of the LORD fell, and consumed the burnt sacrifice, and the wood, and the stones, and the dust, and licked up the water that in the trench.

chapters.zh: 众民看见了，就俯伏在地，说：耶和华是神！耶和华是神！
chapters.en: And when all the people saw , they fell on their faces: and they said, The LORD, he the God; the LORD, he the God.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对他们说：拿住巴力的先知，不容一人逃脱！众人就拿住他们。以利亚带他们到基顺河边，在那里杀了他们。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto them, Take the prophets of Baal; let not one of them escape. And they took them: and Elijah brought them down to the brook Kishon, and slew them there.

chapters.zh: 以利亚对亚哈说：你现在可以上去吃喝，因为有多雨的响声了。
chapters.en: And Elijah said unto Ahab, Get thee up, eat and drink; for a sound of abundance of rain.

chapters.zh: 亚哈就上去吃喝。以利亚上了迦密山顶，屈身在地，将脸伏在两膝之中；
chapters.en: So Ahab went up to eat and to drink. And Elijah went up to the top of Carmel; and he cast himself down upon the earth, and put his face between his knees,

chapters.zh: 对仆人说：你上去，向海观看。仆人就上去观看，说：没有甚么。他说：你再去观看。如此七次。
chapters.en: And said to his servant, Go up now, look toward the sea. And he went up, and looked, and said, nothing. And he said, Go again seven times.

chapters.zh: 第七次仆人说：我看见有一小片云从海里上来，不过如人手那样大。以利亚说：你上去告诉亚哈，当套车下去，免得被雨阻挡。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the seventh time, that he said, Behold, there ariseth a little cloud out of the sea, like a man's hand. And he said, Go up, say unto Ahab, Prepare , and get thee down, that the rain stop thee not.

chapters.zh: 霎时间，天因风云黑暗，降下大雨。亚哈就坐车往耶斯列去了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the mean while, that the heaven was black with clouds and wind, and there was a great rain. And Ahab rode, and went to Jezreel.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的灵 ( 原文是手 ) 降在以利亚身上，他就束上腰，奔在亚哈前头，直到耶斯列的城门。
chapters.en: And the hand of the LORD was on Elijah; and he girded up his loins, and ran before Ahab to the entrance of Jezreel.

chapters.zh: 亚哈将以利亚一切所行的和他用刀杀众先知的事都告诉耶洗别。
chapters.en: And Ahab told Jezebel all that Elijah had done, and withal how he had slain all the prophets with the sword.

chapters.zh: 耶洗别就差遣人去见以利亚，告诉他说：明日约在这时候，我若不使你的性命像那些人的性命一样，愿神明重重地降罚与我。
chapters.en: Then Jezebel sent a messenger unto Elijah, saying, So let the gods do , and more also, if I make not thy life as the life of one of them by to morrow about this time.

chapters.zh: 以利亚见这光景就起来逃命，到了犹大的别是巴，将仆人留在那里，
chapters.en: And when he saw , he arose, and went for his life, and came to Beersheba, which to Judah, and left his servant there.

chapters.zh: 自己在旷野走了一日的路程，来到一棵罗腾 ( 小树名，松类；下同 ) 树下，就坐在那里求死，说：耶和华啊，罢了！求你取我的性命，因为我不胜于我的列祖。
chapters.en: But he himself went a day's journey into the wilderness, and came and sat down under a juniper tree: and he requested for himself that he might die; and said, It is enough; now, O LORD, take away my life; for I not better than my fathers.

chapters.zh: 他就躺在罗腾树下，睡著了。有一个天使拍他，说：起来吃罢！
chapters.en: And as he lay and slept under a juniper tree, behold, then an angel touched him, and said unto him, Arise eat.

chapters.zh: 他观看，见头旁有一瓶水与炭火烧的饼，他就吃了喝了，仍然躺下。
chapters.en: And he looked, and, behold, a cake baken on the coals, and a cruse of water at his head. And he did eat and drink, and laid him down again.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的使者第二次来拍他，说：起来吃罢！因为你当走的路甚远。
chapters.en: And the angel of the LORD came again the second time, and touched him, and said, Arise eat; because the journey too great for thee.

chapters.zh: 他就起来吃了喝了，仗著这饮食的力，走了四十昼夜，到了神的山，就是何烈山。
chapters.en: And he arose, and did eat and drink, and went in the strength of that meat forty days and forty nights unto Horeb the mount of God.

chapters.zh: 他在那里进了一个洞，就住在洞中。耶和华的话临到他说：以利亚啊，你在这里做甚么？
chapters.en: And he came thither unto a cave, and lodged there; and, behold, the word of the LORD to him, and he said unto him, What doest thou here, Elijah?

chapters.zh: 他说：我为耶和华 ─ 万军之神大发热心；因为以色列人背弃了你的约，毁坏了你的坛，用刀杀了你的先知，只剩下我一个人，他们还要寻索我的命。
chapters.en: And he said, I have been very jealous for the LORD God of hosts: for the children of Israel have forsaken thy covenant, thrown down thine altars, and slain thy prophets with the sword; and I, I only, am left; and they seek my life, to take it away.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：你出来站在山上，在我面前。那时耶和华从那里经过，在他面前有烈风大作，崩山碎石，耶和华却不在风中；风后地震，耶和华却不在其中；
chapters.en: And he said, Go forth, and stand upon the mount before the LORD. And, behold, the LORD passed by, and a great and strong wind rent the mountains, and brake in pieces the rocks before the LORD; the LORD not in the wind: and after the wind an earthquake; the LORD not in the earthquake:

chapters.zh: 地震后有火，耶和华也不在火中；火后有微小的声音。
chapters.en: And after the earthquake a fire; the LORD not in the fire: and after the fire a still small voice.

chapters.zh: 以利亚听见，就用外衣蒙上脸，出来站在洞口。有声音向他说：以利亚啊，你在这里做甚么？
chapters.en: And it was , when Elijah heard , that he wrapped his face in his mantle, and went out, and stood in the entering in of the cave. And, behold, a voice unto him, and said, What doest thou here, Elijah?

chapters.zh: 他说：我为耶和华 ─ 万军之神大发热心；因为以色列人背弃了你的约，毁坏了你的坛，用刀杀了你的先知，只剩下我一个人，他们还要寻索我的命。
chapters.en: And he said, I have been very jealous for the LORD God of hosts: because the children of Israel have forsaken thy covenant, thrown down thine altars, and slain thy prophets with the sword; and I, I only, am left; and they seek my life, to take it away.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对他说：你回去，从旷野往大马色去。到了那里，就要膏哈薛作亚兰王，
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto him, Go, return on thy way to the wilderness of Damascus: and when thou comest, anoint Hazael king over Syria:

chapters.zh: 又膏宁示的孙子耶户作以色列王，并膏亚伯米何拉人沙法的儿子以利沙作先知接续你。
chapters.en: And Jehu the son of Nimshi shalt thou anoint king over Israel: and Elisha the son of Shaphat of Abelmeholah shalt thou anoint prophet in thy room.

chapters.zh: 将来躲避哈薛之刀的，必被耶户所杀；躲避耶户之刀的，必被以利沙所杀。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, him that escapeth the sword of Hazael shall Jehu slay: and him that escapeth from the sword of Jehu shall Elisha slay.

chapters.zh: 但我在以色列人中为自己留下七千人，是未曾向巴力屈膝的，未曾与巴力亲嘴的。
chapters.en: Yet I have left seven thousand in Israel, all the knees which have not bowed unto Baal, and every mouth which hath not kissed him.

chapters.zh: 于是，以利亚离开那里走了，遇见沙法的儿子以利沙耕地；在他前头有十二对牛，自己赶著第十二对。以利亚到他那里去，将自己的外衣搭在他身上。
chapters.en: So he departed thence, and found Elisha the son of Shaphat, who plowing twelve yoke before him, and he with the twelfth: and Elijah passed by him, and cast his mantle upon him.

chapters.zh: 以利沙就离开牛，跑到以利亚那里，说：求你容我先与父母亲嘴，然后我便跟随你。以利亚对他说：你回去罢，我向你做了甚么呢？
chapters.en: And he left the oxen, and ran after Elijah, and said, Let me, I pray thee, kiss my father and my mother, and I will follow thee. And he said unto him, Go back again: for what have I done to thee?

chapters.zh: 以利沙就离开他回去，宰了一对牛，用套牛的器具煮肉给民吃，随后就起身跟随以利亚，服事他。
chapters.en: And he returned back from him, and took a yoke of oxen, and slew them, and boiled their flesh with the instruments of the oxen, and gave unto the people, and they did eat. Then he arose, and went after Elijah, and ministered unto him.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王便哈达聚集他的全军，率领三十二个王，带著车马上来围攻撒玛利亚；
chapters.en: And Benhadad the king of Syria gathered all his host together: and thirty and two kings with him, and horses, and chariots: and he went up and besieged Samaria, and warred against it.

chapters.zh: 又差遣使者进城见以色列王亚哈，对他说：便哈达如此说：
chapters.en: And he sent messengers to Ahab king of Israel into the city, and said unto him, Thus saith Benhadad,

chapters.zh: 你的金银都要归我，你妻子儿女中最美的也要归我。
chapters.en: Thy silver and thy gold mine; thy wives also and thy children, the goodliest, mine.

chapters.zh: 以色列王回答说：我主我王啊，可以依著你的话，我与我所有的都归你。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel answered and said, My lord, O king, according to thy saying, I thine, and all that I have.

chapters.zh: 使者又来说：便哈达如此说：我已差遣人去见你，要你将你的金银、妻子、儿女都给我。
chapters.en: And the messengers came again, and said, Thus speaketh Benhadad, saying, Although I have sent unto thee, saying, Thou shalt deliver me thy silver, and thy gold, and thy wives, and thy children;

chapters.zh: 但明日约在这时候，我还要差遣臣仆到你那里，搜查你的家和你仆人的家，将你眼中一切所喜爱的都拿了去。
chapters.en: Yet I will send my servants unto thee to morrow about this time, and they shall search thine house, and the houses of thy servants; and it shall be, whatsoever is pleasant in thine eyes, they shall put in their hand, and take away.

chapters.zh: 以色列王召了国中的长老来，对他们说：请你们看看，这人是怎样地谋害我，他先差遣人到我这里来，要我的妻子、儿女，和金银，我并没有推辞他。
chapters.en: Then the king of Israel called all the elders of the land, and said, Mark, I pray you, and see how this seeketh mischief: for he sent unto me for my wives, and for my children, and for my silver, and for my gold; and I denied him not.

chapters.zh: 长老和百姓对王说：不要听从他，也不要应允他。
chapters.en: And all the elders and all the people said unto him, Hearken not , nor consent.

chapters.zh: 故此，以色列王对便哈达的使者说：你们告诉我主我王说：王头一次差遣人向仆人所要的，仆人都依从；但这次所要的，我不能依从。使者就去回覆便哈达。
chapters.en: Wherefore he said unto the messengers of Benhadad, Tell my lord the king, All that thou didst send for to thy servant at the first I will do: but this thing I may not do. And the messengers departed, and brought him word again.

chapters.zh: 便哈达又差遣人去见亚哈说：撒玛利亚的尘土若够跟从我的人每人捧一捧的，愿神明重重地降罚与我！
chapters.en: And Benhadad sent unto him, and said, The gods do so unto me, and more also, if the dust of Samaria shall suffice for handfuls for all the people that follow me.

chapters.zh: 以色列王说：你告诉他说，才顶盔贯甲的，休要像摘盔卸甲的夸口。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel answered and said, Tell , Let not him that girdeth on boast himself as he that putteth it off.

chapters.zh: 便哈达和诸王正在帐幕里喝酒，听见这话，就对他臣仆说：摆队罢！他们就摆队攻城。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when heard this message, as he drinking, he and the kings in the pavilions, that he said unto his servants, Set . And they set against the city.

chapters.zh: 有一个先知来见以色列王亚哈，说：耶和华如此说：这一大群人你看见了么？今日我必将他们交在你手里，你就知道我是耶和华。
chapters.en: And, behold, there came a prophet unto Ahab king of Israel, saying, Thus saith the LORD, Hast thou seen all this great multitude? behold, I will deliver it into thine hand this day; and thou shalt know that I the LORD.

chapters.zh: 亚哈说：藉著谁呢？他回答说：耶和华说，藉著跟从省长的少年人。亚哈说：要谁率领呢？他说：要你亲自率领。
chapters.en: And Ahab said, By whom? And he said, Thus saith the LORD, by the young men of the princes of the provinces. Then he said, Who shall order the battle? And he answered, Thou.

chapters.zh: 于是亚哈数点跟从省长的少年人，共有二百三十二名，后又数点以色列的众兵，共有七千名。
chapters.en: Then he numbered the young men of the princes of the provinces, and they were two hundred and thirty two: and after them he numbered all the people, all the children of Israel, seven thousand.

chapters.zh: 午间，他们就出城；便哈达和帮助他的三十二个王正在帐幕里痛饮。
chapters.en: And they went out at noon. But Benhadad drinking himself drunk in the pavilions, he and the kings, the thirty and two kings that helped him.

chapters.zh: 跟从省长的少年人先出城；便哈达差遣人去探望，他们回报说：有人从撒玛利亚出来了。
chapters.en: And the young men of the princes of the provinces went out first; and Benhadad sent out, and they told him, saying, There are men come out of Samaria.

chapters.zh: 他说：他们若为讲和出来，要活捉他们；若为打仗出来，也要活捉他们。
chapters.en: And he said, Whether they be come out for peace, take them alive; or whether they be come out for war, take them alive.

chapters.zh: 跟从省长的少年人出城，军兵跟随他们；
chapters.en: So these young men of the princes of the provinces came out of the city, and the army which followed them.

chapters.zh: 各人遇见敌人就杀。亚兰人逃跑，以色列人追赶他们；亚兰王便哈达骑著马和马兵一同逃跑。
chapters.en: And they slew every one his man: and the Syrians fled; and Israel pursued them: and Benhadad the king of Syria escaped on an horse with the horsemen.

chapters.zh: 以色列王出城攻打车马，大大击杀亚兰人。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel went out, and smote the horses and chariots, and slew the Syrians with a great slaughter.

chapters.zh: 那先知来见以色列王，对他说：你当自强，留心怎样防备；因为到明年这时候，亚兰王必上来攻击你。
chapters.en: And the prophet came to the king of Israel, and said unto him, Go, strengthen thyself, and mark, and see what thou doest: for at the return of the year the king of Syria will come up against thee.

chapters.zh: 亚兰王的臣仆对亚兰王说：以色列人的神是山神，所以他们胜过我们；但在平原与他们打仗，我们必定得胜。
chapters.en: And the servants of the king of Syria said unto him, Their gods gods of the hills; therefore they were stronger than we; but let us fight against them in the plain, and surely we shall be stronger than they.

chapters.zh: 王当这样行：把诸王革去，派军长代替他们，
chapters.en: And do this thing, Take the kings away, every man out of his place, and put captains in their rooms:

chapters.zh: 又照著王丧失军兵之数，再招募一军，马补马，车补车，我们在平原与他们打仗，必定得胜。王便听臣仆的话去行。
chapters.en: And number thee an army, like the army that thou hast lost, horse for horse, and chariot for chariot: and we will fight against them in the plain, surely we shall be stronger than they. And he hearkened unto their voice, and did so.

chapters.zh: 次年，便哈达果然点齐亚兰人上亚弗去，要与以色列人打仗。
chapters.en: And it came to pass at the return of the year, that Benhadad numbered the Syrians, and went up to Aphek, to fight against Israel.

chapters.zh: 以色列人也点齐军兵，预备食物，迎著亚兰人出去，对著他们安营，好像两小群山羊羔；亚兰人却满了地面。
chapters.en: And the children of Israel were numbered, and were all present, and went against them: and the children of Israel pitched before them like two little flocks of kids; but the Syrians filled the country.

chapters.zh: 有神人来见以色列王，说：耶和华如此说：亚兰人既说我 ─ 耶和华是山神，不是平原的神，所以我必将这一大群人都交在你手中，你们就知道我是耶和华。
chapters.en: And there came a man of God, and spake unto the king of Israel, and said, Thus saith the LORD, Because the Syrians have said, The LORD God of the hills, but he not God of the valleys, therefore will I deliver all this great multitude into thine hand, and ye shall know that I the LORD.

chapters.zh: 以色列人与亚兰人相对安营七日，到第七日两军交战；那一日以色列人杀了亚兰人步兵十万，
chapters.en: And they pitched one over against the other seven days. And it was, that in the seventh day the battle was joined: and the children of Israel slew of the Syrians an hundred thousand footmen in one day.

chapters.zh: 其余的逃入亚弗城；城墙塌倒，压死剩下的二万七千人。便哈达也逃入城，藏在严密的屋子里。
chapters.en: But the rest fled to Aphek, into the city; and a wall fell upon twenty and seven thousand of the men left. And Benhadad fled, and came into the city, into an inner chamber.

chapters.zh: 他的臣仆对他说：我们听说以色列王都是仁慈的王，现在我们不如腰束麻布，头套绳索，出去投降以色列王，或者他存留王的性命。
chapters.en: And his servants said unto him, Behold now, we have heard that the kings of the house of Israel merciful kings: let us, I pray thee, put sackcloth on our loins, and ropes upon our heads, and go out to the king of Israel: peradventure he will save thy life.

chapters.zh: 于是他们腰束麻布，头套绳索，去见以色列王，说：王的仆人便哈达说，求王存留我的性命。亚哈说：他还活著么？他是我的兄弟。
chapters.en: So they girded sackcloth on their loins, and ropes on their heads, and came to the king of Israel, and said, Thy servant Benhadad saith, I pray thee, let me live. And he said, he yet alive? he my brother.

chapters.zh: 这些人留心探出他的口气来，便急忙就著他的话说：便哈达是王的兄弟！王说：你们去请他来。便哈达出来见王，王就请他上车。
chapters.en: Now the men did diligently observe whether from him, and did hastily catch : and they said, Thy brother Benhadad. Then he said, Go ye, bring him. Then Benhadad came forth to him; and he caused him to come up into the chariot.

chapters.zh: 便哈达对王说：我父从你父那里所夺的城邑，我必归还。你可以在大马色立街市，像我父在撒玛利亚所立的一样。亚哈说：我照此立约，放你回去，就与他立约，放他去了。
chapters.en: And said unto him, The cities, which my father took from thy father, I will restore; and thou shalt make streets for thee in Damascus, as my father made in Samaria. Then , I will send thee away with this covenant. So he made a covenant with him, and sent him away.

chapters.zh: 有先知的一个门徒奉耶和华的命对他的同伴说：你打我罢！那人不肯打他。
chapters.en: And a certain man of the sons of the prophets said unto his neighbour in the word of the LORD, Smite me, I pray thee. And the man refused to smite him.

chapters.zh: 他就对那人说：你既不听从耶和华的话，你一离开我，必有狮子咬死你。那人一离开他，果然遇见狮子，把他咬死了。
chapters.en: Then said he unto him, Because thou hast not obeyed the voice of the LORD, behold, as soon as thou art departed from me, a lion shall slay thee. And as soon as he was departed from him, a lion found him, and slew him.

chapters.zh: 先知的门徒又遇见一个人，对他说：你打我罢！那人就打他，将他打伤。
chapters.en: Then he found another man, and said, Smite me, I pray thee. And the man smote him, so that in smiting he wounded .

chapters.zh: 他就去了，用头巾蒙眼，改换面目，在路旁等候王。
chapters.en: So the prophet departed, and waited for the king by the way, and disguised himself with ashes upon his face.

chapters.zh: 王从那里经过，他向王呼叫说：仆人在阵上的时候，有人带了一个人来，对我说：你看守这人，若把他失了，你的性命必代替他的性命；不然，你必交出一他连得银子来。
chapters.en: And as the king passed by, he cried unto the king: and he said, Thy servant went out into the midst of the battle; and, behold, a man turned aside, and brought a man unto me, and said, Keep this man: if by any means he be missing, then shall thy life be for his life, or else thou shalt pay a talent of silver.

chapters.zh: 仆人正在忙乱之间，那人就不见了。以色列王对他说：你自己定妥了，必照样判断你。
chapters.en: And as thy servant was busy here and there, he was gone. And the king of Israel said unto him, So thy judgment ; thyself hast decided .

chapters.zh: 他急忙除掉蒙眼的头巾，以色列王就认出他是一个先知。
chapters.en: And he hasted, and took the ashes away from his face; and the king of Israel discerned him that he of the prophets.

chapters.zh: 他对王说：耶和华如此说：因你将我定要灭绝的人放去，你的命就必代替他的命，你的民也必代替他的民。
chapters.en: And he said unto him, Thus saith the LORD, Because thou hast let go out of hand a man whom I appointed to utter destruction, therefore thy life shall go for his life, and thy people for his people.

chapters.zh: 于是以色列王闷闷不乐地回到撒玛利亚，进了他的宫。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel went to his house heavy and displeased, and came to Samaria.

chapters.zh: 这事以后，又有一事。耶斯列人拿伯在耶斯列有一个葡萄园，靠近撒玛利亚王亚哈的宫。
chapters.en: And it came to pass after these things, Naboth the Jezreelite had a vineyard, which in Jezreel, hard by the palace of Ahab king of Samaria.

chapters.zh: 亚哈对拿伯说：你将你的葡萄园给我作菜园，因为是靠近我的宫；我就把更好的葡萄园换给你，或是你要银子，我就按著价值给你。
chapters.en: And Ahab spake unto Naboth, saying, Give me thy vineyard, that I may have it for a garden of herbs, because it near unto my house: and I will give thee for it a better vineyard than it; , if it seem good to thee, I will give thee the worth of it in money.

chapters.zh: 拿伯对亚哈说：我敬畏耶和华，万不敢将我先人留下的产业给你。
chapters.en: And Naboth said to Ahab, The LORD forbid it me, that I should give the inheritance of my fathers unto thee.

chapters.zh: 亚哈因耶斯列人拿伯说我不敢将我先人留下的产业给你，就闷闷不乐地回宫，躺在床上，转脸向内，也不吃饭。
