chapters.en: And Ahab came into his house heavy and displeased because of the word which Naboth the Jezreelite had spoken to him: for he had said, I will not give thee the inheritance of my fathers. And he laid him down upon his bed, and turned away his face, and would eat no bread.

chapters.zh: 王后耶洗别来问他说：你为甚么心里这样忧闷，不吃饭呢？
chapters.en: But Jezebel his wife came to him, and said unto him, Why is thy spirit so sad, that thou eatest no bread?

chapters.zh: 他回答说：因我向耶斯列人拿伯说：你将你的葡萄园给我，我给你价银，或是你愿意，我就把别的葡萄园换给你；他却说：我不将我的葡萄园给你。
chapters.en: And he said unto her, Because I spake unto Naboth the Jezreelite, and said unto him, Give me thy vineyard for money; or else, if it please thee, I will give thee vineyard for it: and he answered, I will not give thee my vineyard.

chapters.zh: 王后耶洗别对亚哈说：你现在是治理以色列国不是？只管起来，心里畅畅快快地吃饭，我必将耶斯列人拿伯的葡萄园给你。
chapters.en: And Jezebel his wife said unto him, Dost thou now govern the kingdom of Israel? arise, eat bread, and let thine heart be merry: I will give thee the vineyard of Naboth the Jezreelite.

chapters.zh: 于是托亚哈的名写信，用王的印印上，送给那些与拿伯同城居住的长老贵胄。
chapters.en: So she wrote letters in Ahab's name, and sealed with his seal, and sent the letters unto the elders and to the nobles that in his city, dwelling with Naboth.

chapters.zh: 信上写著说：你们当宣告禁食，叫拿伯坐在民间的高位上，
chapters.en: And she wrote in the letters, saying, Proclaim a fast, and set Naboth on high among the people:

chapters.zh: 又叫两个匪徒坐在拿伯对面，作见证告他说：你谤渎神和王了；随后就把他拉出去用石头打死。
chapters.en: And set two men, sons of Belial, before him, to bear witness against him, saying, Thou didst blaspheme God and the king. And carry him out, and stone him, that he may die.

chapters.zh: 那些与拿伯同城居住的长老贵胄得了耶洗别的信，就照信而行，
chapters.en: And the men of his city, the elders and the nobles who were the inhabitants in his city, did as Jezebel had sent unto them, as it written in the letters which she had sent unto them.

chapters.zh: 宣告禁食，叫拿伯坐在民间的高位上。
chapters.en: They proclaimed a fast, and set Naboth on high among the people.

chapters.zh: 有两个匪徒来，坐在拿伯的对面，当著众民作见证告他说：拿伯谤渎神和王了！众人就把他拉到城外，用石头打死。
chapters.en: And there came in two men, children of Belial, and sat before him: and the men of Belial witnessed against him, against Naboth, in the presence of the people, saying, Naboth did blaspheme God and the king. Then they carried him forth out of the city, and stoned him with stones, that he died.

chapters.zh: 于是打发人去见耶洗别，说：拿伯被石头打死了。
chapters.en: Then they sent to Jezebel, saying, Naboth is stoned, and is dead.

chapters.zh: 耶洗别听见拿伯被石头打死，就对亚哈说：你起来得耶斯列人拿伯不肯为价银给你的葡萄园罢！现在他已经死了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Jezebel heard that Naboth was stoned, and was dead, that Jezebel said to Ahab, Arise, take possession of the vineyard of Naboth the Jezreelite, which he refused to give thee for money: for Naboth is not alive, but dead.

chapters.zh: 亚哈听见拿伯死了，就起来，下去要得耶斯列人拿伯的葡萄园。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Ahab heard that Naboth was dead, that Ahab rose up to go down to the vineyard of Naboth the Jezreelite, to take possession of it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到提斯比人以利亚说：
chapters.en: And the word of the LORD came to Elijah the Tishbite, saying,

chapters.zh: 你起来，去见住撒玛利亚的以色列王亚哈，他下去要得拿伯的葡萄园，现今正在那园里。
chapters.en: Arise, go down to meet Ahab king of Israel, which in Samaria: behold, in the vineyard of Naboth, whither he is gone down to possess it.

chapters.zh: 你要对他说：耶和华如此说：你杀了人，又得他的产业么？又要对他说：耶和华如此说：狗在何处舔拿伯的血，也必在何处舔你的血。
chapters.en: And thou shalt speak unto him, saying, Thus saith the LORD, Hast thou killed, and also taken possession? And thou shalt speak unto him, saying, Thus saith the LORD, In the place where dogs licked the blood of Naboth shall dogs lick thy blood, even thine.

chapters.zh: 亚哈对以利亚说：我仇敌啊，你找到我么？他回答说：我找到你了；因为你卖了自己，行耶和华眼中看为恶的事。
chapters.en: And Ahab said to Elijah, Hast thou found me, O mine enemy? And he answered, I have found : because thou hast sold thyself to work evil in the sight of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必使灾祸临到你，将你除尽。凡属你的男丁，无论困住的、自由的，都从以色列中剪除。
chapters.en: Behold, I will bring evil upon thee, and will take away thy posterity, and will cut off from Ahab him that pisseth against the wall, and him that is shut up and left in Israel,

chapters.zh: 我必使你的家像尼八的儿子耶罗波安的家，又像亚希雅的儿子巴沙的家；因为你惹我发怒，又使以色列人陷在罪里。
chapters.en: And will make thine house like the house of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, and like the house of Baasha the son of Ahijah, for the provocation wherewith thou hast provoked to anger, and made Israel to sin.

chapters.zh: 论到耶洗别，耶和华也说：狗在耶斯列的外郭必吃耶洗别的肉。
chapters.en: And of Jezebel also spake the LORD, saying, The dogs shall eat Jezebel by the wall of Jezreel.

chapters.zh: 凡属亚哈的人，死在城中的必被狗吃，死在田野的必被空中的鸟吃。
chapters.en: Him that dieth of Ahab in the city the dogs shall eat; and him that dieth in the field shall the fowls of the air eat.

chapters.zh: （从来没有像亚哈的，因他自卖，行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，受了王后耶洗别的耸动；
chapters.en: But there was none like unto Ahab, which did sell himself to work wickedness in the sight of the LORD, whom Jezebel his wife stirred up.

chapters.zh: 就照耶和华在以色列人面前所赶出的亚摩利人，行了最可憎恶的事，信从偶像。）
chapters.en: And he did very abominably in following idols, according to all as did the Amorites, whom the LORD cast out before the children of Israel.

chapters.zh: 亚哈听见这话，就撕裂衣服，禁食，身穿麻布，睡卧也穿著麻布，并且缓缓而行。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Ahab heard those words, that he rent his clothes, and put sackcloth upon his flesh, and fasted, and lay in sackcloth, and went softly.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到提斯比人以利亚说：
chapters.en: And the word of the LORD came to Elijah the Tishbite, saying,

chapters.zh: 亚哈在我面前这样自卑，你看见了么？因他在我面前自卑，他还在世的时候，我不降这祸；到他儿子的时候，我必降这祸与他的家。
chapters.en: Seest thou how Ahab humbleth himself before me? because he humbleth himself before me, I will not bring the evil in his days: in his son's days will I bring the evil upon his house.

chapters.zh: 亚兰国和以色列国三年没有争战。
chapters.en: And they continued three years without war between Syria and Israel.

chapters.zh: 到第三年，犹大王约沙法下去见以色列王。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the third year, that Jehoshaphat the king of Judah came down to the king of Israel.

chapters.zh: 以色列王对臣仆说：你们不知道基列的拉末是属我们的么？我们岂可静坐不动，不从亚兰王手里夺回来么？
chapters.en: And the king of Israel said unto his servants, Know ye that Ramoth in Gilead ours, and we still, take it not out of the hand of the king of Syria?

chapters.zh: 亚哈问约沙法说：你肯同我去攻取基列的拉末吗？约沙法对以色列王说：你我不分彼此，我的民与你的民一样，我的马与你的马一样。
chapters.en: And he said unto Jehoshaphat, Wilt thou go with me to battle to Ramothgilead? And Jehoshaphat said to the king of Israel, I as thou , my people as thy people, my horses as thy horses.

chapters.zh: 约沙法对以色列王说：请你先求问耶和华。
chapters.en: And Jehoshaphat said unto the king of Israel, Enquire, I pray thee, at the word of the LORD to day.

chapters.zh: 于是以色列王招聚先知，约有四百人，问他们说：我上去攻取基列的拉末可以不可以？他们说：可以上去，因为主必将那城交在王的手里。
chapters.en: Then the king of Israel gathered the prophets together, about four hundred men, and said unto them, Shall I go against Ramothgilead to battle, or shall I forbear? And they said, Go up; for the Lord shall deliver into the hand of the king.

chapters.zh: 约沙法说：这里不是还有耶和华的先知，我们可以求问他么？
chapters.en: And Jehoshaphat said, not here a prophet of the LORD besides, that we might enquire of him?

chapters.zh: 以色列王对约沙法说：还有一个人，是音拉的儿子米该雅，我们可以托他求问耶和华。只是我恨他；因为他指著我所说的预言，不说吉语，单说凶言。约沙法说：王不必这样说。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel said unto Jehoshaphat, yet one man, Micaiah the son of Imlah, by whom we may enquire of the LORD: but I hate him; for he doth not prophesy good concerning me, but evil. And Jehoshaphat said, Let not the king say so.

chapters.zh: 以色列王就召了一个太监来，说：你快去，将音拉的儿子米该雅召来。
chapters.en: Then the king of Israel called an officer, and said, Hasten Micaiah the son of Imlah.

chapters.zh: 以色列王和犹大王约沙法在撒玛利亚城门前的空场上，各穿朝服，坐在位上，所有的先知都在他们面前说预言。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat the king of Judah sat each on his throne, having put on their robes, in a void place in the entrance of the gate of Samaria; and all the prophets prophesied before them.

chapters.zh: 基拿拿的儿子西底家造了两个铁角，说：耶和华如此说：你要用这角牴触亚兰人，直到将他们灭尽。
chapters.en: And Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah made him horns of iron: and he said, Thus saith the LORD, With these shalt thou push the Syrians, until thou have consumed them.

chapters.zh: 所有的先知也都这样预言说：可以上基列的拉末去，必然得胜，因为耶和华必将那城交在王的手中。
chapters.en: And all the prophets prophesied so, saying, Go up to Ramothgilead, and prosper: for the LORD shall deliver into the king's hand.

chapters.zh: 那去召米该雅的使者对米该雅说；众先知一口同音地都向王说吉言，你不如与他们说一样的话，也说吉言。
chapters.en: And the messenger that was gone to call Micaiah spake unto him, saying, Behold now, the words of the prophets good unto the king with one mouth: let thy word, I pray thee, be like the word of one of them, and speak good.

chapters.zh: 米该雅说：我指著永生的耶和华起誓，耶和华对我说甚么，我就说甚么。
chapters.en: And Micaiah said, the LORD liveth, what the LORD saith unto me, that will I speak.

chapters.zh: 米该雅到王面前，王问他说：米该雅啊，我们上去攻取基列的拉末可以不可以？他回答说：可以上去，必然得胜，耶和华必将那城交在王的手中。
chapters.en: So he came to the king. And the king said unto him, Micaiah, shall we go against Ramothgilead to battle, or shall we forbear? And he answered him, Go, and prosper: for the LORD shall deliver into the hand of the king.

chapters.zh: 王对他说：我当嘱咐你几次，你才奉耶和华的名向我说实话呢？
chapters.en: And the king said unto him, How many times shall I adjure thee that thou tell me nothing but true in the name of the LORD?

chapters.zh: 米该雅说：我看见以色列众民散在山上，如同没有牧人的羊群一般。耶和华说：这民没有主人，他们可以平平安安地各归各家去。
chapters.en: And he said, I saw all Israel scattered upon the hills, as sheep that have not a shepherd: and the LORD said, These have no master: let them return every man to his house in peace.

chapters.zh: 以色列王对约沙法说：我岂没有告诉你，这人指著我所说的预言，不说吉语单说凶言么？
chapters.en: And the king of Israel said unto Jehoshaphat, Did I not tell thee that he would prophesy no good concerning me, but evil?

chapters.zh: 米该雅说：你要听耶和华的话！我看见耶和华坐在宝座上，天上的万军侍立在他左右。
chapters.en: And he said, Hear thou therefore the word of the LORD: I saw the LORD sitting on his throne, and all the host of heaven standing by him on his right hand and on his left.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：谁去引诱亚哈上基列的拉末去阵亡呢？这个就这样说，那个就那样说。
chapters.en: And the LORD said, Who shall persuade Ahab, that he may go up and fall at Ramothgilead? And one said on this manner, and another said on that manner.

chapters.zh: 随后有一个神灵出来，站在耶和华面前，说：我去引诱他。
chapters.en: And there came forth a spirit, and stood before the LORD, and said, I will persuade him.

chapters.zh: 耶和华问他说：你用何法呢？他说：我去，要在他众先知口中作谎言的灵。耶和华说：这样，你必能引诱他，你去如此行罢！
chapters.en: And the LORD said unto him, Wherewith? And he said, I will go forth, and I will be a lying spirit in the mouth of all his prophets. And he said, Thou shalt persuade , and prevail also: go forth, and do so.

chapters.zh: 现在耶和华使谎言的灵入了你这些先知的口，并且耶和华已经命定降祸与你。
chapters.en: Now therefore, behold, the LORD hath put a lying spirit in the mouth of all these thy prophets, and the LORD hath spoken evil concerning thee.

chapters.zh: 基拿拿的儿子西底家前来，打米该雅的脸，说：耶和华的灵从哪里离开我与你说话呢？
chapters.en: But Zedekiah the son of Chenaanah went near, and smote Micaiah on the cheek, and said, Which way went the Spirit of the LORD from me to speak unto thee?

chapters.zh: 米该雅说：你进严密的屋子藏躲的那日，就必看见了。
chapters.en: And Micaiah said, Behold, thou shalt see in that day, when thou shalt go into an inner chamber to hide thyself.

chapters.zh: 以色列王说：将米该雅带回，交给邑宰亚们和王的儿子约阿施，说
chapters.en: And the king of Israel said, Take Micaiah, and carry him back unto Amon the governor of the city, and to Joash the king's son;

chapters.zh: 王如此说，把这个人下在监里，使他受苦，吃不饱喝不足，等候我平平安安地回来。
chapters.en: And say, Thus saith the king, Put this in the prison, and feed him with bread of affliction and with water of affliction, until I come in peace.

chapters.zh: 米该雅说：你若能平平安安地回来，那就是耶和华没有藉我说这话了；又说：众民哪，你们都要听！
chapters.en: And Micaiah said, If thou return at all in peace, the LORD hath not spoken by me. And he said, Hearken, O people, every one of you.

chapters.zh: 以色列王和犹大王约沙法上基列的拉末去了。
chapters.en: So the king of Israel and Jehoshaphat the king of Judah went up to Ramothgilead.

chapters.zh: 以色列王对约沙法说：我要改装上阵，你可以仍穿王服。以色列王就改装上阵。
chapters.en: And the king of Israel said unto Jehoshaphat, I will disguise myself, and enter into the battle; but put thou on thy robes. And the king of Israel disguised himself, and went into the battle.

chapters.zh: 先是亚兰王吩咐他的三十二个车兵长说：他们的兵将，无论大小，你们都不可与他们争战，只要与以色列王争战。
chapters.en: But the king of Syria commanded his thirty and two captains that had rule over his chariots, saying, Fight neither with small nor great, save only with the king of Israel.

chapters.zh: 车兵长看见约沙法，便说：这必是以色列王！就转过去与他争战，约沙法便呼喊。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the captains of the chariots saw Jehoshaphat, that they said, Surely it the king of Israel. And they turned aside to fight against him: and Jehoshaphat cried out.

chapters.zh: 车兵长见不是以色列王，就转去不追他了。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when the captains of the chariots perceived that it not the king of Israel, that they turned back from pursuing him.

chapters.zh: 有一人随便开弓，恰巧射入以色列王的甲缝里。王对赶车的说：我受了重伤，你转过车来，拉我出阵罢！
chapters.en: And a man drew a bow at a venture, and smote the king of Israel between the joints of the harness: wherefore he said unto the driver of his chariot, Turn thine hand, and carry me out of the host; for I am wounded.

chapters.zh: 那日，阵势越战越猛，有人扶王站在车上，抵挡亚兰人。到晚上，王就死了，血从伤处流在车中。
chapters.en: And the battle increased that day: and the king was stayed up in his chariot against the Syrians, and died at even: and the blood ran out of the wound into the midst of the chariot.

chapters.zh: 约在日落的时候，有号令传遍军中，说：各归本城，各归本地罢！
chapters.en: And there went a proclamation throughout the host about the going down of the sun, saying, Every man to his city, and every man to his own country.

chapters.zh: 王既死了，众人将他送到撒玛利亚，就葬在那里；
chapters.en: So the king died, and was brought to Samaria; and they buried the king in Samaria.

chapters.zh: 又有人把他的车洗在撒玛利亚的池旁（妓女在那里洗澡），狗来舔他的血，正如耶和华所说的话。
chapters.en: And washed the chariot in the pool of Samaria; and the dogs licked up his blood; and they washed his armour; according unto the word of the LORD which he spake.

chapters.zh: 亚哈其余的事，凡他所行的和他所修造的象牙宫，并所建筑的一切城邑，都写在以色列诸王记上。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Ahab, and all that he did, and the ivory house which he made, and all the cities that he built, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Israel?

chapters.zh: 亚哈与他列祖同睡。他儿子亚哈谢接续他作王。
chapters.en: So Ahab slept with his fathers; and Ahaziah his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 以色列王亚哈第四年，亚撒的儿子约沙法登基作了犹大王。
chapters.en: And Jehoshaphat the son of Asa began to reign over Judah in the fourth year of Ahab king of Israel.

chapters.zh: 约沙法登基的时候年三十五岁，在耶路撒冷作王二十五年。他母亲名叫阿苏巴，乃示利希的女儿。
chapters.en: Jehoshaphat thirty and five years old when he began to reign; and he reigned twenty and five years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Azubah the daughter of Shilhi.

chapters.zh: 约沙法行他父亲亚撒所行的道，不偏离左右，行耶和华眼中看为正的事；只是邱坛还没有废去，百姓仍在那里献祭烧香。
chapters.en: And he walked in all the ways of Asa his father; he turned not aside from it, doing right in the eyes of the LORD:

chapters.zh: 约沙法与以色列王和好。
chapters.en: Nevertheless the high places were not taken away; the people offered and burnt incense yet in the high places.

chapters.zh: 约沙法其余的事和他所显出的勇力，并他怎样争战，都写在犹大列王记上。
chapters.en: And Jehoshaphat made peace with the king of Israel.

chapters.zh: 约沙法将他父亲亚撒在世所剩下的娈童都从国中除去了。
chapters.en: Now the rest of the acts of Jehoshaphat, and his might that he shewed, and how he warred, they not written in the book of the chronicles of the kings of Judah?

chapters.zh: 那时以东没有王，有总督治理。
chapters.en: And the remnant of the sodomites, which remained in the days of his father Asa, he took out of the land.

chapters.zh: 约沙法制造他施船只，要往俄斐去，将金子运来；只是没有去，因为船在以旬迦别破坏了。
chapters.en: then no king in Edom: a deputy king.

chapters.zh: 亚哈的儿子亚哈谢对约沙法说：容我的仆人和你的仆人坐船同去罢！约沙法却不肯。
chapters.en: Jehoshaphat made ships of Tharshish to go to Ophir for gold: but they went not; for the ships were broken at Eziongeber.

chapters.zh: 约沙法与列祖同睡。葬在大卫城他列祖的坟地里。他儿子约兰接续他作王。
chapters.en: Then said Ahaziah the son of Ahab unto Jehoshaphat, Let my servants go with thy servants in the ships. But Jehoshaphat would not.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约沙法十七年，亚哈的儿子亚哈谢在撒玛利亚登基，作以色列王共二年。
chapters.en: And Jehoshaphat slept with his fathers, and was buried with his fathers in the city of David his father: and Jehoram his son reigned in his stead.

chapters.zh: 他行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，效法他的父母，又行尼八的儿子耶罗波安使以色列人陷在罪里的事。
chapters.en: Ahaziah the son of Ahab began to reign over Israel in Samaria the seventeenth year of Jehoshaphat king of Judah, and reigned two years over Israel.

chapters.zh: 他照他父亲一切所行的，事奉敬拜巴力，惹耶和华 ─ 以色列神的怒气。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the sight of the LORD, and walked in the way of his father, and in the way of his mother, and in the way of Jeroboam the son of Nebat, who made Israel to sin:
For he served Baal, and worshipped him, and provoked to anger the LORD God of Israel, according to all that his father had done.
